Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3bc482fda0ca462c9743198ce449ba42&_e=TXSkRXFPbGxb2dvX4jGWZOSJC0WQ_SupuctyJRxPgcHqM5d03VlSbcp4iXA6ZDTGX6qGCgtA4i9GKertY-rAUHVVCPPQDQEtG9RiRoPnJRs4DxUe0SziD00jvbSkfM3HRcux2paTFac7w8mu1OLIq8vnjqKL73Ew2L-JcXU24irEJoTeq2K-rQnV0Jy3HgI_ps2h7WNsrHjMeiC2wOZhhxcimTgF6ekue3k4x9N3g_pKBT3HISyMXzwnkOx6EoLVP3OWG5rcKCx6DdM_BC7Iq26Amuq7pV96B5HwqDOuJ7CNg1wsgfCyQfqvTheXvSL0UsYk3F4bQHsmwtTVy91OSw%3D%3D)

The United States should NOT be the sugar daddy of the world, especially not for foreign nations and organizations that act contrary to our beliefs. | | | [](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/vc8kDt8cBiDi1o6T3HnEpcqU97GmFogV36wV2Re5H-3e7RKk7_JFxIilcDkVPn9cwUgIFjfYkM7EhUFoHUkqUqNxeLv1hLb4UFpoP5zSG9WmubExp33ZDzmn98g87yhAen3UpjdeTmoHWeAfqEOSyIbRSt-RPUTEDLwoN5osztwqMSbO4JUtizHzWy80qwTWu3HRT8udTOKx6Xk46IOYu5m-bo4ldkw24ie36WwPTMuQQPLcZACkhDc644U2NVyMapO86TKc7wC9e9X8ruaumIFMQlDTdHzxI2QCFBGYubqtSzMfzaLl955QsbDmSHCNn-azO1dtj9gH3hOkRVqCCLNcr4BpELJfaJE3eTTBY9Rsrd4fGRs2LJddG0Vv6GRCKpoKKI2iiQTadsS3N_DeVFOHqj1hSolqB0t5ZUVc9i1dCiAGhTjwcAWX7Qyw4CDO6B8/EEbsLvjZoBlca5zt8KQwWhEyyB7gTO4b/6)
---
Peter, The United States should **NOT** be the sugar daddy of the world, especially not for foreign nations and organizations that act contrary to our beliefs. _**_[_**_I AGREE >>_**_](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/E4FxKvoGzBcDnc4rgLhXSdFYaIbjVV4q2ukNntF5alz9NJzw0CNQ6BNxp-W3md7_Paom5AuXEcu6QGjSklSW07d70Wom0I8I0AmpBQQZZ22BVxeu6a9-BYy3Z46iYC5NL8bJtfmhmrMluuRaonP0cp22P2SfbZAW3iUEGNqu_xmYkr01t1U_hjf1g7i7rzmOhpqaB4qNUQoEjYhGW8BLAHXZWEadusfPatu029TiHreEEvxpGSEusFogk6PaoMBO8_l1fsPlTxCizrcZtuFa63CtuYf-Y4hTNNPW9N-KpcCOMqC0pGnoV6hXf4h6tmC1n-hjAn5jvZ-z9wpVezzr0G0io2fcz9s6B0fMgXQXBOcf_Ph23SCgiixZ9zRDHWwLiUX-vn9sFG_Ur3mmUj0Rk0YKZkfXpnlE7lbhkKyj7wpMiEZ0kGiWL-sTDcbKLwICkpw/YgmpwBMhjRBrZj3rlXNqen0p1llj1LLp/6)_**_ Our country is $36 trillion in debt, yet we send billions of dollars overseas, often funding projects that further our nation's demise. Last year, I uncovered over $1 trillion in waste, with the State Department and USAID being some of the worst offenders. _**_[What are some of the things they waste your money on?](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/4l8qrgUHr_PDhl5InntuR8jWtkSfrYgLtOS67JceWxhqxCARKdh1M-ztpgVN_2Hbq-cwj-2jMVldHzm2a1IOYwr1Vo8iriGvVdfSz5ZwfkO_EaIqsu6jpRR200azhEEvd0SxgQj8wmmenmCvALpmKUbJAQ8sh0L-QWvOLkzKiTrwocbggpLDHZ8PVY1fvbsCWcxHHe8OBJumaWYQTwc1_HQdlJrUsbL94wFqqzV4EW79cgTkgFdlQkUzkUvJlTN1RonfNA8tPoOHplnREzH9X0m0j1cjn_Uk7Q4FlOpKh2jlkGeGcqQNSGKgbXn8UQVjySLE3rYUag8_4B1eTnwLZplSxksHTX8NG7k9rZWyRmwSKjE9THl-CJtw2Jih3QeYcVWjZyUwPiK9GEg5EAYc12AFXTNgvp6QClz2vj0A_GmyjbBVEqCVqMdkOfE9x8ib_XU/ioRa5F5dOc3fJXzSNy-2M3BCCxtlMWB3/6)_**_
* USAID gave almost $88 million to help Afghan farmers produce poppy, the plant from which opium is extracted (remember, Afghanistan supplies 90% of the world's heroin)
* USAID funneled more than $54 million to EcoHealth Alliance, the very organization linked to the Wuhan Institute of Virology and likely the start of the COVID pandemic
* $20 million to create a new Sesame Street show in Iraq
* $15 million to provide oral contraceptives and condoms in Afghanistan
USAID spent $6 million to promote tourism in Egypt
* $4.8 million to Ukraine's public affairs office to fund social media influencers
* $3 million to promote "girl-centered climate change" in Brazil
* $2.1 million to Paraguay to enhance their border security
* USAID spent $2 million on transgender surgeries, hormone therapy, and gender-affirming care in Guatemala

**Peter, we could save billions of dollars every year just by cutting wasteful foreign spending. _[Chip in now to stand with me in this fight.](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/bjHif5cI12Rp4SmbTHuPoaAL0ZAz6diLOViwx1w7rcPBtYK0TlGRwZjpQHF5v4fiEGygNimg5ZUPRwdjqYJLveDMHrvPJegsfcbKKpwT9tmhy_UJr7aTmb9GWJRE7-MlaYIQ85B1WIPIpmX-jSxzalh5iEIfXaozOnHaiycVActmMHqk1XQZMTHUWnGRimTrwZ7y3C0LKHLfn4N1w0pnNGlHKh6xxBXIczFld8esMxLtNv04mHhxdZEg9GUxm6_wfWYE5SbfPjgmxQq1UhSO2G5kYYINh_o5mETSycJOBIWVzU5CaLcZEGP6cC_WNraxcHgBLUHW3qZH2bSKfV0v0W9hDZWOiglqUEKAWRtYTC0PTmXgIZwpWoRjyoZ5v8o9eIzL3_xhpEFhsy-OBOKBjKOuCZ8mAi_eVKPP7bxxEmaDTIfqCMHE-X0gk1PL6u2nZ64/dDPeyfvGUrcYNRyAgYHc2bFSzGoiMwfi/6)_**
---
[**STAND WITH RAND: DONATE NOW**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/G8uOuT9vm7VN5JlIEWcjvluN8frhEcXcQUd2Y41CnzKgimIQgMbbfK2aAYNynKcZ7-C44eR74XWPnpL0NxbhYG5LZ3EeDyG5_OY7ER3V0bWK4u0jFR7Sf4ORLUlykXa-4RQ7XKRxu8ZDm9nvNNj0klgZK3WrluhV8aaRTgkLETVBb8AXiQUFfXbG9uy2aD8YXbupdxYKiA7refafashkYE5l5AGF7MHOSUHy5weUSmQw5R96wVcw0GXZQ7V2dqSPv1JVy-v9HHQCgu7ai6j9TKAcfS-BiLirzTl7dTNG1IV-X-5IhW3ZgPVnxYTGqsxrLKsfWPYg7WrlndojCvJf5PyV7t6hmC6OH5YFfTd0VZ1Px97uThWRe3jKcUs-_iZ7tOFQGQiBuPP5O-gHEJUtz5e5CZoIniqzN3dZlw28pKJQBJpPkvxHofAZOvTQRICWnPE/knZLGf3UGXtOlhvCJVGVvFodqxg1S1Zm/6)
---
The money we would save cutting this wasteful spending could be used to pay down our national debt and take care of the American people, the ones who actually pay these taxes in the first place.
**Donate now:_[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/direct-dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/4rZBBtyRqZqn5Di5ab3Yn_x8LqxxsFhp5Fb-VIrrKurRscGCKtE2fifU3fg0Z65JSCSFKxvwDStcg-1svjeOh31n3ftk5r3Fsp3hTEnoU0QC7UAOyaPT4dLMHNBhikx5TqQ1LBeMsLL96QQIBBPkUNDvq-ochDE1xT5dMaa11u7Key0Z3Q4mdqtiEYB6ODtnFZMw5nJbSOCB6bx0jdXICM0C7WBAqkAPHm3DO6jdRmVpwZvB8XgIvlir_U6M_9r8B9ObEuUYQk7355_Ihd6nMnAwaOzXkx6fguRpqHstdfFTqqBdGYsIpbr8pu6vIV8N9rSkOj7c7cBTEjTkFxQ448Y5yX9C0SypO5eyjwp2rFlEww5Y1NWm2Nr3kXhBBaj3nxmaJv-qzqP5sNENxp3DKt-tvpoxPTvbI4fUbPv_Qe6tRNadT-bw5yxQ5z4GA5oxQkc/uBS48b71ndT_bN3kw16rvFswJoGpEuOd/6)_**
In liberty,
Rand Paul

name: CADEM HQ
subject: In California, we did the impossible:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Hi friends,
The 2024 Election was heartbreaking at the national level with the reelection of President Trump.
But here in California, we did the impossible. Even in an unfavorable national environment, we flipped three seats from red to blue and narrowed Mike Johnson’s Republican Majority.
How did we do it? Through organizing .
We sent over 18 million texts, dialed 7 million phones, and knocked nearly 800,000 doors in critical swing districts across the state. That was only possible because of generous donors like you who funded our organizing programs in the months and years leading up to the election. Will you invest in our organizing efforts again, so we can take back the U.S. House in 2026? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-feb25?refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-feb25?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-feb25?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-feb25?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-feb25?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-feb25?&refcode=&amount=]We know that many of you don’t have fond memories of the 2024 Elections. We get it.
But California over-performed in a challenging national environment and flipped three congressional districts from red to blue.
In Orange County, we made history by electing the first Vietnamese-American to represent California in the House of Representatives.
In the Central Valley, we flipped a Trump-led Congressional District and in Southern California, we secured the final Republican-held House seat with parts of the City of Los Angeles.
This resulted in California flipping more congressional seats than any other state in the country!
This wasn’t happenstance or good luck. This is because we hustled and invested in organizing programs early. We can run that same playbook RIGHT NOW, but need the budget to do so. Will you pitch in $ or $ to fund our efforts to retake the U.S. House right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-feb25?refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-feb25?&refcode=&amount=]Thank you,
— CADEM

DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=&amount=20.24]
Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.
If this email was forwarded to you, please sign up for our email list here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zWMh-KAhmUiJYxMzOxKADQ2]
We rely on email to communicate with supporters like you and conduct the business of the California Democratic Party, but if you wish to receive only our most important emails, let us know here to sign up for fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/60txJAHUg0OznGGaWVwO_A2]
And if you no longer wish to receive emails from the California Democratic Party, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.cadem.org/p/BZcF64X0Zkie6fv4FEU9PQ2?unsubscribedata=rlu8UKCklV%2FkoYJr7N0cke6jzLbXrelWd2c91eX2gjuL9FK0hovL9fipDckyhbGKMWVW7IDCvepmc%2BQE52KLZzO9cuYEZ1%2FkIFJ5QtzPGN2TSODRiUlBb30cgT5JOJaseA1aBcfNc27cNzwUwbUPosRS5jC0NhOm5WTJBR2JbR5ghiSBxbSvEZzk3AhOALCkFRYZ1X45fZ6D5hEQiLs%2BPHQa4AwTOXuru9QlefLlAWkjBnPMabR1cP10pSskZXN3POa%2Bm%2FRU3oEWfWThp%2FMkETnJr2q%2BoxNu8gHf2vUhd3Jn7CXghzc9SE3IcSYYdKmhs8CODWPEbaDfuDf0jk5jzSA%2Btcg0Yp2occ0LumexZri3Ip9A1BhwD%2F%2FHMWq%2BoOCdabrkr%2FtDcuuiVcIQP3pWkUXNFUkWlK%2Bv0L8J02ahVWU%3D .

Friend, Josh Weil here - the Democratic nominee in Florida’s 6th Congressional District that could very well decide the makeup of the House of Representatives.

And yet...The national media isn’t covering this race. They should be.

**In less than 40 days, we have the chance to FLIP a Republican stronghold, destroy Trump’s razor-thin majority, and send MAGA extremism reeling. But the chattering class in Washington doesn’t believe it’s possible.

** They don’t understand the power of this movement.

They don’t see the unprecedented grassroots energy fueling this campaign. They don’t see the volunteers knocking doors, the small-dollar donors chipping in whatever they can, and the voters ready to stand up against Trump’s extremist agenda.

**_And honestly? Let them ignore us.

_****_We don’t need their attention. We need action.

_** This race is winnable, but only if we have the resources to fight MAGA’s money machine. Our opponent is pouring cash into this race because they know what’s at stake. They know if they lose here, their entire agenda crumbles.

**[So let’s make them regret underestimating us. Chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help us build the grassroots operation that will flip this seat and shock the world.](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ3MTc0OTg3MjA4MzI4Nzg3LFwiclwiOjE0NzE3NTAzNzk5ODIwNDg4OX0iLCJzIjoiMjVlNGRjMGI2ZjY0NjQxZiJ9)**

In less than 40 days, we have the chance to FLIP a Republican stronghold, destroy Trump’s razor-thin majority, and send MAGA extremism reeling. But the chattering class in Washington doesn’t believe it’s possible. They don’t understand the power of this movement. They don’t see the unprecedented grassroots energy fueling this campaign. They don’t see the volunteers knocking doors, the small-dollar donors chipping in whatever they can, and the voters ready to stand up against Trump’s extremist agenda. And honestly? Let them ignore us. We don’t need their attention. We need action. This race is winnable, but only if we have the resources to fight MAGA’s money machine. Our opponent is pouring cash into this race because they know what’s at stake. They know if they lose here, their entire agenda crumbles. | | | | | The media won’t cover this race, but history will remember what we do here. Let’s make sure it remembers a WIN for Democrats! name: History Facts
subject: The 5 strangest days in history
body:
There have been 91,310 days in the last 250 years, but only a few of them stand out as singularly odd — whether because of unexplained phenomena, surprising coincidences, or, in some cases, a strange quiet.
---

| T here have been 91,310 days in the last 250 years, but only a few of them stand out as singularly odd — whether because of unexplained phenomena, surprising coincidences, or, in some cases, a strange quiet. From the day an entire region thought the apocalypse was coming, to the day apparently nothing of note happened at all, some days really stand out. Next time you’re having an eerie day, put it in perspective with these five dates.

clean_body: There have been 91,310 days in the last 250 years, but only a few of them stand out as singularly odd — whether because of unexplained phenomena, surprising coincidences, or, in some cases, a strange quiet. Receiving too many emails? | T here have been 91,310 days in the last 250 years, but only a few of them stand out as singularly odd — whether because of unexplained phenomena, surprising coincidences, or, in some cases, a strange quiet. From the day an entire region thought the apocalypse was coming, to the day apparently nothing of note happened at all, some days really stand out. You may have heard of Hillsdale College, but did you know that we are leading a national effort to restore excellence in American education?

| | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. Dear Friend of Liberty,

You may have heard of Hillsdale College, but did you know that we are leading a national effort to restore excellence in American education?

For nearly 200 years, Hillsdale College has provided a classical education rooted in the Constitution and the principles of liberty--without taking a single penny of government funding.

[That's why we are conducting the **National Survey on the Department of Education**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/H4PWIFT18_YKH3fo3qBdfL21BU6K8mKPaixLzg_JfEaGsUhZx7S3r6-3NvyMdDi6rFtFe9UZmgXxUd4bCJr4AU0cPifQgannTInLpfVpKpQdF7xohoFkBbirofsiTKqcXklERgPVKtru_i1vadzJzRKmYhY9nxSU98ZlapoH0frUjOZ4yttacnBoCdszNgI3RBNKzTI2Uez2xVIvZhC3sFMfhbVmP15xuHMwxSyB889axpxRyG_FcRirtUB0SLMmb1CgE8yc923QtZDEJff2411UNIgcP1AM_iom6s3sDyP08g-eOGsXQ2dUwmq2jI9ZM_ud3At0vKZSI9DpQRfyTK1qEoFO63C792aTXZMkPgreaqJvSNfFuCXOxLDtD6oDQGo9HoXLdNCURbuhA2zCM6uIPSNTf1bU-tiI5TzyJweZtF-51LaV-_PKTFOKDPyvlgIf2cdt/6SqRpwDjFvfwO9riGrg4gok1RNTxIx7I/6)--to hear what Americans like YOU think about the role of the federal government in education, parental rights, and school standards.

Will you take just two minutes to share your opinion?

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/department-of-education-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/6q9n9DWYQaGT-mXF4Fx6zxbn3Rw0ckSauKu0HiDv2xl63qFuDROps0ex8GKR1fTEzIUMNG4xtuDRdai7gCGyy6JCwwPnI5Tkfzc-7SeVdsXKugKzduJLjwBkTp4FjZNpXP4bcIEcUaCBp5oUYOWt1zp9NUwIdNY1SWe_TCgvC8yeGY0OW3FqFNK8Vpwte706t6tLbz_46KlHKhUeAgZbUIRKbiCqq8GBHEHTKKzbDb8n1S1O6ev8v4WpLtXs6Y1YXJqa-fSR3qeok6yggxu6m6ACESgPjxnHKQipf60iAvD4qrLqc7QA9YvPKIEGU4MS_rMHcuMa4ndE2gZntVj3ajTJrOpoZP83-RqOO4VZa22T8CQ2bQ6U9OItMGGQ7njdSZCEOyY9WNpNKFR_xtqTOOPyJ1lQtowjDRelWZPWkqwXXGN7Yt4Ju_RN9xVmNCWYuD6UqdPd/u3EG45q8u5jwitSiaUju56JD3QkmWr1g/6)

Your opinion matters. Together, we can ensure that education remains a foundation of liberty in America.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

Peter, The United States should **NOT** be the sugar daddy of the world, especially not for foreign nations and organizations that act contrary to our beliefs. _**_[_**_I AGREE >>_**_](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/khBAo74tYiXOWVHKGZ5TYVHuJCf3r4mgrd1GK0datS07Og3SvpVALgAlGynrV0qF1riRIekG830ASxuWkFnZwVhJp137KyadQC7mQyAVUIXYHb3zmX1RStoGqVJ7FWf7v8h0kGI-15_lyKoFK0tJBekTUeSlBSYz0Xx8Bg1U89ILHkKYV6vN50bV56rgyEjpG6M1w32yzu2sOsbiFFj3eV10p88si4un8S-tPkWNF16G4hW5T3ZsjchMFf0Zz3l1alDQZDoAFFzdf7EMW63ek2DVGsIcM2YEIMKFqhyRIYVy_lLAStEkktqb9_ZxyiYEi-nNcSVMAC7jGNsW2ARJIPdfPQT1JRclhB-qc7YsjOXaRJTPb-yFhu9yQmT3lhAyT9m5whdOJQfuopzkadS1V5UH9ZciDIYOvO_IXZwK-MLRuoaUosuiz4yWm_j9I9EFtmo/JaWuDHbk6amMHtsQ-BzgA-DQrO_VpreW/6)_**_ Our country is $36 trillion in debt, yet we send billions of dollars overseas, often funding projects that further our nation's demise. Last year, I uncovered over $1 trillion in waste, with the State Department and USAID being some of the worst offenders. _**_[What are some of the things they waste your money on?](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/g7DQ-HhCdbih6ox495aDFC9Lj-RsdTyQbuBQpspUsra9ehhbAPvvgxHwBWr6qTLB3HGh0ow5KnWhnjeDxEmSfpwABqfaRawPDAjHYVCKBTK5HS1lkVmkAfxVFKr1PVwG0_T0W626EgJ9YQFlRGFuUfG54Nxd62YIPlvUdn2K1q-RoMuuVzKSuJoKSiPY4s0PXeMKnUW4l7ZmNLR3Ytvu1YEfiM_7gDUKX6VnU2fPC3uo97GuYaFfQeKGbTq0Rez4oAsegOWks_sBP88eya7YgYEghs1YGfS0AkeS5-ex2OCH0ChX1K9j5DA75yurpfPxq0vsSM44qAqHvte9O6u7S_AF3riTZYNtZ1wnXwNwnl11kxcPS9kWPk_gxIg9u0sKVpA2kEBVD-_ow_9XwB6R6eIvRyIKnAUjv4gCaIUt1S6MhoRhwA7W-utBgJFuz7jC9FQ/tlVrZ65ap7Zkj5Dy2K4RE08VyL0ASvZM/6)_**_
* USAID gave almost $88 million to help Afghan farmers produce poppy, the plant from which opium is extracted (remember, Afghanistan supplies 90% of the world's heroin)
* USAID funneled more than $54 million to EcoHealth Alliance, the very organization linked to the Wuhan Institute of Virology and likely the start of the COVID pandemic
* $20 million to create a new Sesame Street show in Iraq
* $15 million to provide oral contraceptives and condoms in Afghanistan
USAID spent $6 million to promote tourism in Egypt
* $4.8 million to Ukraine's public affairs office to fund social media influencers
* $3 million to promote "girl-centered climate change" in Brazil
* $2.1 million to Paraguay to enhance their border security
* USAID spent $2 million on transgender surgeries, hormone therapy, and gender-affirming care in Guatemala

**Peter, we could save billions of dollars every year just by cutting wasteful foreign spending. _[Chip in now to stand with me in this fight.](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/-0aWMBYsV8TmsLpUwmWeGd_zlE-D9oOWE2iJ7_Dxj2FVvGlnM9UUkT904c_1EjNz8m0BkKiBNeoceh5pz5F7Bs7AXqhLjypYGVc_U7EwZc-zp6Kvbw-1rGzOPuoJ1lppyzKO5EHWa5Jc5PIU6oXTphvwBAk2AYkzeL29RHbdj021Co0yO0lMU19o7eQxRYU3XmjZNDaFrlGjPzIPi4q_C5oZmUp42Ac3AWSF5sPVskhF0I6c8Ry6StMS0AR0Rp4mTkhATVC7StEZsqjz5fPg7q5gjH9_3ILruhGSclTBbKIEKK2ivGyzcDfShsMw-qktgC1U0nkPW7JlnMhl9jCh8Ezo07Cm10t5NWqvoF0dzsp3i14azA1neDrDdMTTNNs_gyUwvB8Fdv1ipxqxdr45IrzaNSLSoMDUW3KSG2UGQWCzxT1y7AB37_tsIJzGphNXWz4/rPPCdfyOlAUUs6sIS5V9ZODdqABMTxg-/6)_**
---

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

body:

name: Tim Kaine
subject: “Losers”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Derek, we learned long ago that Donald Trump has zero respect for the men and women he asks to protect our country.
He calls fallen soldiers “losers” and “suckers.” He feuds with Gold Star families. He smears the late John McCain’s service and disparages captured service members.
His open hostility to those who’ve served — who’ve sacrificed more than he can even begin to comprehend — is disgusting to me.
We owe our veterans immense gratitude for their many sacrifices, and the best support and benefits our country can provide. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/DCII9CwRwkKBVPWO44nTXg2]
But right now, Trump’s actions are hurting our vets.
His executive orders are causing “chaos” at the VA according to its staff. And he’s slashing the federal workforce — which is made up of 30% veterans, compared to just 5% in the private workforce.
Our veterans deserve gratitude, support and respect. Instead, this is what many are getting:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/DCII9CwRwkKBVPWO44nTXg2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/DCII9CwRwkKBVPWO44nTXg2]
I will never stop fighting to deliver the support our vets deserve.
If you’re with me, please add your name to my petition today to demand the Trump-Musk Administration stop this reckless onslaught of firings and chaos that’s hurting American veterans. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/DCII9CwRwkKBVPWO44nTXg2]
Thanks for reading and speaking up.
-Tim Kaine

Closing the curtains on my campaign.

I'm at my wits' end, Peter.

The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

They've just dumped in $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
_**[Peter, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's Secretary of the Interior and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/4H3YMGPjzlF1C6P52fadczNRVlULV-BLRvG_J6MShGyqZ3BoqmPTp-2c2ZGJhyv01t8wvDnN-iRSAtskvqJ64kQCaZ2ZKnUev6yqmAq0pPM_S1Pl4KNC7F2IkbzoE_BitGocXKOs5nHjaX-8Dckt9tRRwjWxV8CMrsf1Mh8K90lMEW4rsYCGSkpz0qTnRVZPttppDqa4jZdGkGyww7sEyMJwYVicIFa3URzCxR3usPeFvNLHP2qWuk24QffMbWQJt4vtK8jOUGq5jk1gXrajXlJxa4asqWhm2lhpTcGrkBqrHqlJ4_Fn8578AGRNH79qoii-1voV_LEk0asPVayXkJuNWPHwSpYKP-KqSz3D4FI9SQszy19CYVbwvE3BUyQb6cNj81s31iNssbmbmMb1uaOYReL42bEZEOJ2y-cpbM36fLbwDve7os2m92C8e_CkHcvKzMlFT7CHV7dG1fay8POS0kAXAXLCH6dr3ygcTuvmtC9Pqcm_FPXNCVDhU-sdwkDVlIfWBTBzm7-Y4cONj2IjJTDsXb8oTDsXh5jLLHldNU4DJr-XPg/Azv6-2LXdQ-WUXacw5FC-aSlarbJd_6p/6 "Peter, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's Secretary of the Interior and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.")**_
_**In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party.**_

If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

_**[But if you can chip in just $5 right now](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/hAtG1WoBC2dx-jASLrbSbkwoSYf5q_jo4cP5sJVEGEWPAart3yLbQsI3cwp7F6hKLnbcNySP_zMAfS4xI0-slezSsop4GCRdLAIzvnXIpfaZ7PifE-MH3BYNi0W5KbB4LOz-2taXyhKME0EAPHVdma-Cmow0pJ7QLSU4FG_QSOVACsE7eMS9tDeiAhBZxPkErxn9I1U0yFxS_mGSTiNFZxYHOdp0ujHoS3ZUHnANGhdUWDmAZm82uB_U1NdL9eeE9OgtNxE0bJNMaDgSkWcVFeYYwriA8-Grheh1ze7H6qLA7s_U6dhXkYcVoL4Bp8El2pEtfhZzqg3KTOwH4B4ts_TcwanEC9RJ3GqoRYQMzZijPFpVfe8YurJhYJscRz4HtGaaOEKaRWftU3DvKAVbmhKAd5BZQ0Ux8mt-0zQG5qFfM9U4IqE928J8MXg6j-ZvgLee6TrNxRUqc4oR5d2I9rkiJKnwN34qp46ayEbZIdIQC9KPQputCeu6qZcBXDsMJ72lWI2iOXdxAo3wROiu_uJvFmnTvapD5zEuzlUkm9khY9HLgua1BA/PWDxQIfecROSTMJVNLXleMB8y-rjDllf/6 "But if you can chip in just $5 right now")**_ , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation my entire life, will you help me out?

clean_body: I'm serious | | | | | | Closing the curtains on my campaign. I'm at my wits' end, Peter. The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest. They've just dumped in $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue. At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again. "Peter, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's Secretary of the Interior and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6." In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party. If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. "But if you can chip in just $5 right now" , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation. I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation my entire life, will you help me out? | | You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, I'll always serve you proudly. Thank you for your support, Ryan Zinke | | | | Ryan Zinke is a retired member of the United States Navy. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Sunday News Digest: 2/23/2025
body:
A new episode of Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl out now!
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**February 23, 2025** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST** **By Heidi Ganahl**
| | Hi friends!
I’m thrilled to announce the [latest episode of Unleashed](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), where I dive into what’s happening in Colorado and across the nation. After a brief break, we’re back with a renewed focus on building momentum for the conservative movement and fighting for the future of our state.
In this episode, I share the story behind Rocky Mountain Voice—why I launched it after the 2022 governor’s race, how it’s grown into Colorado’s go-to source for conservative news, and how we’re pushing back against the liberal media machine. We also take a deep dive into the 2024 election, breaking down the wins, the losses, and the path forward to turning Colorado red again.
Beyond politics, I discuss some of the biggest national issues—from Trump’s bold executive actions to the growing energy around the health freedom movement (MAHA). We also talk about coalition-building—why real change starts at the local level, in our neighborhoods, and how you can get involved in grassroots efforts that make a difference.
[Listen](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) anywhere you get your podcasts, or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)!
This is just the beginning of what’s shaping up to be a crucial year for our movement. Be sure to listen to [Unleashed](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and stay engaged with Rocky Mountain Voice as we continue the fight for freedom in Colorado and beyond.
In liberty, Heidi
---
|
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[‘Let there be a run on guns’: Senate Democrats advance semiauto gun ban to Colorado House](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A debate Tuesday on the proper role of government and at what point constitutional liberty has been infringed, led by Senate Republicans, fell upon deaf ears.

**[HB 1135, requiring schools adopt student cell phone usage policy, advances out of committee](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The debate to end all debates may soon reach a conclusion. State lawmakers Wednesday advanced House Bill 25-1135, by Steamboat Springs Democrat Rep. Meghan Lukens and El Paso County Republican Rep. Mary Bradfield, a measure requiring schools adopt and implement a student communication device policy.

**[The transparency fight for public records despite private agendas in Durango 9-R](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Access to public, governmental records ensures transparency, but in Durango School District 9-R, accessing them can come with hurdles. Parents say their Colorado Open Records Act (CORA) requests have been met with delayed responses and roadblocks.

|
---
**LEGISLATIVE SESSION**
**[Bill alleging landlord collusion in rigging of rental market pricing advances in House](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The average residential property rental in Denver is $2,050, a decrease of $117 in a year from a peak in August 2024, according to Zillow.com.

**[Lawmakers take aim at food waste, passing HB 1059 out of House and HB 1166 out of committee](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) As Rep. Ron Weinberg’s bill taking aim at food waste in school cafeterias from Julesburg to Cortez and all points in between was sailing through the Colorado House on final reading this week, his companion piece of legislation was getting similar treatment Thursday in a House committee.

**[HB 1040, adding nuclear to state’s clean energy definitions, gains bipartisan support](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A proposal to include nuclear energy in two statutory definitions of clean energy has passed the Colorado House on second reading.
**[In killing Rep. Woog’s delivery fee repeal bill, Democrats again voted against relief for Coloradans](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Another Republican measure, which could have made everyday life more affordable for Coloradans trying to get by, has been killed by House Democrats.

**[SB 5, the undoing of the 81-year-old Labor Peace Act, is headed to Colorado House](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) When she opened the 75th General Assembly with other lawmakers, Douglas County Republican Sen. Lisa Frizell noted Democrat Gov. Jared Polis’ description of “the free state of Colorado”.

_**[READ MORE LEGISLATIVE SESSION UPDATES](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**STATE**
**[‘We have to fight with everything that we have’: House Minority Whip Ryan Armagost is leading GOP opposition](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Ryan Armagost has a background of serving as a U.S. Marine, deputy sheriff and firefighter, making him no stranger to challenging situations.
**[There are mixed reviews on state bill that would reset wages in service industry](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [CBS COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Legislation was proposed at the Colorado State Capitol on Thursday that could change how the tipped employees like servers and bartenders are paid.
**[Colorado’s budget hole is now $1.2 billion, as Medicaid costs continue to climb](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Colorado’s looming budget shortfall just keeps getting worse. In a letter to the Joint Budget Committee this week, state officials said Colorado will need to spend an additional $73 million on Medicaid this budget year, which ends June 30, as demand for health services continues to surge beyond the administration’s expectations.
_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[Judge rules Trump administration can move ahead on mass government layoffs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE HILL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A federal judge Thursday refused a group of government employee unions’ request to block the Trump administration from moving ahead with plans to dramatically reduce the federal workforce.

**[U.S. Senate confirms Kash Patel as FBI director on narrow 51-49 vote](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[NATIONAL REVIEW](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The Senate confirmed Kash Patel Thursday to be the next director of the FBI, setting in motion President Donald Trump’s plans to overhaul the agency after years of scandal tarnished its reputation.

**[Federal Trade Commission launches probe into big tech’s censorship of Americans](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DAILY CALLER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The Federal Trade Commission (FTC) is opening up an official request for public comments on censorship by Big Tech companies.

**[Former Leader McConnell won’t seek eighth term in the U.S. Senate](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE HILL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Sen. Mitch McConnell (R-Ky.) on Thursday announced that he is not seeking reelection in 2026, bringing an end to the longest-serving Senate leader’s political career.

**_[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_**
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[How Jeffco Kids First exposed a school cover-up that made international headlines](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A Jefferson County teacher lost her license after an alleged grooming scandal involving a student at Columbine High School.

**[As commissioners are ‘ignoring their own constituents’ public organizing over Sandstone Ranch primitive camping proposal](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A battle is brewing over the future of Sandstone Ranch Open Space. Douglas County’s proposal to introduce primitive camping at the site has sparked overwhelming opposition from residents, firefighters and local organizations.
**[Garfield joins eight counties to have opted out of state’s sensitive spaces concealed carry ban](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) During a Monday meeting of Garfield County’s commissioners, the board of Tom Jankovsky, Mike Sampson and Perry Will exercised an option to exempt Garfield County from the law, created by Senate Bill 24-131, which prohibits lawful concealed carry by permit holders from government buildings.

**[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[Garbo: How Lauren Boebert earned my vote and my respect](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _When Lauren Boebert announced her decision to leave Colorado’s 3rd Congressional District and run for office in the 4th, I’ll admit, I was hesitant._ __
**[Devotional: Learning to trust God’s Armor in all aspects of your life](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**

clean_body: A new episode of Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl out now! | | | | February 23, 2025 SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST By Heidi Ganahl | | Hi friends! I’m thrilled to announce the , where I dive into what’s happening in Colorado and across the nation. After a brief break, we’re back with a renewed focus on building momentum for the conservative movement and fighting for the future of our state. In this episode, I share the story behind Rocky Mountain Voice—why I launched it after the 2022 governor’s race, how it’s grown into Colorado’s go-to source for conservative news, and how we’re pushing back against the liberal media machine. We also take a deep dive into the 2024 election, breaking down the wins, the losses, and the path forward to turning Colorado red again. Beyond politics, I discuss some of the biggest national issues—from Trump’s bold executive actions to the growing energy around the health freedom movement (MAHA). We also talk about coalition-building—why real change starts at the local level, in our neighborhoods, and how you can get involved in grassroots efforts that make a difference. anywhere you get your podcasts, or watch on and ! This is just the beginning of what’s shaping up to be a crucial year for our movement. Be sure to listen to and stay engaged with Rocky Mountain Voice as we continue the fight for freedom in Colorado and beyond. In liberty, Heidi | | | TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK A debate Tuesday on the proper role of government and at what point constitutional liberty has been infringed, led by Senate Republicans, fell upon deaf ears. The debate to end all debates may soon reach a conclusion. State lawmakers Wednesday advanced House Bill 25-1135, by Steamboat Springs Democrat Rep. Meghan Lukens and El Paso County Republican Rep. Mary Bradfield, a measure requiring schools adopt and implement a student communication device policy. Access to public, governmental records ensures transparency, but in Durango School District 9-R, accessing them can come with hurdles. Parents say their Colorado Open Records Act (CORA) requests have been met with delayed responses and roadblocks. | LEGISLATIVE SESSION The average residential property rental in Denver is $2,050, a decrease of $117 in a year from a peak in August 2024, according to Zillow.com. As Rep. Ron Weinberg’s bill taking aim at food waste in school cafeterias from Julesburg to Cortez and all points in between was sailing through the Colorado House on final reading this week, his companion piece of legislation was getting similar treatment Thursday in a House committee. A proposal to include nuclear energy in two statutory definitions of clean energy has passed the Colorado House on second reading. Another Republican measure, which could have made everyday life more affordable for Coloradans trying to get by, has been killed by House Democrats. When she opened the 75th General Assembly with other lawmakers, Douglas County Republican Sen. Lisa Frizell noted Democrat Gov. Jared Polis’ description of “the free state of Colorado”. | STATE Ryan Armagost has a background of serving as a U.S. Marine, deputy sheriff and firefighter, making him no stranger to challenging situations. Legislation was proposed at the Colorado State Capitol on Thursday that could change how the tipped employees like servers and bartenders are paid. Colorado’s looming budget shortfall just keeps getting worse. In a letter to the Joint Budget Committee this week, state officials said Colorado will need to spend an additional $73 million on Medicaid this budget year, which ends June 30, as demand for health services continues to surge beyond the administration’s expectations. | NATIONAL A federal judge Thursday refused a group of government employee unions’ request to block the Trump administration from moving ahead with plans to dramatically reduce the federal workforce. The Senate confirmed Kash Patel Thursday to be the next director of the FBI, setting in motion President Donald Trump’s plans to overhaul the agency after years of scandal tarnished its reputation. The Federal Trade Commission (FTC) is opening up an official request for public comments on censorship by Big Tech companies. Sen. Mitch McConnell (R-Ky.) on Thursday announced that he is not seeking reelection in 2026, bringing an end to the longest-serving Senate leader’s political career. | LOCAL A Jefferson County teacher lost her license after an alleged grooming scandal involving a student at Columbine High School. A battle is brewing over the future of Sandstone Ranch Open Space. Douglas County’s proposal to introduce primitive camping at the site has sparked overwhelming opposition from residents, firefighters and local organizations. During a Monday meeting of Garfield County’s commissioners, the board of Tom Jankovsky, Mike Sampson and Perry Will exercised an option to exempt Garfield County from the law, created by Senate Bill 24-131, which prohibits lawful concealed carry by permit holders from government buildings. | COMMENTARY When Lauren Boebert announced her decision to leave Colorado’s 3rd Congressional District and run for office in the 4th, I’ll admit, I was hesitant. During my military career, while on a special task force, I needed to qualify in “high ropes” to master rappelling from skyscrapers, steep mountains or any necessary situation. subject: Something Big is Coming – Be the First to Know!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**
body:
| | | | [ ](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=741a8e1a0e&e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

I hope this note finds you well and that your 2025 is off to a great start.

I am honored to have recently been elected President of the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors.

As I reflect on my work serving San Mateo County, I am grateful for your continued support in helping me achieve so much for our community. Together, we’ve worked to address critical priorities like public safety, housing affordability, and ensuring equitable access to services for all.

While my current role has allowed me to make a meaningful impact, I know there is still more work to be done. As I look toward the future and the opportunities ahead, I would love to have your continued support. Your encouragement, ideas, and generosity have always been invaluable, and they will continue to help drive the success of my future endeavors.

** [David Canepa — Donate via ActBlue](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=0fc318a7a8&e=c0babbc643)**

Thank you again for your partnership and for believing in my vision. I look forward to continuing to serve you and our community in the years ahead.

In friendship,

David Canepa
Board President, San Mateo County

P.S. Please expect a call from me soon so we can discuss your priorities for the new year and how I can best represent them.

body:
I will speak my opinion on my son’s Ethnic Studies slides from Menlo-Atherton High School around 8:30 PM Pacific Tuesday ICAN to Host California Forum on Ethnic Studies in Public Schools with Grassroo | | | _I will speak my opinion on my son’s Ethnic Studies slides from Menlo-Atherton High School around 8:30 PM Pacific Tuesday_
---
|
## **ICAN to Host California Forum on Ethnic Studies in Public Schools with Grassroots Partners**
The Israeli-American Civic Action Network (**ICAN**) is proud to announce the**California Forum on Ethnic Studies in Public Schools** , a live-streamed, online event taking place on **Tuesday, February 25th at 8:00 PM**. This forum builds on ICAN’s successful **Combating Antisemitism Summits** held in Los Angeles, California, and other jurisdictions over the past two years.The **California Forum on Ethnic Studies in Public Schools** is designed to provide a platform for **students, parents, educators, and public officials** to share their experiences and concerns about ethnic studies curricula, including critical issues related to California Education Code adherence, flawed policy frameworks, and oversight failures.The forum is co-hosted by grassroots parent and educator organizations from across the state, who have been actively gathering evidence and testimonies about pervasive discrimination and ideological biases being introduced into California classrooms through ethnic studies courses and educators.**Members of the California State Senate and Assembly Legislative Education Committees** are invited to attend and encouraged to actively participate in the forum’s proceedings.
---
## **Event Details:**
🗓️ **Date:** February 25, 2025🕒 **Time:** 8:00 PM PT🌐 **Location:** Online (Live-stream link provided upon registration)Participants will explore critical questions:
* Are ethnic studies courses meeting California Education Code standards?
* How can we safeguard classrooms from political bias and ideological indoctrination?
* What steps should parents, educators, and lawmakers take to ensure neutral education?

**RSVP is recommended to participate in the discussion.** Secure your spot today: [**JewishCA.org/forum**](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67bc2892f7e7783e6df179b2&u=http%3A%2F%2Fjewishca.org%2Fforum&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_67bc1f844e02353da101c565&l=en-US&s=T1xlpQcNmlTzhzIXY08XHzre0DI%3D).
---
**Co-Hosts:**
Sequoia Union High School District Jewish Parents & Allies | PeerK12 | Educators Caucus for Israel | South Bay Jewish Advisory Group | CTA/CFT Jewish Affairs Group | Jews BeLong Beach Coalition | JewishCALIFORNIA | JewishLAUSD | Israeli-American Civic Action Network**The Israeli-American Civic Action Network (ICAN)** is the only organization that brings together Israeli and American activists to create change for a better America, a more secure Israel, and a stronger U.S.-Israel alliance. ICAN works with community leaders, elected officials, and grassroots organizations to strengthen the bond between the United States and Israel at all levels of government through civic education, advocacy, and public engagement. It also promotes policies that support the Israeli-American community and foster mutual understanding. With a focus on policy leadership and strategic engagement, ICAN is committed to empowering Israeli-American activists and pro-Israel Americans to take an active role in shaping public policy.
---

clean_body: I will speak my opinion on my son’s Ethnic Studies slides from Menlo-Atherton High School around 8:30 PM Pacific Tuesday ICAN to Host California Forum on Ethnic Studies in Public Schools with Grassroo | | | I will speak my opinion on my son’s Ethnic Studies slides from Menlo-Atherton High School around 8:30 PM Pacific Tuesday | ICAN to Host California Forum on Ethnic Studies in Public Schools with Grassroots Partners The Israeli-American Civic Action Network (ICAN) is proud to announce theCalifornia Forum on Ethnic Studies in Public Schools , a live-streamed, online event taking place on Tuesday, February 25th at 8:00 PM. This forum builds on ICAN’s successful Combating Antisemitism Summits held in Los Angeles, California, and other jurisdictions over the past two years.The California Forum on Ethnic Studies in Public Schools is designed to provide a platform for students, parents, educators, and public officials to share their experiences and concerns about ethnic studies curricula, including critical issues related to California Education Code adherence, flawed policy frameworks, and oversight failures.The forum is co-hosted by grassroots parent and educator organizations from across the state, who have been actively gathering evidence and testimonies about pervasive discrimination and ideological biases being introduced into California classrooms through ethnic studies courses and educators.Members of the California State Senate and Assembly Legislative Education Committees are invited to attend and encouraged to actively participate in the forum’s proceedings. Event Details: 🗓️ Date: February 25, 2025🕒 Time: 8:00 PM PT🌐 Location: Online (Live-stream link provided upon registration)Participants will explore critical questions: Are ethnic studies courses meeting California Education Code standards? How can we safeguard classrooms from political bias and ideological indoctrination? What steps should parents, educators, and lawmakers take to ensure neutral education? RSVP is recommended to participate in the discussion. Secure your spot today: . Co-Hosts: Sequoia Union High School District Jewish Parents & Allies | PeerK12 | Educators Caucus for Israel | South Bay Jewish Advisory Group | CTA/CFT Jewish Affairs Group | Jews BeLong Beach Coalition | JewishCALIFORNIA | JewishLAUSD | Israeli-American Civic Action NetworkThe Israeli-American Civic Action Network (ICAN)** is the only organization that brings together Israeli and American activists to create change for a better America, a more secure Israel, and a stronger U.S.-Israel alliance. ICAN works with community leaders, elected officials, and grassroots organizations to strengthen the bond between the United States and Israel at all levels of government through civic education, advocacy, and public engagement. It also promotes policies that support the Israeli-American community and foster mutual understanding. With a focus on policy leadership and strategic engagement, ICAN is committed to empowering Israeli-American activists and pro-Israel Americans to take an active role in shaping public policy. | 8 Politzer Drive, Menlo Park, CA 94025, USA Powered by

| Candidate Training Dates: Take the First Step Toward Shaping Massachusetts' Future
---
---
| Massachusetts is at a turning point. A significant political realignment is underway, and our state is moving decisively to the right. Now is the time to act. This SATURDAY, the Massachusetts Republican Party will hold one of our twice-monthly training sessions for those ready to run for municipal office in 2025 and beyond.
Municipal elections are the foundation of a successful political career, providing a pathway to higher office. Whether you're considering a run for school board, select board, city council, mayor--or even dog catcher--we want to help you succeed.
Our comprehensive candidate training sessions will cover essential topics such as political strategy, data, finance, and communications. You'll gain the tools and insights needed to run and win as a Republican in Massachusetts. Thanks to our generous donors these training sessions will be FREE to partake in.
Here are the details for our upcoming sessions:
Lawrence 🗓️ March 1, 2025 ⏰ 10:00 AM 📍 Parkside Apartments Community Room 2 Bennington St, Lawrence, MA 01840
Worcester 🗓️ March 15, 2025 ⏰ 10:00 AM 📍 765 W Boylston Street, Floor 2, Worcester, MA
Waltham 🗓️ March 22, 2025 ⏰ 10:00 AM 📍 Embassy Theater, 16 Pine St, Waltham

Don't miss this opportunity to shape the future of Massachusetts!
[Register Now](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MWrC2dWITtbYU9-xBTO51kV1ma9wyY8dy4kcf4weRKWWssS1dLWiP865aDAnAKX_DEqWjFAD9-lpA_MLPry5GTyVavbYnpC6SOqo2q7GFPsW1f6R9FNhXIBpldhexO6ZHUfAfUp_gb_X0bg2ZOK9swLlHD6fxoBbnvkLVG418RUTyqdWY2nkwGkpOZeneyPr94XmoUyAbEvh6ELrE-lBeQB8qLtdd3ttTRR3pYvO0kWEfEoOLFQl5u-1XDNjHDfYRLwrB88qI_D3gw24yptNa_dtfz9z9RL8&c=fDnpGAYdLt2lIOuo3gZgYq9o3wtPdSGSM6lyrQVP_b2AO_26KJS6xA==&ch=UG28EAun-K91mLO3nBw5zLThNRSmmBVDpscre6Yv4F-HEPohX95Aew==)
Let's build a stronger Massachusetts, starting with you.

body:
We can’t let Democrats accomplish this

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDIyNF9PSy00Ti4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MDcwMTEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAyMjRfT0stNE4uMTEwMTE3X3QxNjA3MDExLTI4OTkifQ/LYjtioixjhVlALzsx-E0CQ)
---
After years of turning their nose up to those of us in rural America, now Hollywood liberals and Wall Street billionaires are launching a new program to try and trick the good people of rural America into voting Democrat.

They didn’t give a rip about our so-called “flyover states” before...but now that they see their electoral future on the verge of collapse, they are planning to spend millions to spread their propaganda into our rural cities and towns.

We CANNOT let them get away with this, and I’m committed to stopping them. **[So, I’m reaching out to personally ask for your help to stop the Democrat takeover of rural America.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDIyNF9PSy00Ti4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MDcwMTEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAyMjRfT0stNE4uMTEwMTE3X3QxNjA3MDExLTI4OTkifQ/4wpCfQmINsaKVcNaa7f6YQ)**
---
[ STOP THE TAKEOVER](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDIyNF9PSy00Ti4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MDcwMTEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAyMjRfT0stNE4uMTEwMTE3X3QxNjA3MDExLTI4OTkifQ/gx4K_QateMSCIffZbhAshA)
---
[ CHIP IN NOW](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDIyNF9PSy00Ti4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MDcwMTEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAyMjRfT0stNE4uMTEwMTE3X3QxNjA3MDExLTI4OTkifQ/YA12Qeg6E2VJdRX6CxDewg)
---
I know you probably can’t spare a million dollars like those Hollywood liberals. But I’m hoping you can chip in just a few bucks to help us defeat the Democrats and stop their takeover.

They want to erase our values, our traditions, and our way of life, and YOU can help me stop them.

Thanks for hearing me out,
-Troy

A gunshot is an impulse high decibel noise, which can be harmful to the human ear, so much so that even a single shot can cause permanent damage without the right [hearing protection.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20433/6374453/04c39edd28fe1e505fb4cfa739c9404ecd3115fd/a97a635b38361f5f8340ab42ff4d2442e5597115) **Depending on the caliber of the firearm, every gunshot registers above the safe hearing DB levels, at which hearing damage can occur quickly.** EarArmor.com's Earmuffs Rated with a Noise Reduction Rating (NRR) of 21, EarArmor offers best-in-class hearing protection from noise levels across all firearm calibers.

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: $26 for 2026
body:
The preparation for the midterms have to start now. We can kick MAGA out of the House and the Senate.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wk0j9-v6yxw4-kyd76rh6/)
---
# **$26 for 2026**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wk0j9-v6yxw5-kyd76rh7/)
---
| | | | Dear friend, The 2026 midterms are closer than they seem, and preparation starts now. This election could be our turning point to weaken Trump’s MAGA agenda and take bold steps toward real progress in this country. Trump may still occupy the White House until 2028, but in 2026, we can disrupt his plans, win back key seats, and stop the chaos he and his allies have unleashed. Every seat we flip brings us closer to restoring accountability, justice, and opportunity for everyone in America. That’s why we’re calling on our grassroots team—on you—to help us build a winning coalition. We’ve set an ambitious goal to fund voter outreach and organize in battleground districts across the country. [**_We’re asking for $26 for 2026—or whatever you can give—to fuel this effort. Every dollar counts as we work to protect democracy and push back against MAGA extremism. Let’s show MAGA that their days of chaos are numbered. Together, we can make 2026 a turning point for our country._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wk0j9-v6yxw6-kyd76rh8/) In Solidarity, The No Dem Left Behind Team
---
| [$26 for 2026](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wk0j9-v6yxw7-kyd76rh9/)

Thank you for your support in this pivotal time.

name: Christina Gagnier
subject: I’m running, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td36d6845-9ada-4b55-8440-b59da4952279/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T363c7889-8aed-4983-a302-4b50969fd216/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, My name is Christina Gagnier, and I'm proud to share that I’m launching my campaign for Congress in California’s 40th District. This is where I was born and raised, where I teach at UCI Law School, and where I served on the Chino Valley School Board to fight for our kids’ education. I’m thrilled to share more about my campaign to flip this seat, but here’s the bottom line: with the House so narrowly divided, the outcome here could decide majority control in 2026. [There’s not a moment to waste, and if we don’t fight back now, we can lose everything. If you’re ready to take action, please chip in a split $10 donation between Blue Amp Action and my campaign.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc2ba7669-a164-4e19-afbf-23ab60d7883c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8eb8f3a5-651f-4971-8b0b-ad4daa469736/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | The country is at a crossroads, and we are nearing a point of no return. There was a time when families could afford a home on a single income. When I was in college, a summer job could actually help pay for tuition. It wasn't easy, but the American Dream felt within reach. Now, paying for health care, education, or a home to raise families feels outright impossible for most. Meanwhile, Trump and Musk want to gut more programs our community relies on like Head Start, Medicare, and Social Security. Instead of solving problems, politicians like my opponent Young Kim would rather follow orders from Trump and his billionaire donors. While Southern California was burning, Kim was at Mar-a-Lago. That’s not leadership – that’s betrayal. We have to act now, and I’m stepping up because standing up to bullies is what I have always done:
* I fought back when right-wing extremists tried hijacking our schools while I was on the Chino Valley School Board.
* I protected children from exploitation as part of the California Attorney General’s Cyber Exploitation Task Force.
* I’m stepping up again because Trump, Musk, and their enablers think they can tear apart the Department of Education and steamroll our rights. They’re wrong.

[This is the fight of our lives. We can either roll over and we let them win, or we can take a stand. If you’re with me, chip in a split $10 donation between Blue Amp Action and my campaign to send a message that we will not back down. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T874ec3ea-3e71-4819-a0ca-d92c55f07709/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8f3f73db-e94c-498a-bff6-75865622dca3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thank you, Christina
---
|
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good

---|---
| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20250224_ca40_b1_f1_s1_c1_90op_n-t1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. There was a time when families could afford a home on a single income. When I was in college, a summer job could actually help pay for tuition. It wasn't easy, but the American Dream felt within reach. Now, paying for health care, education, or a home to raise families feels outright impossible for most. Meanwhile, Trump and Musk want to gut more programs our community relies on like Head Start, Medicare, and Social Security. Instead of solving problems, politicians like my opponent Young Kim would rather follow orders from Trump and his billionaire donors. While Southern California was burning, Kim was at Mar-a-Lago. That’s not leadership – that’s betrayal. # [Expanding the Conversation: From Politics to Parallel Systems](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=157800737&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3ODAwNzM3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDAzOTY2MTMsImV4cCI6MTc0Mjk4ODYxMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ViDACgT7JZoxo6bataFk3FRjckrwIiIPo9LuVMKKJ1w)
### Why fighting within the system isn't enough--and how we build what comes next.
| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---
| Feb 24
---
| [](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=157800737&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3ODAwNzM3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0MDM5NjYxMywiZXhwIjoxNzQyOTg4NjEzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzI2MDExMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.9OlKssrY8Gi9xRGxR2F1X7KAJZHiOmSvTf6Az_9khek&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=157800737&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3ODAwNzM3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDAzOTY2MTMsImV4cCI6MTc0Mjk4ODYxMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ViDACgT7JZoxo6bataFk3FRjckrwIiIPo9LuVMKKJ1w&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvbWVsaXNzYTRjb25ncmVzcy9wL2V4cGFuZGluZy10aGUtY29udmVyc2F0aW9uLWZyb20tcG9saXRpY3M_.hvoJW59o24fJ-na7auqw1wReY5NHV3lisxqdlotIthQ?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/melissa4congress/p/expanding-the-conversation-from-politics?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

In my last post, _How to Be an American in 2025_ , I wrote about the fight for democracy in a time of deep political instability. That work isn't stopping. **I 'm still running for office. I'm still publishing in **_**It 's a Matter of Integrity**_**.** I will continue to dig into the political battles that shape our daily lives--because they matter.
But politics, as we know it, is not enough.
Our current systems--governance, economics, education, media--were built for an era that no longer exists. We see their breakdown all around us. As much as we fight for reforms, we must also ask: **What comes next?** What systems will we create that make today's dysfunction obsolete?
That's why I'm launching a new publication: **Growing Our Thriving Future**. This is where I will explore **parallel systems** --the governance, economic, and social models that can move us beyond crisis and into transformation. It's where I will talk about ideas like **liquid democracy, decentralized cooperation, universal basic income, regenerative economies, and alternative models of community-building** that don't rely on waiting for failing institutions to fix themselves.
### **Why Do We Need New Systems?**
Because traditional party politics, even when fought with the best of intentions, is still a battle over **who controls a system that is structurally incapable of serving us all.** Real democracy is more than electing representatives--it's about **building governance models that allow people to directly participate in shaping their future.**
We have new tools that make this possible. **Blockchain governance, decentralized economic models, AI-assisted decision-making --these are not just tech trends, they are signals of what's coming.** Projects like [Democracy Earth](https://substack.com/redirect/8f8292c9-9e35-4606-a331-977d53aacbc3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)have already begun experimenting with liquid democracy, where decision-making flows dynamically rather than being locked into rigid electoral cycles. **UBI models, like those analyzed in Canada 's latest report, show the feasibility of post-capitalist safety nets.** New models of cooperative housing and regenerative economies are proving that community-driven solutions can work.
### **What This Means for Our Movement**
This is not about abandoning the fight within existing systems--it's about **building what comes next while we fight for what exists today.**
* _It 's a Matter of Integrity_ will continue to cover my campaign, policy fights, and immediate political realities.
* _Growing Our Thriving Future_ will focus on **what we build in parallel** --the systems that will eventually make the old power structures obsolete.

Both are necessary. One is about the fight. The other is about **what we create beyond it.**
### **Join Me in Building the Future**
If you're ready to explore not just _how we resist_ , but _how we build_ , follow **Growing Our Thriving Future** here. Let's design - and build - the systems that will allow us, and future generations, to thrive.
| [Growing Our Thriving Future](https://substack.com/redirect/3af2b673-0d11-46cf-b566-17d4d6618636?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[We're at a planetary threshold. As old systems unravel, new cooperative intelligence networks emerge. Here, we explore ideas and models to move beyond crisis into thriving. Let's build the future--together.](https://substack.com/redirect/3af2b673-0d11-46cf-b566-17d4d6618636?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[By Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/redirect/3af2b673-0d11-46cf-b566-17d4d6618636?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

subject: Musk Sets Deadline, Robot City, and Mouse-to-Mouse Resuscitation
body:
Elon Musk gave hundreds of thousands of federal workers [48 hours to justify their work](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOwyAQRL8Gd1iwYJMUFNe4y7VXWgTWMRfstYDE8t-fnP660RvpaTQ_t_HmYorr49staOtEIwjouAAOegwupmPUTbATIqBq0Eqjhbqa7qqa2UoHanLaK4dgLtJ4qXXf9R6UDBM41UR72gSAllL30LWq8-ZyMcr1QZggBdMCQ6yU21-Ka51xSge9MbeelibZudatMPXFYGAw7Pve-vXuz5LBcKoZDALOrBgMy6s8OeWAufBX4RMGzC7xnfLzRJV4xo1y5bR-IL8ffKE1uINT5hlLfKztXJfUZBu2PaYUS2-YFo_FxfSZVP-76G3hLwAA___6yWf0) from the previous week or face potential termination.

| | |

| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kMFuhCAQhp8GbxoYQPTAoclmb9trjwZh1GlQDLLb7Ns3bpvemsxpvj8zf76P23BzFGmb392KtkxpAA665lCDGoKj-BxUFeyECCgrtMIoLnuje1ktVow6dOM5HrQJvQrcO22mETvDvRwrsuc1DqCEUC3oRmpvus5I1wZuguBMcQxUUm4-E21lwSk-0wNz49NaRbuUsh9MvjG4MrjS9sCjNM5nPAr6ZUsxzc8zenJ5vZd1ONI9e2TygqujyKA9lysGuq9MXnZHod5dLhvmY6H9l3u37o7m7ZX4g6LjtdRy-HEBgnMpur5TUGUb9i-KkY7WMMXn89WrcfnP4MPCdwAAAP__dWty8w) | |
# Monday, February 24, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1921, First Lieutenant William Coney of the U.S. Army completed America's first transcontinental flight, piloting his single-engine biplane from San Diego to Jacksonville in just over 22 hours. ([See Photo](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zz1u7CAQAODTQGcLhj-7oHiNu31tSovdGeyJ8LLCaCPfPkr6XOCTvo_bektc-Ln9TwfFnusKCtygYAC7YuJyrVZizERARlLUwSozBzcbucfsAO46-0ApKUSa0IIxyU0eyXuVJccfTQFYra0HNxr3CNMUTPKoAmolrCLkXtv4WfnZd8rlqm9q46MessS999cpzD8Bi4Al5Z3PXts11rYJWEAPme6DnkELWGSL-PriUvj0QVi1HYnLr9P_er0jfAcAAP__bC9NPA)) Imagine this: Thieves use your stolen credit card to buy a scratch-off lottery ticket that turns out to be worth over $500,000. What would you do? In France, where this happened, the victim is offering to split the winnings with the thieves. [See the details below](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQRn-NvRHBAQYPDF2ypWtH6wxHTEtMhE-J8u-rdO_46ZOent7XZblgqWW_fuKNAue2gAQrJAgwS8JSX4sZU8hEQHqkoJyRenZ21uMWMNmkYZoyKuWjnch7Gw3o1c0Z0NixhDdNAhilzAT2pG103juNU5IuKTkYSalw66fvVnbeKNdXe1A_xXYba9iY78egPwY4D3DG-07P4329R-cSKw1wzh33SKI2ZuovwSX-EIuDW6VdROxJ8FboQYewEmVGizqvACtilN7PM1klZYoqrWMP6f4stZZjcoOR1xuW-qfC_6V5BPgNAAD__3UVZPw). We're sponsored today by [Acres](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kMFuhCAQhp8GbxoYQPTAoclmb9trjwZh1GlQDLLb7Ns3bpvemsxpvj8zf76P23BzFGmb392KtkxpAA665lCDGoKj-BxUFeyECCgrtMIoLnuje1ktVow6dOM5HrQJvQrcO22mETvDvRwrsuc1DqCEUC3oRmpvus5I1wZuguBMcQxUUm4-E21lwSk-0wNz49NaRbuUsh9MvjG4MrjS9sCjNM5nPAr6ZUsxzc8zenJ5vZd1ONI9e2TygqujyKA9lysGuq9MXnZHod5dLhvmY6H9l3u37o7m7ZX4g6LjtdRy-HEBgnMpur5TUGUb9i-KkY7WMMXn89WrcfnP4MPCdwAAAP__dWty8w), offering an investment opportunity in the next AI disruptor.
|
---
## Musk Gives Fed Workers 48-Hour Deadline
Elon Musk gave hundreds of thousands of federal workers [48 hours to justify their work](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOwyAQRL8Gd1iwYJMUFNe4y7VXWgTWMRfstYDE8t-fnP660RvpaTQ_t_HmYorr49staOtEIwjouAAOegwupmPUTbATIqBq0Eqjhbqa7qqa2UoHanLaK4dgLtJ4qXXf9R6UDBM41UR72gSAllL30LWq8-ZyMcr1QZggBdMCQ6yU21-Ka51xSge9MbeelibZudatMPXFYGAw7Pve-vXuz5LBcKoZDALOrBgMy6s8OeWAufBX4RMGzC7xnfLzRJV4xo1y5bR-IL8ffKE1uINT5hlLfKztXJfUZBu2PaYUS2-YFo_FxfSZVP-76G3hLwAA___6yWf0) from the previous week or face potential termination. The directive, issued Saturday through both social media and email, required employees to submit "five bullets" about their recent accomplishments while copying their managers. Several key agencies, including the State Department and federal courts, [instructed their employees not to comply](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb_G7ohgGIxdULwmXV67pYWHIWGDjYVJovz9KttveXWlo6PzdZkvPuW0Xf_7lV2LZQYJRkgQgHPwKb9n7IOLzMC6Z6csSj1ZM-n-5qTxKhAuUSs0qGEZ9bLwMqhJM9NCfXIfmgRApXAAc9KG7Dha7YcgbVCyQ8khtVJP3yVt7cYxv8uT64nK2md3a20_Ov2vg3MHZ79v_Do-12fUlihzB2fOZRPr47iLVh_rLiIHrj6LV6l3roeIiGAsMVIcSSJNA43EkhgGGBFiX13YXynndAy2Q3ldfcq_Au2vIE8HPwEAAP__zw9hlA) with the demand, while labor unions condemned the move and threatened legal action. Musk said the directive was [designed to uncover "outright fraud](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFu8yAUBeCnwRsRXMDYA8Mv_fKWrh0tYi7hNthEmMbK21fu3vnoOzo6n9f56inTdv_wK7oWywwCDBfAQc_BU37PugsuIgKqDp20WqjRmlF1yUWxQBzlzeJgvcZBgLXSLDLKPoLQsiN3tgkALaXuwVyUWewwWOX7IGyQgmmBgVqpl69CW0sY87u8sF6WsnbZpdaeO1P_GEwMppYwUc5nxmBKZcUNj53B5MNKG-2t-kZlYzAZacZBGo65bHz93h8cV0-ZRwxYfeZHqQ-sJ2VqareKkan_6dlVF54H5Ux7b5kW9xP9Tml_XfNy8BMAAP__MCdlHw)," saying some government workers might be non-existent or using dead people's identities to collect paychecks.
## Bomb Threat Diverts American Airlines Flight
An American Airlines flight from New York to Delhi was diverted mid-flight due to a “potential [security threat onboard](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DGP4yAQBeBfgzsiPGBjFxTX0OXaKy1ihnhO2Fgwmyj_fuXtt3vSkz49vX_35R4o0_H8G3Z0nMoCCgapQIJZYqD8WUwXXUIE1B263hqlZzvMutvcZMM8zmindbXRrDBPGvuYzKBTDNGojtylKQDT92aE4aaH1U6T1WGMysZeCaMwEpd6-1_o4A1T_pQX1tta9i67jflsQv8R4AX443OWxlclwF-wAK_gylqA_2rywHcT4MOOldZwyEA104FNpkzPjWWkF1ZukousZUcZEmOVj7I_JG8VA8uKZ6kswHfVxfNNOVMbrTDquQfKP6v4t5deDr4DAAD__6ZyaSY)” Sunday, according to a statement from the airline. The plane [was redirected to Rome](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO8yAQBOCnwR0WXrBJCoq_cZe_vdLCZon3DkMEJMhvf0r66z5ppNFovm7LzVKgeP9vDzTVpwUEjFwAB7U4S-FcVOeMRwSUHZpBKyGverzKbjcDbKikXC8AHtYRFVi36nUCb9VVrb4j824TAGoY1ARjL8dNXy5a2skJ7QbBlEBHNeX-O1GsO_pwphfmfktHF8xe66Mw-Y_BzGBurfXbWiK28s4ZzG8ymO2BmTYbuaUcKGLhPtB9rzxi42fKPx84DDtxio4sd_TCXNHxnA7kBbdnpnpyKuWJDOYuG_doFAKVSTMl7oel8NlU__roZeA3AAD__373a40), landing at 11:15 a.m. ET escorted by two Italian Air Force Eurofighter Typhoon warplanes, after making a massive loop back to Europe. Reports suggest that a bomb threat was the cause of the diverted flight amid heightened air travel concerns stemming from multiple high-profile [airplane crashes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOozAQQL8GOiMztjEULq5Jl2uvRIYZwlwMjmxvLP5-le23f3p6ev_u891z4PPx1x_kyhZnkGCEBAF6Rs_hmnWLbiMCUi253mqpJmsm1e7O4OLXxU-AA8pFjtoMapCLMiANbiO27D42CaD7Xg9gOmVWO45W-QGlxV42WhJyian7H_ksO23him9K3RqPNri9lFdu1J8Gbg3caq3dSTVXoucHaODmD0q8-lN4ToFPymIL_NiLQH5TKoQixYPESVVcMT0FUthZvGLOvAQSmdavxOUSZU_kiwCp9GSnNjl8VQ6B82AbLR-H5_CTVH5b9HbwHQAA__8Igmq8) in recent months. The flight took off from John F. Kennedy International Airport at around 8:30 p.m. ET Saturday and was due to land in India’s capital 14 hours later.
## Zelensky Says He Would Resign for Peace
Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky signaled Sunday that he would [step down from the presidency](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGP4yAQRn-N3RHhAYwpKK5Jl2uvtMYwTuYWYwtwovz7Vbbf8tMnPT29f7f5hpw43__iRr6t-wwSjJAgQM8ROb1n3Ue_EgGpnvxgtVTOGqf6h9cIk3KIhMsqtXMYA1it3RiclMFCz_5DkwB6GPQI5qJMsNNkFY5R2jjITkuK3PZy-b9zbg9a03t_UrmEfeuTf7R21E796eDawRWPTK_6uT6jNA6JOriWs1ZGcX4V5EzihUXEsmeqAnPmJ5WK5S2Os3EWrZzbIcK0WoVuitIO0piFDOCwACzSToZC6IuPx4tT4jraTsv7hpx-lNpviZ4evgMAAP__D9doIA) if his departure would mean Ukraine membership in NATO or a peace deal with Russia. His statement came during a weekend in which Russia launched [a record 267 drones](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GO6yAQRb8Gd1h4AGMXFK9xl9duaU1gSNgQEwEJyt-vsv12V7rSOTpfp_2EMcXj8h_vZFvIOwjQXAAHtXuM6b2rwdtABCQHspNRQq5Gr3K4WjJE6xLkShjCfJ7VsioSCsiJsxZOD9F-aAJATZOaQY9SO7MsRuLshfGTYEqQjy2X8TvHo10ppHd-URldvg_JXlt7VCb_MdgYbL330Z3rQb1-fgbbZzLYyrPWiNyXfBDH1tDd-PNWMB7EJX8Tlso7FgbbUKx_9JhSrLNhSlzuGNOvrP0V_7LwEwAA__-x4Vxe) into Ukraine, destroying infrastructure and killing at least 3 people, one day before the world marks the third year of Moscow's invasion. U.S. officials, meanwhile, said they expected Ukraine to sign a deal this week giving the U.S. access to [Ukraine's major mineral deposits.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FyqzAQAL9G6sScTkKCQsVr6PzalIyMDnOJQB6QTfz3GadPvTO7sx-X8RI583b7H1cKdS4jArYKUKEdU-T8Gq1MYSZCMpKC9hZM79veyCVcI8Qr9kRt0pPpDaaZJsDOeWcpUSc5vG2AaLW2DtvGtJPvOm-iS-CTBmGBEteyN5-Ft7rQnF_lSXszlVXmsNR6P4T5J3AQOJzn2bziUsqbChw2Og-Bw-NQ9H2nqR5q5Y32mFWimNXja4-8kdIONFhrumapa5Z7SPeTc-bDeWHhtkbOv7n61_4z4E8AAAD__zpbXCU) Zelensky had earlier said that the deal wasn't good enough.
