| RTC SPOTLIGHT: A Night of Republican Unity at the Franklin Lincoln Dinner
---
---
| On the evening of February 12th--Abraham Lincoln's birthday--more than 100 Republicans and Independents from across Massachusetts gathered at La Cantina Winery in Franklin for a powerful Lincoln Dinner, honoring the life and legacy of America's 16th president.
Bringing together local Republican Town Committees (RTCs), state committee members, and elected officials, the event celebrated Lincoln's enduring principles of unity, freedom, and opportunity. The evening featured Worcester County Sheriff Lew Evangelidis as the keynote speaker, alongside remarks from Republican leaders on Lincoln's impact and the importance of grassroots activism.
"This dinner is not just about history--it's about continuing Lincoln's work by standing for liberty, personal responsibility, and a government that truly represents the people," said Dashe Videira, Chair of the Franklin Republican Town Committee.

### A Strong Showing of Republican Leadership

The event saw representation from nine RTCs, demonstrating the strength of our grassroots network: ✅ Bellingham ✅ Foxboro ✅ Franklin ✅ Medway ✅ Milford ✅ Needham ✅ Wrentham ✅ Sandwich ✅ Barnstable
In addition to the RTCs, several state committee members and elected officials attended:
State Committee Members: 🔹 Amanda Peterson, State Committeewoman (Norfolk, Worcester & Middlesex) & Secretary of the MassGOP 🔹 Leanne Harris, State Committeewoman (Middlesex & Norfolk) 🔹 Ryan Chamberland, State Committeeman (Worcester & Hampden)
Elected Officials: 🔹 Michael Chaisson (1st Bristol District) 🔹 Marcus Vaughn (9th Norfolk District) 🔹 Mike Soter (8th Worcester District) 🔹 Steven Xiarhos (5th Barnstable District)

### Building Momentum for the Future
The Lincoln Dinner was a testament to the strength and unity of Massachusetts Republicans, sparking engaged discussions on how to advance the values Lincoln championed.
This success would not have been possible without the dedication of our Republican Town Committees, State Committee members, volunteers, and local supporters, whose efforts created a meaningful and inspiring gathering.
As attendees departed, the message was clear: Lincoln's legacy is alive and well, and Massachusetts Republicans are ready to lead.
👉 If your RTC is hosting an event that deserves to be in the spotlight, let us know! Together, we are building a stronger, more engaged Republican movement in Massachusetts.

clean_body: | | | | | | | == | RTC SPOTLIGHT: A Night of Republican Unity at the Franklin Lincoln Dinner | On the evening of February 12th--Abraham Lincoln's birthday--more than 100 Republicans and Independents from across Massachusetts gathered at La Cantina Winery in Franklin for a powerful Lincoln Dinner, honoring the life and legacy of America's 16th president. Bringing together local Republican Town Committees (RTCs), state committee members, and elected officials, the event celebrated Lincoln's enduring principles of unity, freedom, and opportunity. The evening featured Worcester County Sheriff Lew Evangelidis as the keynote speaker, alongside remarks from Republican leaders on Lincoln's impact and the importance of grassroots activism. "This dinner is not just about history--it's about continuing Lincoln's work by standing for liberty, personal responsibility, and a government that truly represents the people," said Dashe Videira, Chair of the Franklin Republican Town Committee. A Strong Showing of Republican Leadership The event saw representation from nine RTCs, demonstrating the strength of our grassroots network: ✅ Bellingham ✅ Foxboro ✅ Franklin ✅ Medway ✅ Milford ✅ Needham ✅ Wrentham ✅ Sandwich ✅ Barnstable In addition to the RTCs, several state committee members and elected officials attended: State Committee Members: 🔹 Amanda Peterson, State Committeewoman (Norfolk, Worcester & Middlesex) & Secretary of the MassGOP 🔹 Leanne Harris, State Committeewoman (Middlesex & Norfolk) 🔹 Ryan Chamberland, State Committeeman (Worcester & Hampden) Elected Officials: 🔹 Michael Chaisson (1st Bristol District) 🔹 Marcus Vaughn (9th Norfolk District) 🔹 Mike Soter (8th Worcester District) 🔹 Steven Xiarhos (5th Barnstable District) Building Momentum for the Future The Lincoln Dinner was a testament to the strength and unity of Massachusetts Republicans, sparking engaged discussions on how to advance the values Lincoln championed. This success would not have been possible without the dedication of our Republican Town Committees, State Committee members, volunteers, and local supporters, whose efforts created a meaningful and inspiring gathering. As attendees departed, the message was clear: Lincoln's legacy is alive and well, and Massachusetts Republicans are ready to lead. 👉 If your RTC is hosting an event that deserves to be in the spotlight, let us know! Together, we are building a stronger, more engaged Republican movement in Massachusetts. | | | | | | == | MassGOP | == | == == | | | | Massachusetts Republican Party | 85 Merrimac Street, Suite 505 | Boston, MA 02114 US | | | | | | | | |

name: History Facts
subject: Why all Model-Ts were black
body:
Picture a classic Ford Model T and you’ll likely envision not just its distinctive shape, but also its black color.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68dcwnw3o5rygh48e2kfiiocsgedgpcc2zofloi0v5hrrnrw2tjfuoih5vejo2bd1758fyqbjmjp5sgosy128k0femiuy21tupknw83clet41qu3f0mbm5zcp2ht31zlyovs5mxk1bo1uahtw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss6s7p&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Model T Fords were all black because the paint dried faster.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss6s7p&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Science & Industry](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss6s7p&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss6s7p&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| P icture a classic Ford Model T and you’ll likely envision not just its distinctive shape, but also its black color. The earliest Model Ts, which rolled out in 1908, actually came in several tones, including bright red. But founder Henry Ford soon developed a preference for the simple dark shade. According to his [autobiography](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss6s7p&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), Ford announced in 1909 that in the future, “any customer can have a car painted any color that he wants, so long as it is black.” His reason, however, had little to do with aesthetics. At the beginning of 1913, [a single car](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss6s7p&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) took around 14 hours of labor to make. By October that same year, that figure dropped to 90 minutes, thanks to Ford’s groundbreaking moving assembly line. In 1914, 1,000 Model Ts were coming off the line every day, and there wasn’t enough space for multiple coats of paint and primer to dry on that many cars at the same time.
---
There’s a commonly held belief that Ford only produced black cars because black paint dried faster. That's true to some extent, but the time-saving benefit was due to the [_kind_ of paint](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss6s7p&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) the company used, which was only available in dark colors. In 1914, Ford switched to oven-baked paint, which cured in 400-degree heat within an hour instead of air-drying, which required up to 24 hours. The oven-baked colors contained Gilsonite, a special kind of asphalt, which limited the color palette to black and very dark hues. Black was the cheapest to make and the most durable, and painting all the cars one color streamlined the process, too.
Model Ts were available only in black between 1914 and 1925. In 1926, colors started appearing in the Model T lineup once again after Ford overhauled its car designs and started using pyroxylin lacquer, a nitrocellulose-based coating.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss6s7p&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss6s7p&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## The Ford factories recycled extra Model T paint.
The early Ford assembly plants were nothing if not efficient. One method they used to paint auto bodies quickly was running paint from an overhead tank through a pipe that was held up to the car as it passed down the assembly line. The application was imprecise, and a lot of paint ended up on the floor — but it didn’t go to waste. Any runoff was [collected](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss6s7p&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) and put back into the tank for future use.

The early Ford assembly plants were nothing if not efficient. One method they used to paint auto bodies quickly was running paint from an overhead tank through a pipe that was held up to the car as it passed down the assembly line. The application was imprecise, and a lot of paint ended up on the floor — but it didn’t go to waste. Any runoff was and put back into the tank for future use. Friend,
---
At President Trump’s inauguration, he expressed that _“our nation has suffered greatly,”_ but _“after all we have been through together, we stand on the verge of the four greatest years in American history.”_
---
Those inspiring words – and President Trump’s historic leadership – have already begun to right the ship for our country in just a few weeks’ time.
---
_But today, sadly, I have to write to you for a far more somber reason._
---
I say this with a heavy heart, but every word is God's honest truth...
---
**While our beautiful country may have emerged from four long years of darkness, tyranny, and the Left’s weaponized justice system, my journey out of that darkness is __not__ yet finished.**
---
**If the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old!**
---
And worst of all, these Deep State goons truly believe I’m finished, just like the media says, all because this case that’s already set to go to trial was brought on bogus _state-level_ charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon.
---

---
**_...No one can ever tell me I’m not a fighter._**
---
Which is why, at 80 years old, I’m __still__ FIGHTING BACK.
---
When these leftist crooks first had me booked, they filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757** ...

## Texas Man Sues Delta Over Crash
Marthinus Lourens of Central Texas is one of two passengers to [file the first lawsuits](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO6yAQheGnwR0WnkwgKShu4y633dIamyFGwhABiZ23XyX99kefjv6f23SjEEO6_6eNbTt8nkDBWSqQgJOjEN8Tds7Oyl2Hju1gUKFSgNdutcYpWFAvevAzGn2-ntAo74cTe6fVZemC_WAKAAcAg9hf2KE--4WR9IzsBSp2oeXSt5UbH1R9fOcXl37JWxft2tqjitM_AaOAcd_33ufD0LO2kD4TAWPivQoYWy45tSwfkRLLpVBd5ReUGyU5ZypO-hjua5P1yVU6jo0khSJjSFy7Yt1jDzGGqo1Add8oxO-J9meVl4XfAAAA__8vU2c2) against Delta Air Lines after one of its regional jets flipped over during landing at Toronto’s Pearson International Airport last week. Everyone on board the flight survived the crash in spite of numerous injuries. [In a filing](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGP4yAQBeBfgzsiPB7DuaC4xl2uvdIiZrDREbBgLk7-_crbbzMa6Umfnt7f-3J3McW8_XFPsvwOZQEFo1QgARfvYvos2Hn7UH7qO7K9QYVKAU7dbsno0egRBj1NI5lxmGhQ_YRkEDWR6qK9MAWAPYBBvP0ij3oMK6HTD6QgUJGPXOqNd2J6uxbSp7yo3tby7JLdmY8mht8CZgFz_hyl8RUJmC9ZwKzg-q9zlpq8zHQ2AbOnxE4Gt1KTyZ3tf-QmL1hyqSVzkUdymeRaXdulC0xVlhCoxrzJw7VGeaPa5KD-CZi7av1xxpRi00ag2p4upu-K_ONmLwtfAQAA__-cT25g), Lourens stated he “was violently tossed about and ended up upside down hanging from his seatbelt inside a burning plane with aviation fuel leaking on to him,” and he "suffered additional physical injuries when he released his seatbelt and fell to the ceiling of the upside-down aircraft." Despite his injuries, Lourens [helped open the emergency exit](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO4yAQxvGnsbuJyDA264LiGnd77ZXRxAzJ6AisgNibtz_l-q3_0k_6vj-fl0_WpPn2mx_i-3csFzQ4gUFAugTW9LrQGPzVhOU8ij87MmQM0jLevUzO0hZna-1EZOZrMNGRm4SWuJ05jOrfmEGkM6IjOn1IoHmKmxDPV5I4kJGgvdRTv0uXb24xvcou9bSVx5j8vfevNthfA64DrsdxnP7uT3nHAVeuXbckA65ZjjbgmsrG6R2erWuGB2doz7rrLgG2yu0OiXPQfINeasm9QNQkDRIf7akd-MaaW4cgqTOw1qRZ3jDOC0RjQ7Qyg3w4BiKxwGaZIC4WZwnuugQzVh--Dk1J2-wGMrcHa_o_pf_47e7xXwAAAP__MBx8jg) for fellow passengers to get off the plane. The lawsuit accuses Delta of negligence and seeks damages for physical injuries, mental anguish, and future medical costs. Delta has offered to [pay each of the 76 passengers](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8Gd7ZgMsFJQfEad3ntltZgxjEShsjMhuTvV9l-23ulc6TzdZtvFFPM9_-0s5PXWmbQcO419IBzoJjeM3bBeR2upmNnRtSoNeC129xIJzRwsdb782K1GSlcwmo84NUbWm0X3QemAdAAjIjDhQPa87owkvXIq0LNIUo5BtlY-EV1Te_y5GNYyt4lt4k8qjr9UzApmFprw-Jr5lY_v4JpjzlzLUIKps-sYAqchHopR8lS-keizP1yUN36RK1-R1EwdYcLjxZTitWOCvV9p5h-lfJng6eDnwAAAP__8OtgOA) on the flight an unconditional $30,000. Lourens’s attorney said he and his client are evaluating the offer.
## Teen Shoots Family after Eating Edibles
A 15-year-old Houston boy shot his mother and sister multiple times after experiencing a “bad reaction” to [eating "a bunch" of marijuana edibles](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAURL8Gd1hwfcFxQfEad3ntlhaYa5tdbCIgcfL3q-zWW86MNDo6H9fpakMMx_rf7mTqc0kTCFBcAAecvA3xNWHjjRN-kA0Z2aNAIQCHZjPSu36QSstOOxx6p5R0fvBu0R0Kp4YmmPeZAEAJ0CO2F_Ko1TITWu2QFoaCfKgpt3WjSk9blvhKD8rtnPYmmq3WW2HdPwYjg_E8z_ZrS_f3yGC0uYY5EoPxoLMwGOcc9ndcM9FReE7W87KlVMOx8kp08N3m8Hm3h_3tC9_TzksolTKDES6KC39RWlrgnZKWo5s77jwQxwGtd468XXSTjb-dIcZQdM9QrLsN8Ye4_qnwYeA7AAD__2vQcxQ) Saturday evening, according to police. When the unnamed teen called 911 and threatened to kill himself or someone else, authorities were dispatched to the residence, where he pointed a gun at them before fleeing. His mother and 17-year-old sister were taken to the hospital in “very critical” condition with [multiple gunshot wounds](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFu7CAURL8Gd1hwfcHPBcVr3G3alBY2lwUJmxWQ9e7fR47SppliNBodnc_bcrMxxeP-YXcy7eXzAgIUF8ABF2djei_YObMKN8mOjBxRoBCAUxcMaO-HTQht9SBRrXqa9ChGVCClGvTURXOdCQCUACNi_48cauU3QqtXJM9QkIstl74FavSy1ad3flLpt7x3yYTWHpUN_xnMDObzPHufX6BD_qotH9eIwXzQWRnMvyWXir_JFp6T4zXk3CrfcwtUeI21UeHWXxnsMx53vlrHC9mtxXxwcnFNVLti3OOMKcWqR4bivtuYfojan4qeBr4DAAD__3bDasE). The suspect was [apprehended after a brief chase](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAURL_GdBfZN4ZA4SJ6EtXLlrslMvg6WGvjyHZC2K9fkX6bmWKk0dH5uo5X7bxbbx86kCovG0fk2ABHQDka7fw-ysqoiZteVKTEWXLJOcq-WpTtRI_UdDjx06nXskXLbdvYjvg0Yc8rp44zjigF4lnKuiMj28bOJHU7SbJMcjKuxFSXhQq9dLZ-j09K9RxD5dVSyj2z04XhwHDYtq0OeT02hgOt8MgMh5W2o-bkAjEcRAM76QTRG8hLjCVDiAH0aiC7XCiBtkcuBEF_Uwbjcnmkya036IWAWXsPbxSY4z1D1jvDQSe4XMTPv_-fuUrK3DfnvcvtmUl-C9r5N2_5U-BT4W8AAAD__56kc8Q). His 16-year-old sister was also home at the time of the shooting, but she was not harmed. Police have not indicated how the teen [obtained the edibles](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L_O4yAQBPCnwR3Rsl7_KyiucZdrr7QwLDESNhaQXPz2n5L-a2ekn0bz777cTYjhePw1O-v69mlBwE4CSqTFmRCvhRqnV3CTalirgYAAkKZm0wC2c7B627erAgvdZEfovGI_OO6Ua4L-YIBICnEguo3sqO-8ZTL9SuwFAbtQU77VjSu_TfHxSi_ON5v2Juqt1rOI9o_AWeBsVqvaTyNwPlOpAmfVyYtNlik6aXLmUtnJsqVUw_GQe9plCaVyljYd5bl_QnZhjVzkwXJLz1LTIbfTyWKu8gUnGoexFTg3Wbvzf4gxlH4QBI_dhPgdVn996qXxJwAA__8b0Wwg).
## Whooping Crane Festival Draws Thousands
Port Aransas hosted the 28th annual Whooping Crane Festival this past weekend, drawing [thousands of birdwatchers](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2unTAQhJ_GdEb2suancJGG7qZNiRZ7fVjFwBFYcM_bR6S_1RQzGn36_nxNXyRZttdvWtmX77RPYMBpAxpwiiT5M2EV_WziYCv2tkODxgAO1eLJ9kSdSzE5E0J0PbqZh2SHRGTZxUr8c2YA0AJ0iHXPEVuXAiO1M3JSaDhK2Y-6LFz4m86UP_vFRx32tcp-KeV9quaXglHBeN93_VdEyvXUCkY6ioTMCsYs6QnaZKV8Pttl39-yvXQ4aGOd-CxyUVYwOtNoIjugs7NusG01phD0jDDrHrFpbGtmjlgdPr5vyVnOtlNoXitJ_s9VfhR1efgXAAD__4STaXI) from around the world to observe the endangered species, which migrate from Canada to the Coastal Bend each winter. Standing at five feet tall, the whooping crane is North America’s tallest bird. There were only 15 in existence when it was [added to the endangered species list](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8Gd0R4MiZJQfEad3ntltYEBhuJQATEjv9-5fTb3eLq6Oj83Kc7hRjS_J-ebNrH5wkUDFKBBJwchbhP2DnzUO7Wd2z6CypUCvDWLebhSOlBD_5qh7O9kfeIwL1mjf2gfd8Fc8AUAPYAF8TTlR3qwVtG0g9kL1CxCy2XU1u48Yeqj3teuZxsfnbRLK29qjj_EzAKGGcqjhMlN7_TcRAwUmnBRq4CRl657HILqXGRB0P6sLJc3skVdpKTozTzMbcl51dIs7SFEldZubXI0uUtyZCkzVQbRfn1ETB2xbjXFmIMVV8EqvlJIX4F25_FVgO_AQAA___R1nIu) in the 1940s. Since then, its numbers have increased to about 830 worldwide, 550 of which live part of the year in Texas. “ _This is the only place in the world where people can see the last naturally occurring population of whooping cranes_ ,” said Joan Garland, a training coordinator at the University of Texas Marine Science Institute.

Everyone on board the flight survived the crash in spite of numerous injuries. , Lourens stated he “was violently tossed about and ended up upside down hanging from his seatbelt inside a burning plane with aviation fuel leaking on to him,” and he "suffered additional physical injuries when he released his seatbelt and fell to the ceiling of the upside-down aircraft." Despite his injuries, Lourens for fellow passengers to get off the plane. The lawsuit accuses Delta of negligence and seeks damages for physical injuries, mental anguish, and future medical costs. Delta has offered to on the flight an unconditional $30,000. Lourens’s attorney said he and his client are evaluating the offer. Teen Shoots Family after Eating Edibles A 15-year-old Houston boy shot his mother and sister multiple times after experiencing a “bad reaction” to Saturday evening, according to police. When the unnamed teen called 911 and threatened to kill himself or someone else, authorities were dispatched to the residence, where he pointed a gun at them before fleeing. His mother and 17-year-old sister were taken to the hospital in “very critical” condition with . The suspect was . His 16-year-old sister was also home at the time of the shooting, but she was not harmed. Police have not indicated how the teen . Whooping Crane Festival Draws Thousands Port Aransas hosted the 28th annual Whooping Crane Festival this past weekend, drawing from around the world to observe the endangered species, which migrate from Canada to the Coastal Bend each winter. Standing at five feet tall, the whooping crane is North America’s tallest bird. There were only 15 in existence when it was in the 1940s. Since then, its numbers have increased to about 830 worldwide, 550 of which live part of the year in Texas. “ This is the only place in the world where people can see the last naturally occurring population of whooping cranes ,” said Joan Garland, a training coordinator at the University of Texas Marine Science Institute. | Flying together with our sponsor Every day, data brokers profit from your sensitive info—phone number, DOB, SSN—selling it to the highest bidder. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I wrote this with a heavy heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But every word is God's honest truth.

But every word is God's honest truth.
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9dusmkd63gt5j30vm11tp7c0bqnuhofc5sdevi0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5i61oj6cdh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
At President Trump’s inauguration, he expressed that _“our nation has suffered greatly,”_ but _“after all we have been through together, we stand on the verge of the four greatest years in American history.”_
---
Those inspiring words – and President Trump’s historic leadership – have already begun to right the ship for our country in just a few weeks’ time.
---
_But today, sadly, I have to write to you for a far more somber reason._
---
I say this with a heavy heart, but every word is God's honest truth...
---
**While our beautiful country may have emerged from four long years of darkness, tyranny, and the Left’s weaponized justice system, my journey out of that darkness is __not__ yet finished.**
---
**If the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old!**
---
And worst of all, these Deep State goons truly believe I’m finished, just like the media says, all because this case that’s already set to go to trial was brought on bogus _state-level_ charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon.
---
But, you see, even though the Democrats labeled me a **“ _DEAD_ _MAN_ _WALKING_ ,”** **RAIDED** my home, **ARRESTED** me, took a **MUGSHOT** of me, and forced me into **BANKRUPTCY** , the _TRUTH_ remains...
---
**_...No one can ever tell me I’m not a fighter._**
---
Which is why, at 80 years old, I’m __still__ FIGHTING BACK.
---
When these leftist crooks first had me booked, they filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757** ...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfdear58acjhvaub3ncioit5uo3i994f3ke2qcc8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5i61oj6cdh2bs)
__
---
And today, to show them that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ are also fighters who refuse to stand by as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man all for defending our 45th and 47th President, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise **$231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to WIN the trial of my life and the fight for my freedom and justice.

clean_body: But every word is God's honest truth. But every word is God's honest truth. | Friend, At President Trump’s inauguration, he expressed that “our nation has suffered greatly,” but “after all we have been through together, we stand on the verge of the four greatest years in American history.” Those inspiring words – and President Trump’s historic leadership – have already begun to right the ship for our country in just a few weeks’ time. But today, sadly, I have to write to you for a far more somber reason. I say this with a heavy heart, but every word is God's honest truth... While our beautiful country may have emerged from four long years of darkness, tyranny, and the Left’s weaponized justice system, my journey out of that darkness is not yet finished. If the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old! And worst of all, these Deep State goons truly believe I’m finished, just like the media says, all because this case that’s already set to go to trial was brought on bogus state-level charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon. But, you see, even though the Democrats labeled me a “ DEAD MAN WALKING ,” RAIDED my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, and forced me into BANKRUPTCY , the TRUTH remains... ...No one can ever tell me I’m not a fighter. Which is why, at 80 years old, I’m still FIGHTING BACK. When these leftist crooks first had me booked, they filed my mugshot under booking # 2313757 ... And today, to show them that good and honest Americans like YOU are also fighters who refuse to stand by as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man all for defending our 45th and 47th President, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise $231,375.70 for my Legal Defense Trust to WIN the trial of my life and the fight for my freedom and justice. name: Troy Downing
subject: I want you to know my story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I’d be honored to have your support

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-0A)
---
Peter, it's Troy Downing. I’ve spent my entire life fighting for America - from overseas in Afghanistan to at home as Montana State Auditor and now a Congressman.

I’ve always had a strong sense of public service, which led me to join the Air Force after 9/11 and inspired me to run for office. **But being in Congress is a new challenge I can’t take on alone. **

[**Peter, will you take a moment to read my story and chip in to help me in my first months in Congress?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._GaFC1C9CJ2Q)

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc7ciif5slbdn9lem4f1utea46dsq6me9vlj8ag8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h60p74cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zls2km88l27v91o45gbdgrtlboaqb517tj1s6am8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h60p74cjh2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z17f8jjv8g1kqdha65n49iks9hrdoad923ak736g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h60p74cjh2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z35rt4beajfgj67o6d2dm17c2cmet6l9gl2bomgg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h60p74cjh2bs)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him.

This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z21po993tte9pm7lfgh74a76eog9p8k8cv6t4lko_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h68o72chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlbpnnmc2kbteheolj18qiker3ujeflg6e6ljqc8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h68o72chh2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvkl19qvl42q9sjtb6coeacjld8pt0g3uk45o5e0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h68o72chh2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjcbdd20iktmlbfjdkj90vlgqq9jmfq89chmnnlo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h68o72chh2bs)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlvk15j9bqepsr9akcalch1cfpos95m9228fmujo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h68o72chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pqas3h6gonadjj6up7ecjl6gon8ddl69qbcd1jmppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c5g62pb5cdh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4tsvq8iqqgc545i9hpphicarr0a48qmo4gn0bfg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h68o72chh2bs)_

name: Blue Amp Action
subject: We’re Launching a Blue Amp Substack!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4f59b429-6da1-4a96-b8ed-094065d58851/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Hey Blue Amp Community! It’s been a while since our last newsletter, and we’ve been hard at work navigating the ever-evolving media landscape. We’ve heard your top question loud and clear: “How can we better engage with the newsletter and the Blue Amp community?” Today, we’re thrilled to share some exciting news that addresses this very question. We’re Launching a Blue Amp Substack! After careful consideration, we’ve decided to transition the Blue Note newsletter to Substack! This platform offers a user-friendly experience that will allow us to organize content more effectively, embed videos seamlessly, and provide you with richer, more frequent updates. Our goal is to foster a more interactive and engaging community, and Substack is the perfect place to make this happen. Why the Change? In these challenging times, access to reliable information and a supportive community is more crucial than ever. Substack enables us to enhance our content delivery and community interaction, ensuring you have the tools and information needed to stay informed and connected. What to Expect Next We’ll be rolling out a new and improved Blue Amp on Substack tomorrow, Tuesday February 25th, with our first Blue Note and a twelve hour live-stream hosted by me, Cliff Schecter! Among the guests who will be stopping by to chat will be:
* Emmy award winning broadcast journalist David Schuster at 8am ET.
* Actor, comedian, and host of SiriusXM’s “Tell Me Everything” John Fugelsang at 12pm ET.
* Comedian and musician Hal Spark, best known for “Queer as Folk” and hosting E!’s “Talk Soup” at 5pm ET.

Expect a fresh layout, integrated multimedia content, and more opportunities for engagement. We’ll keep you updated throughout this transition and provide all the information you need to join us on this new platform. In the meantime, we hope you have an opportunity to check out my latest by visiting us at [http://blueamp.substack.com](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tabb41836-e6a7-4ec7-b0da-a03e9f68263f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Thank you for your continued support and dedication to the Blue Amp community. Together, we’re ready to face the challenges ahead and work towards a brighter future. Stay tuned for more updates! Best, Cliff
---

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T82f4c72c-9ed9-440a-b770-6ac0299f719a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcgehbanoh74pij9lt8a7u4gvnal480p9vl8t56o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h64pr6c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqepgs2t25ev5263ervq0gj136etfjjkn9l8h14g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h64pr6c1h2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsnjel1ef5re10aus4qdcu9gvtbeptp6efrhij9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h64pr6c1h2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zghgqqinn38f55h8i8e9q8qfsrhr5dnhl49noeeo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h64pr6c1h2bs)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Kimberly Bretches
subject: Up against a George Soros backed prosecutor
body:
That's me and my husband, Officer Chance Bretches in the picture I've sent you...

| | |
---
| |
---
Dear Friend, That's me and my husband, Officer Chance Bretches in the picture I've sent you...
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbti0eo39e5tcgi7v13k1b8r94llhnem7uht4rv8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h6cor2c9h2bs)
---
...a picture we took on the day Chance received the Lifesaving Medal With Valor for rescuing a driver from a crashed car that had caught on fire. This photo used to be one of my favorites. Now looking at it makes me cry. Because in July, the same city that gave Chance this award... ...will try to lock him up for life for doing his job. I should explain. For nearly 13 years, Chance has been a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department. But in May of 2020, our lives were turned upside down. You probably remember what it was like in our country after George Floyd. Violent, fiery anti-police protests were sweeping through cities. Every step of the way, they were cheered on by radical politicians, Soros-funded prosecutors, and the Mainstream Media who lied to us and said, with a straight face, that these riots were "mostly peaceful." It was especially bad here in Austin, Texas. For three nights in a row, angry, anti-cop mobs rampaged through downtown, smashing windows, burning police cars, and looting stores. The crowd attacked officers like my husband who were trying to keep the peace, pelting them with rocks, bricks, and even lit fireworks. On the third night, things got even worse. Protestors shut down interstate, and a crazed mob surrounded Police Headquarters. Chance and his fellow officers knew that if they didn't restore order quickly, the headquarters, and maybe even the entire city, might burn to the ground. Following their training, they fired non-lethal weapons – the same "beanbag guns" that police have used for years to break up riots – to stop the violence before it got out of hand. The mob slunk off. And my husband made it home safe and sound. What I didn’t know then was that this nightmare wasn't over for us. Far from it. Unknown to Chance and the other officers on duty that night, an anti-police protestor was hit by one of my husband's non-lethal rounds. They claimed they were injured and lost part of their finger. And for that... ...the county prosecutor charged my husband with "aggravated assault by a public servant" -- a charge punishable by life in prison. This is the upside-down world we live in now. A world where lawless thugs who fling rocks at police and try to burn our city to the ground get off scot-free... ...while law-abiding officers get criminal charges and face life in prison for following their training and breaking up a mob of rioters. What are cops like my husband supposed to do when faced with this kind of out-of-control violence?! When Chance told me about the charges, my emotions went from disbelief to anger to despair...and back again. But it all started to make sense when we learned that the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge on my husband. They don't care if my husband is innocent. They'll do everything in their power to make cops pay. It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But nearly 13 years ago, my husband did. And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year police veteran. My husband is a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band. He's served on mission trips -- planting churches, planning vacation Bible schools, and sharing the Gospel. And he's done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record. Chance put his life on the line to protect our city from a violent, unhinged mob... ...and life behind bars and could be his "reward." Even if my husband's good name is cleared there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills. Thankfully, by God's grace, there is one group who has stepped up to help us -- the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know that their record has made them a policemen's best friend. Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes -- like my husband. LELDF hires the best attorneys and secures expert witnesses who will testify to the truth -- without being influenced by political paybacks. And now they've agreed to help Chance. My friend, you've read my letter this far so I'm going to ask as boldly as I can: Will you help Chance, too? _**[Would you help by sending a one-time gift to LELDF so this amazing group can defend my husband and the other good police officers who have wrongly accused?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9etpnlips3meoqjqg75rmefnncv4pqa4pk4fkro_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h6cor2c9h2bs)**_** ** You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. They rely entirely on the generosity of kind-hearted folks like you to defend the men and women in blue who defend us. _**[So with that in mind, please know that any contribution -- be it $35, $100, $500 or even $1,000 -- is tax-deductible.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znji22q152ham36lg3og6ecv68o4tijlmga3a64g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h6cor2c9h2bs)**_ But whatever you feel led to give, please send it back quickly. Chance's trial starts on July 7th. Our legal team needs to be working day and night getting ready for his defense. Because if Chance is found guilty... ...he'll spend every wedding anniversary, birthday, and Christmas for the rest of his life in prison. He won't be able to take our sons to football games or teach them how to drive... He won't be able to walk our daughter down the aisle somebody... I can't bear the thought of life without him. And I know what happens to former police officers when they get locked up with thousands of criminals. My only hope of saving him today is good-hearted patriots like you. _**[So please, my friend, rush back your gift right away if possible.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8miq7ou2bi6c5skp5je9bt6u727tpli8u83in0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h6cor2c9h2bs)**_ With this radical Soros-funded prosecutor on the warpath, _**[your gift of $35](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8cogsp50ef6q32ttus3gs16nsg3u83oq1be6i50_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h6cor2c9h2bs)**_ \-- or any amount -- could be the difference between Chance clearing his good name... ...and spending the rest of his life behind bars. Thank you for reading my email today with such a generous spirit. I can never express how grateful I am to you -- in advance -- for helping my husband fight back.
---
With hope and thanks,
---
Kimberly Bretches
---
P.S. My husband Chance put his life on the line to keep our city safe from a rabid mob of violent protestors. Now life behind bars could be his "reward."And to make things worse, we're up against the deep pockets of a George Soros backed prosecutor in court. We have very little time to act before Chance's trial begins. Chance and I have three children -- and one more on the way. Please don't let them grow up without their father. _**[Thank you for any help you can send to LELDF today.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcp5jvvnv306g7fa8lpgu48eap442l8t0knfpks0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h6cor2c9h2bs)**_
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z68ea6vpc9bs6pof8qelcvrp3fk2u11ntcsdo3io_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h6cor2c9h2bs)

name: All On The Line
subject: Let’s talk about Ohio
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
It’s deeply troubling that partisan map manipulators want to silence the will of the people
|
---

Peter,
Imagine having the opportunity to create a citizen-led redistricting commission in your state. If successful, it would ensure that voters chose their representatives, and not the other way around.
It sounds like a dream, and last year, Ohio voters nearly pulled it off. But partisan forces and outside interests mobilized (and spent millions) to sabotage the ballot initiative. And it fell short of passage.
Wash, rinse, repeat. It’s the same old story in Ohio. Every time voters here try to make their politicians more accountable, political map manipulators do everything in their power to try and stop them.
But that’s not the end of the story. Ohio is gearing up for another, mid-decade redraw of its congressional map later this year.
**That’s where we come in. All On The Line is working to stop map manipulators from stealing seats through partisan gerrymandering.**
**[Chip in any amount you can to fund our movement for fair maps across the country as we prepare to stop another attempt at a brutal, partisan gerrymander in Ohio.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102664791/529896011/508201740?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_OHRedux_email_20250224-AOTL-Tier1-OHRedux_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250224-AOTL-Tier1-OHRedux_&utm_campaign=OHRedux&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYxMzA0ZWIzLWI3ZjItZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bVpswpYJHtffCcWvpJzPUO5W461RlbcCgOtVdI8vQE8=)**

We’ve seen over and over again in Ohio that political power brokers are shameless in their cynical attempts to manipulate electoral maps to preserve their political power and silence the will of the people. They’ve thwarted nonpartisan reform efforts, ignored judicial rulings, and plowed forward with extreme gerrymanders.
The good thing is we know their playbook, and we know how to fight back.
**The only way to protect voters from partisan map manipulation and ensure our democracy grows more representative is by coming together and pushing back.**
[**Donate today to help fight gerrymandering in Ohio and across the country, so we can build a better, stronger, and more representative electoral system.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102664816/529896043/508201740?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_OHRedux_email_20250224-AOTL-Tier1-OHRedux_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250224-AOTL-Tier1-OHRedux_&utm_campaign=OHRedux&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYxMzA0ZWIzLWI3ZjItZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bVpswpYJHtffCcWvpJzPUO5W461RlbcCgOtVdI8vQE8=)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Empower your child with timeless biblical values
body:
Brand-new kid's book "The 10 Commandments for Kids"
Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?
| | | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c4905bc521b842d3ab3363172143bc6d&_e=oR-Gjic6y03seMhX0u3EYL7m_Z3irldiO2u8rO0tr5jze24qjidIzIWtbXdMaSkxxUlVZp_kKItMk_8xkmgRgtSU2ppyrMmeCU2ACgqxGmcvMApIYpJeWHT6mkx4PUzMb-Gx-KaEXqMVRvv3FmvOCoqBpEyO8PfuqgCEQQ4P2ig_QpPmMDvus9LK1MCLw9tLXaidh9ahJJut6Y87mU_eitpfBDjesmvAuf4axdGjRmYRiBxubqQzXBEPOnuCOdwfdwikI3hyDexW4LJvcJ7f7aPkQGbSrTNhLVMKYNraTUdz5W1oBQT2otxaWK28onCyy_1tiyUfsdxDz7wd-5TPR4OnZU_wENN0tsVl9-wBVMpN3fHYYsj6G8IrxZ5HWCyC)
---
Hello Friend,

Despite court rulings in Louisiana and Oklahoma that make the teaching of the Bible and the 10 Commandments mandatory in public schools and universities, we still live in a time when the foundational teachings of the Ten Commandments are no longer emphasized in our public schools and daily lives. As a result, our children are growing up without these essential, God-honoring rules for living.

In this culture of moral confusion, the Ten Commandments provide clear, simple answers about what it means to live a righteous life. Teaching these commandments to children not only instills a sense of security and purpose but also fosters emotional resilience, intellectual acuity, and ethical integrity. The Ten Commandments uphold traditional values and celebrate the family unit as foundational to society, helping children navigate life's challenges with confidence and grace.
---
| | That's why I'm excited to introduce my brand new kids book, _The 10 Commandments for Kids_ book. This book offers kids ten Bible lessons about God's simple rules for living, with each chapter explaining one commandment, discussion questions, applications, and prayers to say together. It's a trustworthy resource for children to read on their own, during church services, or as part of vacation Bible school studies.
---
| [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c4905bc521b842d3ab3363172143bc6d&_e=oR-Gjic6y03seMhX0u3EYL7m_Z3irldiO2u8rO0tr5jze24qjidIzIWtbXdMaSkxxUlVZp_kKItMk_8xkmgRgtSU2ppyrMmeCU2ACgqxGmcvMApIYpJeWHT6mkx4PUzMb-Gx-KaEXqMVRvv3FmvOCoqBpEyO8PfuqgCEQQ4P2ig_QpPmMDvus9LK1MCLw9tLXaidh9ahJJut6Y87mU_eitpfBDjesmvAuf4axdGjRmadfhMOoUGcJAt1a2K5SWbKY_rZs62ApmaHVTrB0Gxu3GcoVbEjFqkLklvEFeT935ukXDxmAVrtCEo6ih63np13CLZvhsvw2FNuq0VGzczfpRTQLZbrSflAaja4PKwV6THqrGYUxWjPC_J856UPkZgh)
---
| | Additionally, for the adults in your life, I've written,_The 10: How to Live and Love in a World That Has Lost Its Way_. This book will refresh your understanding and application of the Ten Commandments, showing how living by these principles can improve our personal lives, relationships, churches, and communities.

**I encourage you to point your children or grandchildren towards Jesus Christ.**

For a gift of any amount to support Pathway to Victory, I will send you both books: [https://secure.ptv.org/the-10-commandments-for-kids-generous-gift-1](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c4905bc521b842d3ab3363172143bc6d&_e=oR-Gjic6y03seMhX0u3EYL7m_Z3irldiO2u8rO0tr5jze24qjidIzIWtbXdMaSkxxUlVZp_kKItMk_8xkmgRgtSU2ppyrMmeCU2ACgqxGmcvMApIYpJeWHT6mkx4PUzMb-Gx-KaEXqMVRvv3FmvOCoqBpEyO8PfuqgCEQQ4P2ig_QpPmMDvus9LK1MCLw9tLXaidh9ahJJut6Y87mU_eitpfBDjesmvAuf4axdGjRmbwGgCtxzPNpuwjwabpr_Lc6Ul70qcb7VlWQH-f0UHKwSgnHKyphd0fQcSScOfZdb4FIP9by7S4hdDdvSPczrduVhrJGUVm3S9ryecBdYuHiysupKVpoD9Qo1jj6YoHCL2QfEl9wyH8ENmnb_EFU1OV)

Your generosity enables _Pathway to Victory_ to share bold biblical truths with a broken world. Together, we will make a difference and bring people closer to Christ.

Thank you for standing with us and sharing the gospel of Jesus Christ.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

Pathway To Victory
PO Box 223609
Dallas, TX 75222-3609
[
Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=c4905bc521b842d3ab3363172143bc6d&_t=BSepTVJrjNWT-L5QwYJMKDDM5jDDTd5ogLvCoSmMJ6ALTaVdVl8Q99tb2XUPw56SC99d58o_9QJ4Gg54JuYrzkOn8UQOx1YRagA8KOMWWFUu9b9_XjnYMchQTx95N2n_)

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Building the Michigan Bench
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2239%2E135344%2EXCRZS2)

Friend --
A lot can change in 10 years.
Allow me to take you back for a moment to 2016: a tough year to be a Michigan Democrat. Republicans held the Governor’s mansion, Secretary of State and Attorney General seats, and a majority in the state legislature and on the state supreme court. And Michigan voted for President Trump.
But after a tough election year, Democrats got to work building the bench: finding a new generation of leadership to run for office locally, at the state level, and for federal office.
We elected a Democratic Governor in 2018, along with a Democratic Lieutenant Governor, Attorney General, and Secretary of State.
I was elected to the House for the first time that year -- one of two Republican seats that flipped that year, and helped Democrats retake the House majority in DC.
In 2022, Democrats added to our bench when we won both the Michigan House and Senate, thanks to another raft of up-and-coming leaders.
And now, headed into a pivotal 2026, we’re reaping the benefits of that work building the bench. We have open seats up and down the ballot, but we have a large bench ready to compete for them.
It’s too early to know who the Democratic nominees will be for Senate, Governor, AG, Secretary of State, or some of our competitive races for the U.S. House and Michigan legislature.
But if the last 10 years has shown us anything, it’s that while Michigan is still a solid swing state, we can win when we have talented, pragmatic, midwestern Democrats who can run strong campaigns to win.
Against all odds, I’ll be the senior-most Michigan statewide official in 2 years. So my role will be to work hard to elect Michigan’s next generation of capable leaders. That’s why I’m asking today:
[**Can you make a contribution to my campaign today, to help me elect Michigan’s leaders up and down the ballot in 2026?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb25.Q-wXFf&refcode=em250224-1&t=2&akid=2239%2E135344%2EXCRZS2)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-feb25.owYovg&amount=3&refcode=em250224-1&t=21&akid=2239%2E135344%2EXCRZS2)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-feb25.n2Bwm5&refcode=em250224-1&t=22&akid=2239%2E135344%2EXCRZS2)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-feb25.32lMxb&refcode=em250224-1&t=23&akid=2239%2E135344%2EXCRZS2)**
---
****

Thank you,
Elissa

name: Team GIFFORDS
subject: Gabby has a message for you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
When people work together, progress is possible.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb25.m4Qwdn&refcode=em250224-1-b&t=1&akid=10023%2E3935704%2E1ghMRe)
^^ You heard it straight from Gabby: **_When people work together, progress is possible._**
[**That’s why we’re asking you to make your first online contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us keep moving forward in our fight to end gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb25.m4Qwdn&refcode=em250224-1-b&t=2&akid=10023%2E3935704%2E1ghMRe)
Back when GIFFORDS was founded twelve years ago, it was considered too politically risky for elected officials to even talk about gun violence. But with the hard work we have done together to shift the narrative on guns in our country, the vast majority of Americans—Democrats, Republicans, and independents alike—support commonsense gun safety legislation.
Even though gun safety is popular among the general public, far too many of our elected officials are choosing to prioritize gun lobby profits over our safety.
It’s up to us to work together to stop right-wing MAGA extremists from rolling back the work we’ve done to make our country safer from preventable gun violence.
[**So please, chip in to GIFFORDS PAC today. Remember: it’s not just you adding your $3 contribution—it’s tens of thousands of people all chipping in to support our work to end gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb25.m4Qwdn&refcode=em250224-1-b&t=3&akid=10023%2E3935704%2E1ghMRe)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-feb25.mmkYF4&amount=3&refcode=em250224-1-b&t=4&akid=10023%2E3935704%2E1ghMRe)**
---
****
| **[DONATE MORE](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-feb25.mmkYF4&refcode=em250224-1-b&t=5&akid=10023%2E3935704%2E1ghMRe)**
---
****
Thank you for all that you do to support our movement,
Team GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=10023%2E3935704%2E1ghMRe) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

**[TOMORROW - There is a Special Election for State Senate District 21.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/69357722-e29c-4460-adb3-ff3dbcfa94d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Pledge your support](https://substack..j8c560H9skHSKRIpbIAfwo50yxdVH0aOACnhNurvfRw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=157809806)
TOMORROW IS A CRITICAL SPECIAL ELECTION FOR
**SHELTON** , **SEYMOUR** , **MONROE** AND **STRATFORD**
## TOMORROW, TUESDAY FEBRUARY 25th is ELECTION DAY - Find Out Where to Vote [Here](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/46ea7dcb-e32a-483f-bf12-b6c82f589a30?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Polls open from 6AM-8PM**
**Please vote at your normal Election Day Polling Location**
** ****_ **MONROE**_**VOTES AT ST. JUDE'S SCHOOL** (707 Monroe Turnpike)**
If you live in one of those towns, you have the chance to make a difference - **one special election**.
We went out door knocking and despite the efforts to inform the voters, the press, the signs on yards and the messages at town centers, voters are unaware of the Tuesday, Special Election. Those voters we talked to were enthusiastic but enthusiasm only counts when you exercise that vote and you cannot rest on your laurels.
Tomorrow, make your voices heard to keep an important State Senate Seat to protect your interests and your pocketbook.
It is time to elevate Jason Perillo from the State House to the CT State Senate. The special election will be held TOMORROW, TUESDAY February 25th.

Jason has successfully represented Shelton in the State Legislature for over 16 years. He is poised to step up to the seat vacated by Kevin Kelly.
_**Jason has knowledge and understanding of the State Senate members and legislative processes and the pending legislation in Hartford and will have a seamless transition and hit the ground running immediately.**_
Jason has been and will continue to fight for YOU.
We have known Jason for many years and he has been devoted to representing Shelton. Jason is stepping up to take the seat vacated by Kevin Kelly, the Republican Minority Leader from 2021-2024. Jason is a Man of Service and help him win to continue to serve YOU!
**Get out the vote. Go to his[site ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/69357722-e29c-4460-adb3-ff3dbcfa94d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)and get the word out.**
This is the opportunity to rally to unite CT. His opponent is a Rosa DeLauro protege. We have had enough of DeLauro - **you can Dump DeLauro by electing Jason. Learn more about Jason[Here](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/69357722-e29c-4460-adb3-ff3dbcfa94d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e994f4ba-e85e-414f-a63b-c4f97de9df49?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
About Jason:
**A Voice for All** : Jason embraces the ideas and concerns of all residents of Monroe, Seymour, Shelton, and Stratford. This has allowed him to successfully support our small businesses, veterans, seniors, and children for almost two decades in Hartford. An advocate for job growth and quality education, Jason looks forward to continuing his common sense approach to the lawmaking process that we deserve as a community.
**Affordability:** Residents and families deserve a more affordable state, which is why Jason has been credited with passing the largest income tax cut in Connecticut history, a historic investment in education, and abiding by spending guardrails to help reduce debt and spend taxpayer dollars wisely.
**Public Safety:** Jason is the only experienced candidate who has collaborated with law enforcement in cracking down on 'street takeovers', car theft, and domestic violence crime, and juvenile justice reform. Jason is also the only candidate to openly support our police, establishing the Fallen Officer Fund and calling to repeal recent Police Accountability legislation.
## ELECTION DAY - Find Out Where to Vote [Here](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/46ea7dcb-e32a-483f-bf12-b6c82f589a30?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**TUESDAY, FEBRUARY 25th from 6AM-8PM**
**Please vote at your normal Election Day Polling Location**
** ****_ **MONROE**_**VOTES AT ST. JUDE'S SCHOOL** (707 Monroe Turnpike)**
**Thank you for your continued support. Please subscribe and spread the word.**
Dr. Michael Goldstein & Jonathan Goldstein - WE BOTH FULLY ENDORSE JASON
_The father-son team continues on_ so please spread the word and lets really rebuild CT together in a meaningful way.

clean_body: Keep a Crucial Senate Seat - Jason is going to keep the seat vacated by Kevin Kelly | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more Goldstein For Congress - Please Subscribe and also visit us at www.goldsteinforcongress.com Keep a Crucial Senate Seat - Jason is going to keep the seat vacated by Kevin Kelly | | and | Feb 24 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- TOMORROW IS A CRITICAL SPECIAL ELECTION FOR SHELTON , SEYMOUR , MONROE AND STRATFORD TOMORROW, TUESDAY FEBRUARY 25th is ELECTION DAY - Find Out Where to Vote Polls open from 6AM-8PM Please vote at your normal Election Day Polling Location ** MONROEVOTES AT ST. JUDE'S SCHOOL (707 Monroe Turnpike) If you live in one of those towns, you have the chance to make a difference - one special election. We went out door knocking and despite the efforts to inform the voters, the press, the signs on yards and the messages at town centers, voters are unaware of the Tuesday, Special Election. Those voters we talked to were enthusiastic but enthusiasm only counts when you exercise that vote and you cannot rest on your laurels. Tomorrow, make your voices heard to keep an important State Senate Seat to protect your interests and your pocketbook. It is time to elevate Jason Perillo from the State House to the CT State Senate. The special election will be held TOMORROW, TUESDAY February 25th. Jason has successfully represented Shelton in the State Legislature for over 16 years. He is poised to step up to the seat vacated by Kevin Kelly. Jason has knowledge and understanding of the State Senate members and legislative processes and the pending legislation in Hartford and will have a seamless transition and hit the ground running immediately. Jason has been and will continue to fight for YOU. We have known Jason for many years and he has been devoted to representing Shelton. Jason is stepping up to take the seat vacated by Kevin Kelly, the Republican Minority Leader from 2021-2024. Jason is a Man of Service and help him win to continue to serve YOU! Get out the vote. Go to his get the word out. This is the opportunity to rally to unite CT. His opponent is a Rosa DeLauro protege. We have had enough of DeLauro - you can Dump DeLauro by electing Jason. Learn more about Jason | | ---|---|--- About Jason: A Voice for All : Jason embraces the ideas and concerns of all residents of Monroe, Seymour, Shelton, and Stratford. This has allowed him to successfully support our small businesses, veterans, seniors, and children for almost two decades in Hartford. An advocate for job growth and quality education, Jason looks forward to continuing his common sense approach to the lawmaking process that we deserve as a community. Affordability: Residents and families deserve a more affordable state, which is why Jason has been credited with passing the largest income tax cut in Connecticut history, a historic investment in education, and abiding by spending guardrails to help reduce debt and spend taxpayer dollars wisely. Public Safety: Jason is the only experienced candidate who has collaborated with law enforcement in cracking down on 'street takeovers', car theft, and domestic violence crime, and juvenile justice reform. Jason is also the only candidate to openly support our police, establishing the Fallen Officer Fund and calling to repeal recent Police Accountability legislation. ELECTION DAY - Find Out Where to Vote TUESDAY, FEBRUARY 25th from 6AM-8PM Please vote at your normal Election Day Polling Location MONROEVOTES AT ST. JUDE'S SCHOOL (707 Monroe Turnpike) Thank you for your continued support. Please subscribe and spread the word. Dr. Michael Goldstein & Jonathan Goldstein - WE BOTH FULLY ENDORSE JASON The father-son team continues on so please spread the word and lets really rebuild CT together in a meaningful way. Please subscribe and support and SPREAD THE WORD. Thanks for reading Michael's Substack! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work. Michael's Substack is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell Michael's Substack that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Michael Goldstein 🇺🇸 ? ?

As a thank you for supporting the man who will This is no dollar store tumbler either... it's stylish, BPA Free and guaranteed to keep your hot beverages HOT and cold beverages COLD. Don't wait... Just like the liberal tears of this country won't last... Neither will this deal.

name: Susanna Gibson
subject: [Read] My nightmare became an international story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
Hi there,

If we haven’t met, my name is Susanna Gibson. I am one of the countless women in America lucky enough to have crossed paths with Her Bold Move. But I want to make sure you know my story...

Her Bold Move first endorsed me while I was running for a State Delegate seat in Virginia. Polls showed I was on track to win in my Republican-leaning district, and I had earned support from every major institutional endorsement organization... until my campaign was derailed by a uniquely sexist and horrifying attack.

Her Bold Move is a deeply needed organization for women across our country. Before I explain, will you join me in uplifting this extraordinary organization by pitching in $20.25 or more today?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_250224nightmare_N_SG_NO_13_NG_N_PT

Here is what happened:

In the final weeks of my run for office, I found out I had been the target of nonconsensual pornography, nonconsensual distribution of intimate images, and severe image-based sexual abuse both online and in person.

In fact, the Republican Party of Virginia – yes, the official state Republican party – sent out explicit photos of me to thousands of homes in my district. My neighbors’ homes.

Here is a look at what I went through in the wake of these attacks:

❌ I received hundreds of phone calls and social media messages that included threats of rape and death.
❌ My children had to have security stay with them at school for weeks.
❌ I was forced to leave my job as a nurse practitioner.
❌ My nightmare became gossip fodder for national and international publications.
❌ I had to leave the state to escape reporters and threatening strangers showing up at my house.
❌ I was unable to meet with voters for three weeks during the height of election season.

Male candidates do not experience this type of sexual harassment or abuse when they run for office. But here’s the thing: we need women to run for office now more than ever before. Stories like mine are the reason many women don’t. Women candidates need more support. Help me make sure they get it by donating to Her Bold Move today. →

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_250224nightmare_N_SG_NO_13_NG_N_PT

Her Bold Move is an amazing resource. They understood that their role in my campaign had become more important than ever – that I was the victim of a sexist attack reserved for women candidates.

They renewed their support for me and encouraged other endorsers to follow their lead, they checked in on me constantly, and they helped me fundraise when institutions were actually pulling funding from my campaign. At one of the loneliest times of my life, the HBM team made me feel less alone. I hope every woman candidate will take advantage of what HBM can offer.

Despite everything I outlined above – I was only 715 votes shy of winning that seat in the Virginia House of Delegates. It’s frustrating to imagine how the outcome might have been different if more orgs had followed Her Bold Move’s lead. We could have avoided electing one more anti-choice legislator in my state – a state with razor-thin margins for Democrats.

Running for office as a woman can be dangerous and scary. The political landscape is a safer and more supportive place for women with Her Bold Move at the forefront.

I am so grateful for the work that Her Bold Move is doing to defend and empower women like me – and I want to make sure they can continue to do so as more women run for office and desperately need HBM’s critical resources. Join me in supporting this important organization by pitching in $20.25 or more today!

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_250224nightmare_N_SG_NO_13_NG_N_PT

Thank you,

Susanna Gibson

Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for office in the United States. Since our founding in 2020, we have supported hundreds of pro-choice, pro-women women candidates across 42 states and counting. As abortion bans and other dangerous laws about women tend to get passed in states with the lowest representation numbers for women in government (4%, 11%, 12%....) we've made it our mission to break the anti-choice male supermajorities in those state legislatures.

Support this work with a contribution today! https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_250224nightmare_N_SG_NO_13_NG_N_PT

Paid for by Her Bold Move Action.
Her Bold Move
One Park Row 5th Floor
Providence, RI 02903
United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you believe this email was sent in error, please contact us at info@herboldmove.org.
We'd hate to see you go, but if you must, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/Uyh51TXAz0Sp29WS0WzL-g2?unsubscribedata=cCMaw7dlOWkeOrWIl1lQzV0XmTZ3riQsGMVaYZw5sD6liu%2Fwsc8oanguh1%2By7y%2FqOCY6LJiJO3m3Yqa%2BNvVtKUN4uLxQn44abkdhYosuDB%2FWQLC%2B3u2DAKvTwiOq5pVW9M%2F7xG8ty4qqkCcLurE5dGa%2Bt0PLpAsOxPwET3OAAMHELBHUSnDtRpQgDzk%2FaVvPVN8mOSSYNi4GcI6vN%2FSftYsbZbl9utOo%2FEvUars%2BIIn3LPsmzVz1DphK8eG8z1Tz5ycZi3fBPlnDt3GYskuPDxzIiwWkeubf1jBYY20XoE6OaaEJsUa9bf7VueFEBaU6UV9ODg3l34BiTSO1KO001dNxJOuMrKqoxHW%2B%2F4BFSJw3a4DX3Sk8kbX2U4L0jonDsNYrKCOFKgu8L%2FM8gq4DVT89IoJggThNRw8nOlY8FSE%3D .
To learn more about Her Bold Move Action, please visit us at herboldmove.org.

Truthfully - support from Patriots like yourself has made it possible for me to stand up against the Radical Left and Defend President Trump.

_**[If they continue bringing lawsuits against President Trump, the future is grim.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zko0dfv8buafk0t5id73hngpm5r4fc0ur093r2kg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h6eoj0cdh2bs)**_

[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7kn13i6r6es53pfvf0dqci8ivba6sonv7uv2lgo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h6eoj0cdh2bs)

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Good morning ☀️
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I truly believe that there’s not a single thing we can’t do if we do it together.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=120%2E181023%2EykHba_)
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12025.B7hgkZ&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250224_AM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=120%2E181023%2EykHba_)
Good morning, friend!
Sorry for the early Monday message. I know you’re probably getting ready to start your week, so I’ll keep this quick.
I’m having my morning cup of coffee right now before I head into my first meeting of the day, and my team just let me know that we’re at risk of falling short of our February fundraising goal.
I’m running for Governor of Michigan to build the future Michiganders deserve — one that raises wages, lowers costs, protects our rights from bullies and billionaires, and ensures every person has the tools they need to thrive.
As much as I wish I didn’t have to ask, our fight to make Michigan the best place to call home requires a lot of hard work and a lot of resources. **Michigan is a battleground state, and we can’t afford to take any voter for granted.**
I’m counting on grassroots support from folks like you to help me take our message across Michigan and reach voters in all 83 counties.
[**We all want to build a better future for our families and Michigan. That’s why I’m asking: Will you join me in creating the future we deserve by pitching in a donation before Friday’s fundraising deadline? Every donation makes a difference.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12025.B7hgkZ&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250224_AM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=120%2E181023%2EykHba_)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/263?c0=jmb-em-q12025.faQQoW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250224_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=120%2E181023%2EykHba_)

---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/266?c0=jmb-em-q12025.slPEnH&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250224_AM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=120%2E181023%2EykHba_)
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/605?c0=jmb-em-q12025.UvwKrI&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250224_AM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=120%2E181023%2EykHba_)

[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12025.B7hgkZ&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250224_AM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=120%2E181023%2EykHba_)
---
I truly believe that there’s not a single thing we can’t do if we do it together. Thank you for standing with me.
— Jocelyn

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: Big Trump Knife
subject: Introducing The 10" BIG Trump Victory Knife...
body:
The fixed blade knife comes with a belt sheath for ease of carry...

Celebrate Victory with the 47th President Donald Trump in 2025!

The BIG Trump Knife is [laser-etched on a stainless steel blade with a waving American Flag and a stainless steel half-guard keeps your fingers from slipping.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20442/6374453/fc8c44fe9a3ffd91ce41a3e2e20e5ccd59be68b4/13cf7fe0f57c18ad42b443698b296ec2e8b2c956)

---
The patriotic handle scales are crafted of a **[blue pakkawood panel that has“Donald Trump” in white, surrounded by white stars, and a red andwhite-striped acrylic panel.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20442/6374453/fc8c44fe9a3ffd91ce41a3e2e20e5ccd59be68b4/13cf7fe0f57c18ad42b443698b296ec2e8b2c956)**

The fixed blade knife comes with a belt sheath for ease of carry.
**Get Your Trump Knife Today &
Let Folks Know Where You Stand** The Limited Edition Trump Knife is not just a rare collectible, but a symbol of your support for President Trump, who always stood for "True American" freedom.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I wanted you to hear this from me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
Hello! It has been a while... I have some big news I’d like to share with you.

Hello! It has been a while... I have some big news I’d like to share with you.
Yes - the rumors are true. I've got some major news for you!
| |
---
| | | Hi, it's Vivek.

I wanted you to hear this directly from me: I JUST announced my candidacy for Governor of Ohio.

**[In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to this historic campaign - but first, I'd like to explain why if you'll indulge me for a moment.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-kRszLaLV9ksYQJraw "I’ll be making a special announcement soon and after everything we’ve been through together, I want you to be the first to hear.")**

---
** WHY RUN NOW? **
---
President Trump winning re-election in November was not just another political victory - it was a seismic realignment for our country. He won every swing state. He improved his vote share of minorities and young voters. We won the House AND Senate. And heck, he even won the popular vote.

It was the honor of a lifetime to rally voters in battleground states, campaign on college campuses to turn out Gen-Z for Trump, and promote his America First vision at rally after rally.

---
| | | | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-1suEyo2Ser5IUGKBth-Q)
---
| | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
Right now, we have a once-in-a-generation chance to make real, lasting change to the country we know and love. It's an opportunity to not just ticker around the edges of the Federal Government, but to upend it completely.

This is our moment to GUT the managerial bureaucracy, FIRE anyone connected to the weaponization of our own government against us, SLASH the size and scope of the administrative state, and usher in the GOLDEN AGE for America!

But the Deep State is already putting up the fight of its life. They're resisting change at every turn. Make no mistake - we can't afford to squander this historic opportunity. That's why President Trump needs trusted partnerships at the state level RIGHT NOW!

---
** WHY OHIO? **
---
This one's easy. I was born and raised here in the Buckeye State and graduated from St. Xavier - a Catholic high school in Cincinnati. My wife, Apporva, and I live outside Columbus, raising our two boys here. I've started multiple businesses in Ohio. I've also known JD Vance since college and campaigned all over the state for our excellent new Senator, Bernie Moreno.
---
| | | | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._1Iazng)
---
| | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-rdDbbX7w)
---
The people here are honest, have steel in their spines, and embody the City on a Hill spirit that our country was founded upon. [As Governor, I'd be honored to represent them and the values they stand for.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-1pXd04yBjA "As Governor, I’d be honored to represent them and the values they stand for.")

---
** WHY GOVERNOR? **
---
Having traveled across the country, met with hundreds of politicians, ran multiple businesses, and seen how deals really get cut in The Swamp, I have never been more certain that REAL change only gets done with buy-in at the executive level.

We saw up close and personal the failure of Democrat rule with Joe Biden in control of the Federal Government. We also see Democrat governors like Gavin Newsom and Kathy Hochul drive their states into ruin. On the other hand, we now see President Trump act quickly and decisively to fix our country by deporting illegal criminals, moving to cut taxes, securing our border, gutting DEI, and obliterating the Deep State. True leadership can change everything.
---
| | | | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-9j-MQg2bsVIxshA)
---
| | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._nT3LrcyTl9a7R6DL9Gg)
---
That's why I'm running for Governor in my home state of Ohio. I will partner with President Trump - just like I did on the campaign trail - at the state level to Make America Great Again. clean_body: Hello! It has been a while... I have some big news I’d like to share with you. Hello! It has been a while... I have some big news I’d like to share with you. Yes - the rumors are true.
