"I’ll be making a special announcement soon and after everything we’ve been through together, I want you to be the first to hear." WHY RUN NOW? President Trump winning re-election in November was not just another political victory - it was a seismic realignment for our country. He won every swing state. He improved his vote share of minorities and young voters. We won the House AND Senate. And heck, he even won the popular vote. It was the honor of a lifetime to rally voters in battleground states, campaign on college campuses to turn out Gen-Z for Trump, and promote his America First vision at rally after rally. | | | | | | Right now, we have a once-in-a-generation chance to make real, lasting change to the country we know and love. It's an opportunity to not just ticker around the edges of the Federal Government, but to upend it completely. This is our moment to GUT the managerial bureaucracy, FIRE anyone connected to the weaponization of our own government against us, SLASH the size and scope of the administrative state, and usher in the GOLDEN AGE for America! But the Deep State is already putting up the fight of its life. They're resisting change at every turn. Make no mistake - we can't afford to squander this historic opportunity. That's why President Trump needs trusted partnerships at the state level RIGHT NOW! WHY OHIO? This one's easy. I was born and raised here in the Buckeye State and graduated from St. Xavier - a Catholic high school in Cincinnati. My wife, Apporva, and I live outside Columbus, raising our two boys here. I've started multiple businesses in Ohio. I've also known JD Vance since college and campaigned all over the state for our excellent new Senator, Bernie Moreno. | | | | | | The people here are honest, have steel in their spines, and embody the City on a Hill spirit that our country was founded upon. "As Governor, I’d be honored to represent them and the values they stand for." WHY GOVERNOR? Having traveled across the country, met with hundreds of politicians, ran multiple businesses, and seen how deals really get cut in The Swamp, I have never been more certain that REAL change only gets done with buy-in at the executive level. We saw up close and personal the failure of Democrat rule with Joe Biden in control of the Federal Government. We also see Democrat governors like Gavin Newsom and Kathy Hochul drive their states into ruin. On the other hand, we now see President Trump act quickly and decisively to fix our country by deporting illegal criminals, moving to cut taxes, securing our border, gutting DEI, and obliterating the Deep State. True leadership can change everything. | | | | | | That's why I'm running for Governor in my home state of Ohio. subject: You can show solidarity 24/7, 365 >>
body:
UWD is rallying support across our communities to send a clear message that immigrants are welcome here. | | | Peter, We’re calling on immigrant allies and all people of conscience to join us for our **Our Here to Stay: Spring Into Action** campaign. From March 17th to the 21st, UWD is rallying support across our communities to send a clear message that immigrants are welcome here, and we’ll fight to keep our communities safe from family separation and deportation. Your neighbors, coworkers, and everyone affected by Donald Trump’s cruel immigration policies need a sign that they aren’t alone. **And now, you can show solidarity 24/7, 365 while supporting our growing movement with a lawn sign of your own.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqviG1H8gbodPq06HZDs36JQGxvqv1-kY7mKsf9tCGCNt-iV06wIY1rq4YZUPEmo4sg7gm8XBdEBwgVcSnN9d3TWt-bVLZHQQpPNshJdIjLQCt-0YBVh3zC0vkT-Aypvhw82f0ULAR6_xDk7q60r376Yf3wibJsp7bxji5kK8rvHv29Mn-xJO2kNcSm-g81Xu0yZWVK5q2SRlcUjJyZlxRUcgMtBDv7doNQe10IWSuOO2AXhCD0dYUZi1dXn3CBzKm4GUmAEuIx7qdT8hmaXuqh8g4wogsJTI6WO3RSamm4Jm8OfPtG8d8RmmiCu4YHd-vEle2gSxBwJWNE3Agq5FjUaXkfUV3SgNHFGZYCkrdMBCPZp8L8Y7-_E3hJX3gNcBoDHnDd9KuaB1xTFObEyld3B7sjGmWbf7OlWyWV_YlA3dA/4ea/75IlMJoIQyiCwHJjLxe87g/h0/h001.qHW97iLFTCq0YSijjZMkLFqitJOyF1Z8eiaUe_5BGco)

clean_body: UWD is rallying support across our communities to send a clear message that immigrants are welcome here. | | | Peter, We’re calling on immigrant allies and all people of conscience to join us for our Our Here to Stay: Spring Into Action campaign. From March 17th to the 21st, UWD is rallying support across our communities to send a clear message that immigrants are welcome here, and we’ll fight to keep our communities safe from family separation and deportation. Your neighbors, coworkers, and everyone affected by Donald Trump’s cruel immigration policies need a sign that they aren’t alone. And now, you can show solidarity 24/7, 365 while supporting our growing movement with a lawn sign of your own. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. We need people like you to join the call, Peter. Our communities are counting on us to take bold action, and that starts with loudly voicing: "No Hate, No Fear: Immigrants Are Welcome Here." Thank you for standing with our communities, Carolina at United We Dream Follow us on: | | | | |

body:

|
---
**DEI LAWSUITS** are being brought against President Trump.
It’s Black MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds, I’m his strongest supporter in the House, and I’m fighting 24/7 to end these attacks against President Trump.
This week, the Radical Left called upon its DEI Warriors to march into court to sue President Trump for removing DEI.
These are the same people who called me a **“race traitor”** for enacting President Trump’s agenda in the House.
_**[It’s DELUSIONAL.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zls9e7a612bv7jsk3ir5j8ks3jngkkdrse4khne8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h69p72c9h2bs)**_
Look - your skin color doesn’t matter to me, Trump, or the MAGA Movement. If you bleed Red, White, and Blue, you’re a PATRIOT in my book.
And as his Strongest Supporter in Congress - I’m personally overseeing putting all of these ATTACKS against President Trump to bed,**I CAN’T let him down.**
Truthfully - support from Patriots like yourself has made it possible for me to stand up against the Radical Left and Defend President Trump.

|
---
[Will you join me today and stand with us?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhosg9oi7dujheb8i423nbbgf13e5qs51pbu6p00_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h69p72c9h2bs)

As you read this, they are hauling Millions from Radical Left billionaires to fund these lawsuits against President Trump and make DEI permanent.
_**[If they continue bringing lawsuits against President Trump, the future is grim.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdvnn3gu2cfvtt0t19b99fs6chqik42opte85b70_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h69p72c9h2bs)**_
I **WILL NOT** let the Radical Left DROWN our President in lawsuits. Your support helps us fight back against the Radical Left and continue our efforts to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN.

[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z58f9fekc5b1rfnu1ldusigaiksiojb18d3sjej8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h69p72c9h2bs)

Byron Donalds _****_

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I’ve nominated you, friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Don’t delay accepting your nomination ASAP!

|
---
| | | Friend,

I'll cut to the chase- I would love to have you on my team in 2025.

We have a real chance to turn this country around and get us back on the path to patriotism, peace, and prosperity, but we can't do that without loyal patriots like YOU on our side.

That's why I've nominated you to become a House Majority Charter Member for 2025. Congratulations!

And I'm here today to ask you to officially accept this high honor. **[Will you become a Member for 2025 today?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvi1msec66i7qlpg10hpiglo0l79vmoe9mgm4c1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h69p72c9h2bs "Will you become a Member for 2025 today?")**

---
| | | [ACCEPT YOUR 2025 MEMBERSHIP](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zahnto7cej3qfjrb11uuko9cu5mkb1b68mf436o8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h69p72c9h2bs "ACCEPT YOUR 2025 MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z13h4vucpinpirbighfn3jaf7jg96tlr6a82oamg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h69p72c9h2bs)
---

Friend, I need your answer by 11:59 PM tonight! Don't delay accepting your nomination ASAP!

We need to come out STRONG in 2025- **_we cannot afford to have you sitting on the sidelines!_**

**[So can I count on you to become a 2025 Member today?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z85718dfh2q7ak1f9dj37tfpatk938qtkclr8pcg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h69p72c9h2bs "So can I count on you to become a 2025 Member today?")**

---
| | | [ACCEPT YOUR 2025 MEMBERSHIP](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zis5inmdbp6cmiauvrqsbdhidlfbsv72bih777pg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h69p72c9h2bs "ACCEPT YOUR 2025 MEMBERSHIP")
---

It's patriots like you that power our operation, and with the Democrats set to throw EVERYTHING they have at our GOP Trifecta, we need all hands on deck.

This will be a historic year, Friend, and I'd feel a lot better knowing we have you on our side.

**[Please, if you're able to, accept this nomination and become a 2025 House Majority Charter Member today.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0t2gubocvp3366vsfnj3kl44pbivpg3cjs34ucg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h69p72c9h2bs "Please, if you’re able to, accept this nomination and become a 2025 House Majority Charter Member today.")**

---
| | | [ACCEPT YOUR 2025 MEMBERSHIP](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh4k3g2pbunibsh1jdjo486g5kl55bfobnjr931o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c5h69p72c9h2bs "ACCEPT YOUR 2025 MEMBERSHIP")
---

Yours in patriotism,

Speaker Mike Johnson

body:
---
Derek, did you see what DNC Chair Martin said? _“If we really want to stop Donald Trump right now, and if people are pissed off about what he’s doing, the best way to punch back and to fight back is to roll up your sleeves and help us build the infrastructure so we can win elections again” – Chair Ken Martin._ You heard it right: Democrats have the power to stop Donald Trump and his extremist agenda, but we can only do so by building our base, investing in state parties, and organizing across the country to reach voters in every ZIP code. With Trump’s daily attacks on our freedoms and the constant stream of executive orders, the stakes have never been higher. There has never been a more important moment to roll up our sleeves and fight back. The earlier we start this work, the more of an impact we can have in safeguarding our democracy, supporting Democratic candidates, and winning elections nationwide in 2025, 2026, and beyond. Which is why we’re coming to you today. [**Will you chip in $3 to the DNC today? It’s time to get to work and there is no better day than today to donate and get in the fight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250224_2839_fr&refcode2=2847_22930333_RpK72E&akid=2847%2E22930333%2ERpK72E) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250224_2839_fr&refcode2=2847_22930333_RpK72E&akid=2847%2E22930333%2ERpK72E)**

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Minnesota Deserves Better
body:
| | | | [](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQoIQCGIy40Aggw8sxnmuE9IrvqQsQb1KkbChzT3R_vikRpF-O1x89Fm_wPw4)
---

Recent revelations have uncovered massive fraud schemes under Governor Tim Walz's administration, leading to the mismanagement of millions in taxpayer dollars.
From the Feeding Our Future scandal, where $250 million was exploited, to the 62 active investigations into federally funded childcare centers for serious violations, it's clear that Minnesotans have been let down by their leadership.
It's time to hold those responsible accountable and ensure such egregious mismanagement never happens again.
Minnesota deserves better. **[Sign the petition today to demand accountability for the corruption, waste, and failures that have plagued our state.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQoIQCGIy40Aggw8sxnmuE9IrvqQsQb1KkbChzT3R_vikRpF-O1x89Fm_wPw4)**********[](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQoIQCGIy40AggiMAxOyCHuTWWtPcIkrWZeOCP8Ap1a0GAS4M0pKqrdOD_y-0)******[********](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQoIQCGIy40AggiMAxOyCHuTWWtPcIkrWZeOCP8Ap1a0GAS4M0pKqrdOD_y-0)**
---
| [SIGN THE PETITION](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQoIQCGIy40Aggw8sxnmuE9IrvqQsQb1KkbChzT3R_vikRpF-O1x89Fm_wPw4)

name: Able Dems
subject: Airlines want to rollback rules that prevent wheelchair damage!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | **** **Under Trump deregulation, airlines sue the government to roll back a rule against damaging wheelchairs.
****
**[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQspAbPSpPuaj1jgwGWpjiBAgePscIpYXv9ygB3e1J1-ofldDfPIzOIMQlLP18Jn8YfERX3b-sZMUYdQ8DXuhDEt6Z8_ICn39YUsLYOIYi2Ouf8PvLHwN7EB8RSmMpVg03iOo-0DrkWp1a_tJJcQR0_HrUPTxOOi2uXCxixG3IeiThKP4tvLlXemQ_2KQ2WUVNyQzji5XQXCFWIApFsdrwnFXO4vZUgOpsa9yBTseTF_HBv7_i3dgQDRMlNMgEvCdTrNTJESAZyY6Bd9IKor3W2oP_qFCqCFDPWQyE0sQuTuCMRN8EvuGwyAfMMLsc7tHc33YUOaaVd99zsziQ6YTaTUw/4ea/R62xKsUfRFyLHT8lXpPwbg/h0/h001.2U1f6DAgaAHaXHKgHdRXnoDNAw8jP2V1zt4i0a_kWM0)
[**Unacceptable! Chip in to help Able Dems FIGHT BACK!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQshfxOMHBXLnsHYw0j60qSdRgDiMik5t7pSMY0qu0aw9THQ9bGsQR8G2U9-_AZkLFcRF5l6bk3T-TulISycYkL--8hpY7Th1vPsQdzVl9YTzAnwiOKqu87J1dnIfE2eiF5XNm3oYNypstOTr2Awm6QtZIvkJpSqhnpKsUkhFay-_R2Dl3cJ_zf-njbY85gklLEEepIMQ5qfMBmW9uEHfLClzqHlNcwosmK5QyibL9dZPCRPKl_O2wJZnjcR6qEp73Zu4VdbcFyPhec9MGHAtiKwVYa-0tuMk7MLrnhAokab938Hs_ebYIk921Dud4ACumZGBecnS5Zx7c9PydXG28RfA/4ea/R62xKsUfRFyLHT8lXpPwbg/h1/h001.5-DLlsjheUB5aadiFzwof4pPq83ZmjxcAWSv7UXsuFs)
* * *
__ For those who rely on a wheelchair, damaging it feels akin to breaking their legs—or worse. Prior to the Biden administration's new rule, U.S. airlines were breaking approximately 30 wheelchairs** _every day_** without consequence. Now, a coalition of major airlines is suing the Department of Transportation to overturn this rule, which mandates improved training, reimbursement, and prompt repairs for damaged mobility devices to ensure wheelchair users receive the safe and dignified air travel they deserve. **We cannot allow this to jeopardize the advancements in accessibility that have been hard-won.** [**Will you join us in safeguarding these critical rights with a donation? Your support helps us elect Democrats with disabilities and allies who advocate for policies that uphold the dignity and rights of all individuals.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQsv6G13xDJkcAT3eWN2WUkZ5RZdU1bDt9STNIU2detLRXk_xEiRU5N_PG5ec77Ha8QssM0vZSMSWnK0b9uP4I7YXnF0mfrbE4W9_YBTX4_VIl3K4_O_f4nSUQkRIGOYQjHdFUiQwcywvb8Pu_zqEosS58Kf3v8ZSa8rMdPMjPIO6_0QB8PddBw7V5-pGqpiEN_5Ex8RvYy6KCUMMdsBkG-WFiO4zFdDGAQtFFBCXxiYu_ATdiaa-H-BulGAAe2FmCwLSKT8FL0tNTgCDxaDEomdxOP4fjhTA2x7K522MXsIoGHVq0UwNkG3LtFJqDrH8TheMBBy39iwEM2yr2DLH442I/4ea/R62xKsUfRFyLHT8lXpPwbg/h2/h001.ovF1rBxfolbohjwo8RcnfCXtkLdtkD9pi2ibH1_jHSg) [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQsuACinv7O4Qklf4XmypE-q1VXBmLsuiSQMbsBzKUraEq9O5ZZi5pktp6oERprrQiTHaa37ph1Qz8911_QnYHo66LyLSIkLxoNCEsaQFC1HVNpLYgLOQx2HTVJed4RtTreqBO-6oiPyhAwZGV77OkVHtH6NJFeu7SJjXthoLwJhEHgD1j8gHKV_FDOXa4EHKCOzNo5dKNiWZ73dBK4HpGWByhLlcGyrQ2E66PB4rGtVphgHKEE5iIuQyaW6U0Io8XXx1vPZ2gcOIqVioe079WBIpQcmPdfneFtFVX9Iihq7kzgd3XM_42pAxDHOZldhsEfEODngGY6GE7zQIxSNzPLM0/4ea/R62xKsUfRFyLHT8lXpPwbg/h3/h001.ki2UKD0vfxxmgt03_Lv_yxdw4EykIGT3r4aJgGL2KNQ) [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQsrzvnublG4NQmalpPnemC9NNCo6VpjUku_tXBMW690v10M-8svsYtMHdyj2HrS2VLECLJmIVWJuhUTnHNZ6V6frYMdAfMiqtmGfsFwuWn2NywTPjRUwLqm4pFWqTMjgxxKWzpezyAoe1yT3BRsSCXGqRS38GOofFFV2FX6VO8ZBp9OBNNZPRJ8JgXRmMIdT8_9awkV4FtEyLjAgHFaT-veIlQ3gbcgIhRpkbStS0XZzChOoCPt3CE0jooZUzn0Aphzpr5qPjfKobh6fkfdFMiCRlwtpE5hgOHtMb_ZDjxrpUHPfYlLdV_4i1FB1TMZGgN2soP-GlcFKrEhCMnN6wM_w/4ea/R62xKsUfRFyLHT8lXpPwbg/h4/h001.DVbRYhG41mjzUoRJ75686IfHu1H8zAt_0jaSEMZxW90) **** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | ** Under Trump deregulation, airlines sue the government to roll back a rule against damaging wheelchairs. ** For those who rely on a wheelchair, damaging it feels akin to breaking their legs—or worse. Prior to the Biden administration's new rule, U.S. airlines were breaking approximately 30 wheelchairs every day without consequence. Now, a coalition of major airlines is suing the Department of Transportation to overturn this rule, which mandates improved training, reimbursement, and prompt repairs for damaged mobility devices to ensure wheelchair users receive the safe and dignified air travel they deserve. We cannot allow this to jeopardize the advancements in accessibility that have been hard-won. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. The rule being challenged by American Airlines, Delta, JetBlue, Southwest, and United was enacted by former Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg. If rolled back, it would allow airlines to continue damaging wheelchairs, endangering the well-being of people with disabilities. Despite the clear need for these protections, Airlines for America (A4A) is poised to spend millions on legal battles instead of investing in better standards for wheelchair handling. At Able Dems, we envision a future where every individual, regardless of mobility needs, can travel with dignity and respect. However, this progress is now under threat.** Thanks for your support. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Able Dems PAC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Voter Action Project Research
subject: Short survey: Permanent Mail-in Voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project
Bolts: Connecticut Ballot Measure Could Make Voting More Inclusive [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/Bolts_CTMailInBallotInitiative.png]
Folks -- Connecticut recently passed a ballot initiative to expand the use of mail-in voting to all citizens with no excuse, every year. This follows other states, like Maryland, which allow voters to permanently opt-in to receive and submit their ballot by mail.
Mail voting -- in use in the United States since the Civil War -- has repeatedly been proven to be a safe, secure, and reliable voting method used by voters of all political parties.
As we move towards the next set of state legislative sessions, we need to know what issues you favor the most. Will you take our one-click survey today?
Are you in favor of having the option to vote by mail permanently?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:

clean_body: Voter Action Project Bolts: Connecticut Ballot Measure Could Make Voting More Inclusive [] Folks -- Connecticut recently passed a ballot initiative to expand the use of mail-in voting to all citizens with no excuse, every year. This follows other states, like Maryland, which allow voters to permanently opt-in to receive and submit their ballot by mail. Mail voting -- in use in the United States since the Civil War -- has repeatedly been proven to be a safe, secure, and reliable voting method used by voters of all political parties. As we move towards the next set of state legislative sessions, we need to know what issues you favor the most. Will you take our one-click survey today? CNN Republican Scott Jennings **[fired back at his colleague Catherine Rampell](https://substack.com/redirect/b66ad4cd-b598-4999-99c1-932b49f29b00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for calling Elon Musk a Nazi during an dramatic meltdown on the network.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/b66ad4cd-b598-4999-99c1-932b49f29b00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b66ad4cd-b598-4999-99c1-932b49f29b00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Rampell claimed Musk was "playing footsy" with nazi's, listing some other examples she felt proved his connection with the far right ideology.
"By the 2nd sieg heil I think he kind of loses the benefit of the doubt," Rampell said. "He's been given so many chances!"
Jennings sighed with disappointment at what he was hearing. "We've moved on from Trump Derangement Syndrome to **[Elon Derangement Syndrome." ](https://substack.com/redirect/b66ad4cd-b598-4999-99c1-932b49f29b00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"He has a long record of supporting the jewish people, number one! Number two, anybody who is asserting this thing he did on the stage is a 'sig heil,' lawyer up maybe because that's an absolutely ridiculous thing to say!"
Musk made the gesture during his speech following Trump's inauguration ceremony, saying "my heart goes out to you" as he reached out his hand from his chest to the crowd. Musk's critics, like Rampell, insist that the hand movement is proof of the tech billionaire's fascist affinity.
Watch the fiery CNN debate right here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/b66ad4cd-b598-4999-99c1-932b49f29b00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **This PROVES Elon Musk never did a "N*zi salute" **
Watch this young woman on TikTok **[explain exactly why the media's "outrage" over Elon Musk's "nazi" gesture](https://substack.com/redirect/c9589c09-fbfc-440a-8e9c-d8217d90ff90?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at the inauguration is total nonsense.
She reveals dozens of Democrats who have made similar gestures, waiving to the crowd or holding up their hand in solidarity. "If you truly believe that he did that, then you truly believe that these Democrats did it as well. Why weren't you outraged about it then?!" she asks.
**["You are just so angry that you lost.](https://substack.com/redirect/c9589c09-fbfc-440a-8e9c-d8217d90ff90?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** You are so angry that America woke up and is tired of the leftist bullshit that you've been pushing on us for so long," she continues.

# Elon Musk responds to backlash over eyebrow-raising email to National Intel workers
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d28df011-d2e9-4f8a-b96c-676b81b39bc2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Elon Musk addressed backlash over an email sent to federal workers, which intelligence agencies like the CIA and NSA told staff to ignore. The Tesla CEO clarified his intent on X Sunday, saying the message wasn't meant to defy authority but to take a pulse check in certain departments.
Sent last week, the email urged employees to produce a list of five bullet points, detailing what they accomplished in the past week. A senior intelligence source, speaking anonymously **[to the New York Post](https://substack.com/redirect/4ee92d69-2225-4870-9e14-4c5020c75dce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , warned it could confuse workers in critical roles.
This following Musk and DOGE's audit of USAID, including a big reveal of frivilous, wasteful woke programs funded by American tax dollars.
Following pushback from the email's recipients, Musk posted an explanation for the email to X, saying, "It was to see "who had a pulse and two working neurons."
National Intelligence Director Tulsi Gabbard responded to Musk's message, telling her staff to ignore it. "Given the inherently sensitive and classified nature of our work, [intelligence community] employees should not respond to the OPM email," Gabbard wrote.

name: Maxwell Frost
subject: Come out to support Anna for Mayor of Orlando!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/qxvbg2p9-DvoKfVRrK3rjQ~~/AAPPABA~/fhoR97VasmU2858PgdirsC44bq4AhRWiK-Hy2UFDkljfuegsf01SYgukD2RPlnaSS4rFo84HofJ5zIGLBv-Q6U8C5zeNGWorGWpFGM9Q_sOWnfhZd_Cv-GMzpfYISDUpKbgT9tELZv_3RVyBGzIcfvexgqrbgIS_3JaC2mqpG6kuKouYXSdC_31Xxe_LaSabATE35nmnFQg_B-u36i2btQ~~

Peter, no one expected someone like me to be elected to Congress. But against all odds, I’m here – and it’s important you understand how I got here.

This email is long, so if you don’t have a spare minute to read this all the way through, please consider chipping in a few bucks before my end of month fundraising deadline – so I can keep fighting for all of us in Congress. >> (http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/qxvbg2p9-DvoKfVRrK3rjQ~~/AAPPABA~/fhoR97VasmU2858PgdirsC44bq4AhRWiK-Hy2UFDkljfuegsf01SYgukD2RPlnaSS4rFo84HofJ5zIGLBv-Q6U8C5zeNGWorGWpFGM9Q_sOWnfhZd_Cv-GMzpfYISDUpKbgT9tELZv_3RVyBGzIcfvexgqrbgIS_3JaC2mqpG6kuKouYXSdC_31Xxe_LaSabATE35nmnFQg_B-u36i2btQ~~)

I was raised in a working-class family. My mom was a public school teacher, and my dad was a working musician. They struggled through more broken systems – from underfunded schools, to outrageous healthcare costs, to juggling different jobs to pay the bills.

Even when I grew up and ran for Congress, I was a Gen Z working class kid – I didn’t have the same advantages that other candidates have. I drove for Uber and racked up credit card debt just to make ends meet during my campaign. Because of that, everyone counted me out.

But I was able to defy the odds: by becoming a community leader, the National Organizing Director for March for our Lives, and the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress.

Now, I need you to help me defy the odds once again to stay in Congress. I’m determined to keep fighting for working-class folks, but I can’t do that without your grassroots support.

I’m still $10,709 short of what I need to raise before my critical end of month deadline. Please, if you can, donate a few bucks right now to keep me fighting in Congress for the most vulnerable among us? >> (http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/qxvbg2p9-DvoKfVRrK3rjQ~~/AAPPABA~/fhoR97VasmU2858PgdirsC44bq4AhRWiK-Hy2UFDkljfuegsf01SYgukD2RPlnaSS4rFo84HofJ5zIGLBv-Q6U8C5zeNGWorGWpFGM9Q_sOWnfhZd_Cv-GMzpfYISDUpKbgT9tELZv_3RVyBGzIcfvexgqrbgIS_3JaC2mqpG6kuKouYXSdC_31Xxe_LaSabATE35nmnFQg_B-u36i2btQ~~)

name: AMAC Action
subject: A ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris
body:
It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.

| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/QK3K_dutmA6Tb6D4liteSLwsO6YOoH4c2jDqsN4KMeIGOJBLU52i4gAMW_xxuTy--5pRM-SCbxJduF8AJQix-PXcPn-1Ygie_S8znWOfQiwObgVHnh6DxlPDV90lg4Js3HAL-NRTtyeZtUURcKVFDgMFcj_7VMnhYpNLQgEpA0hM0LcuqTIMKiUKc33PJGLTtkhXWGN30upBXZK-SvocZRYekEiF9pDDUTFRy1HfvIWZ-SZRWGeEmclle9mJMeiCnpP6S6MWDhKIlHU9KmTSVEx5rNo4u9Av0is_GPr2ckDnu4zbyCGT62KFAgXCIb1b8Gk_ThOu9exVgqjYorKOefmHx2hdLL-B9QJXUPZM6kdVXsdEms2q5E_ajVTf3LMov_JteIrMDFENVeUkRuNYaDA3__QlpVUTa3fLeLM/s5merffASXKAVI56StTGaNUiKYWYeZDN/6)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”~ Elon Musk | | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives and the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is already being watered down in Congress. Your vote is already being watered down in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully canceled out in future elections. American elections should be decided by American citizens., here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was before the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. But I can’t do it without you. No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,honest elections... none of it matters.Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have expressly banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020. This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. , I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions. The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. It means we can’t be bought. On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling billions to dark money “non-profit” groups to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting and banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. P.P.S. It’s imperative that you and I help President Donald J. Trump hit the ground running - especially when it comes to defusing the ticking timebomb left behind by the previous regime in the form of “open borders” and allowing non-citizens to vote. | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Gay Valimont
subject: $4 TRILLION. Paid for by….
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
Fellow defender of healthcare:

$4 TRILLION.

House Republicans weren’t serious about reducing the debt - that’s much is clear by their proposal to INCREASE the debt ceiling by $4 TRILLION - and it’s all to pay for tax cuts for BILLIONAIRES like Elon Musk.

Enough. Enough of this - and if you think mortgaging our future to pay for Musk tax cuts is crazy then I need you to help me win my special election on April 1st.

I’m Gay Valimont, the nominee for Florida’s 1st Congressional District seat that’s been vacated by MAGA Matt Gaetz. We MUST STOP the Trump tax cuts because they can only pay for it by cutting Medicaid - AND MEDICARE. They’re already saying so!

Can you split a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton of $4? $10? $40? Or more? Help me stand up to cuts to Medicaid! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]We’ve all seen the images of Elon Musk and his “DOGE” bros going wild. They’re killing whole agencies illegally and all to find money to pay for these tax cuts.

But they’re already licking their chops for Medicaid...To which I say NO!

Tens of thousands of Floridians rely on Medicaid benefits - including many of the families of enlisted military and veteran retirees! As a community activist, I can’t let this stand.

Please, split a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton to me fight for Medicaid: $20, $40, or $100 goes such a long way in helping FLIP this seat. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]

The April 1st election is less than 50 days away.

With my victory - and victory for two other Democrats in 2025 special elections - we actually have a chance to TAKE OVER the House. To protect Medicaid.

All of this is an uphill battle - but protecting Medicaid is something WE HAVE TO DO. I need your help.

In defense of Medicaid,

Gay Valimont
Democratic Nominee, FL-01

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]

body:
Back to the matrix

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..xkMhVihrosUj8b_wMoUBxuUzCtzG5GakOFEM5pki4F0?) for more
---
# [Season 2 of pai's politics](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=111730&post_id=157706093&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3NzA2MDkzLCJpYXQiOjE3NDA0MTQ3NzksImV4cCI6MTc0MzAwNjc3OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMTczMCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.X6HpPFykfwvscM2UceS6_0VWySt8bGs37bj9S11P3_Q)
### Back to the matrix
| | [Aditya Pai](https://substack.com/@adityapai)
---
| Feb 24
---
| [](https://substack.com/@adityapai)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=111730&post_id=157706093&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3NzA2MDkzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0MDQxNDc3OSwiZXhwIjoxNzQzMDA2Nzc5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTExNzMwIiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.XTNyo7VuiaJ8oJos5Em4q_D6Nc2wJl1rSsRPaJePxnE&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=111730&post_id=157706093&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3NzA2MDkzLCJpYXQiOjE3NDA0MTQ3NzksImV4cCI6MTc0MzAwNjc3OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMTczMCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.X6HpPFykfwvscM2UceS6_0VWySt8bGs37bj9S11P3_Q&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=111730&post_id=157706093&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3NzA2MDkzLCJpYXQiOjE3NDA0MTQ3NzksImV4cCI6MTc0MzAwNjc3OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMTczMCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.X6HpPFykfwvscM2UceS6_0VWySt8bGs37bj9S11P3_Q)
---
| | [](https://substack..T9nsULbUPlahSYspxHib4bSW8Xs5m9LT8Or18JnGXbc?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/paipolitics/p/season-2-of-pais-politics?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I took 10 weeks off from politics and have been much happier and healthier as a consequence. I can't recommend a news vacation highly enough. But as I'm getting back to (un)reality, it's clear that _a lot_ has happened, a lot has been said -- and _so much_ of the discourse has the following qualities:
* mean
* asinine
* ahistorical
* factually incompetent
* legally illiterate
* hysterical
* psychotic
* shot through with partisan bias in both directions

So I'm sincerely happy to be back, but only [as happy as a pig in shit](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/80748328-731c-4092-989e-cf4e0dd78c40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
My approach to the toxic allure of Washington now is, simply, _awareness_.
I know politics is _crazy_.
But she's hot and I love her anyway.
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d4dc3092-6123-4bcb-8195-e23b20c5c10a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/842775eb-e5b2-4ccd-9b0f-8f5fb7e42784?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_Source_ : Tenor GIF
I hope to use this space, again, to think out loud and make sense of the nonsense. It is a great privilege to be able write things that people read, react to, and then learn from the interaction. I'm so very grateful for it.
I think I will enjoy politics even more now as _not a politican_. In 2023-2024, I lived a dream at 31 I've prepared for since I was 16: run for federal office. It was fun, exciting, brutal, exhausting, and exhilarating. Most of all, it was illuminating -- I saw a lot.
Among other things, I learned that politics is an art that requires:
* talking as much as possible while saying only what is absolutely necessary (discretion);
* hiding what is most important (secrecy);
* emphasizing what is most irrelevant (distraction);
* saying one thing while thinking another (dishonesty);
* doing one thing while being another (hypocrisy).

Making peace with all of this changes how you how process the news. It is the warm blanket of low expectations.
That is not to denigrate the character of practicing politicians. As I'll share soon, I think [Max Weber](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/383ce85b-4587-46d4-9eec-b3489469a504?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) was right when he wrote -- famously and controversially -- that politicians must follow an 'ethic of responsibility' unique to their craft and that the constraints of everyday, private morality are mostly inapplicable to public life. That classic question, 'can a good man be a good politician?', has no answer, and is really not even worth asking, because there is no coherent conception of The Good that connects private and public conduct.
This is not amorality, but a call for a specifically _political_ ethics. More on that later.
[The campaign](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/131981cc-6349-4566-9b93-ca909622ee3d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) gave me a chance to connect my personal experiences as an immigrant and my intellectual experiences in academia with the real, brass tacks business of hustling for money and votes. Mostly money. In that way, it forced me to grow up.
But being a politician wasn't a fit. Maybe my feeling will change in the future: I don't know. For now, the life of a retired politician suits me very well. I love politics. But rather than be a politician, I prefer to observe, analyze, and think about the world from my favorite perch, one I've enjoyed for 12 years:
**United States citizen.**
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e6b69970-ed5c-4caf-a929-be237a747038?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If you promise to read closely, I promise to write carefully. And I also hope to write well, be brief, and endeavor as much as possible to make every word sing.
--
This, again, is pai's politics.
* * *
_**Aditya Pai** is a 33-yr-old [trial attorney](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/210fbfa9-26bb-482b-b36e-7f2e78103b6e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), writer, and recent Democratic congressional candidate in Orange County, CA. He earned a B.A. Summa Cum Laude from Claremont McKenna College, where he served as student body president, and M.Phil. and J.D. degrees in history and law from Cambridge University and Harvard Law School, under the supervision of Nobel Laureate in Economics Amartya Sen. Pai is a naturalized American citizen from Bombay._

name: Devan
subject: Will you join my first focus group? -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi there,

I'm Devan, and I'm excited to introduce myself as the DSCC's new executive director -- ready to serve alongside Senator Schumer and our new Chair, Senator Kirsten Gillibrand, to take back the Senate majority.

Like starting any new job, the most important thing I can do _right now_ to lead this team to victory is to **listen.** And that means the most important thing YOU can do to help us is to join my first-ever focus group of committed grassroots Democrats and share your insights from on the ground.

**[So please, will you join my _first-ever_ focus group by taking this survey to help us lay the foundation and build a winning strategy? I'm ready to hear what Democrats think, so please get started as soon as you're able:](http://go.dscc.org/go/21034?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250224-Devan-NewEDFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250224-Devan-NewEDFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19634%2E9716520%2EtrhhQm)**

| | [Join my focus group](http://go.dscc.org/go/21034?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250224-Devan-NewEDFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250224-Devan-NewEDFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19634%2E9716520%2EtrhhQm)
---

I'm already hearing from the top experts in the Democratic Party, but I truly believe that's not enough -- and they'd tell you the same thing. I need to hear directly from grassroots supporters about what will define this election. **That's why I need _your_ help to shape the critical road ahead.**

I'm eagerly anticipating the first wave of responses to learn from your insights and gauge our party's motivation right out of the gate. I hope you won't wait any longer to respond.

**[Senator Gillibrand and I are ready to dig into your responses first thing tomorrow, so please, will you enter the focus group before midnight?](http://go.dscc.org/go/21034?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250224-Devan-NewEDFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250224-Devan-NewEDFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19634%2E9716520%2EtrhhQm)**

| [Enter focus group](http://go.dscc.org/go/21034?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250224-Devan-NewEDFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250224-Devan-NewEDFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19634%2E9716520%2EtrhhQm)
---

I'm looking forward to working with you,

Devan
DSCC Executive Director

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
| |

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2025-q1-recurring?refcode=DPE-footer&amount=5&recurring=1&t=1&refcode2=19634_9716520_trhhQm&akid=19634%2E9716520%2EtrhhQm)

The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. | | | Hey, Peter! Sorry to bother you, but this needs your immediate attention:

We were just reviewing the top 5% of our supporter's profiles in our Official GOP Leadership database, and we're shocked and disappointed to see that you haven't completed your **[Official Republican Voter Profile.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/IGRCxqbu195L9fkYj4R_T1uhsnB0JxZ14tLgXFdjms9reQW_5ZA2hHC_4WLn32erz76ZuT2A7AiLy4Gh5eZMvfF5EH6kYlTi0FRNVVoKJFKpL7u_M3dkRt5qOK1KCjNlCdhGSbqvOFsGE4UmlX15QglCw94chLK8QCF81Q0C5Ucm-Lozy7fJE8zsl7Y-PmcNd6hvvHJNi_VWDlLBHVKEwxVux6-Dx2nTO5k7vnEq-rQaHdVAyFvjFbP18TvbkONPlj-XTp1p3_8DH3ix2YObv4zEGos-VtIUMtFyiUb71LDI118cvSbR9CIddNB9A_U0NqFZUhwzJ7RPF_omEv0KzdYuaJJjCzKS9BQ541tXQHEjr6_5Ps4RdtkRm8HmlsZ1_Aevc53B5JLuH291nT8jMUeynLy39c9Cd2p8SvmszHEV8dC13tRpTFmtrcGD1AEcx4oJsq0ej1SWAj8Q3bVm7EV1mi6l2kkD4fnjH6iYDqy3A29HjoMH-Mzz4gtfDLk8Ake2F1DxZK_aVH-sJz49hftGe4sjD08zY5Jbu-PQY4hIaKl_s8A0fNHVlDI/L2--GiT2sDwrmJ0b3RhZIngvwx-Nd6J_/6 "Official Republican Voter Profile.")**

That is why as someone who has been a vital part of our grassroots movement, we expected more from you.

name: Water Filtration System
subject: China Attacks US Water Supply
body:
Chinese hackers are coming for the water supply in your hometown...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20439/6374453/358eb0b4af4b9cdf6da3cfba222e31b726b8da39/6df2637cb6b41bdf03de94d80981fdf1c0e7ee76)
---
| | |
---
_February 24th, 2025_
---
| | |
---
**SHOCKING REPORT:** **CHINA ATTACKS U.S. WATER SUPPLY**
---
---
**_FBI's Urgent Warning Has Been All Over The News_** Chinese hackers are coming for the water supply in your hometown. Attacking city water systems, biding their time and waiting for China's signal to strike. Experts warn that Russia and Iran are also targeting attacks on our city water systems. Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems that we trust to keep us safe. Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link. Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink. We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants. Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom... **But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever.** If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable. Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether. It sounds harsh... But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make serious mistakes. Mistakes like... **Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it.** If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water. **Getting bottled water with a 2-year shelf life and risking plastic leaching into your supply.** Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to carry cases of water. Plus with bottled water, you never really know what's been filtered out. **Or simply using a pitcher in the fridge... with slapshot filtration power and limited capacity.** Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time, just when your life depends on it. Well we have great news to share... Folks have been calling... Folks have been emailing... Folks have been leaving Facebook messages asking about our just-released... **NEW AND IMPROVED...** [**The Ultimate Water Filtration System!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20439/6374453/4764b1b12f48ded3c08aaeefef8a4ad6a5584227/6df2637cb6b41bdf03de94d80981fdf1c0e7ee76)
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20439/6374453/358eb0b4af4b9cdf6da3cfba222e31b726b8da39/6df2637cb6b41bdf03de94d80981fdf1c0e7ee76)
---
**But hurry – we have limited stock, and these Ultimate Water Filtration Systems are first-come first-served. We only have a small number of units to go around.** [**Get Your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20439/6374453/4764b1b12f48ded3c08aaeefef8a4ad6a5584227/6df2637cb6b41bdf03de94d80981fdf1c0e7ee76) The best part is... **_This advanced filtration technology filters the nastiest, filthiest, bacteria_**** _riddled and parasite infested water using no chemicals, no electricity and no moving parts!_** It's powered by the same technology that the U.S. Military and NASA trust to filter their water. But now available for you in your home. You're among the first to get access to these advanced, carbon-block water filters designed to filter water on your countertop at a sub-micron level without power or water hookup. **So you can reduce...** Harmful Bacteria – up to 99.9999%
Life-Threatening Viruses – up to 99.99%
Disease-Carrying Cysts – up to 99.9% Plus, this table-top unit targets 140+ dangerous contaminants from your tap water, including bacteria, viruses, toxic chemicals, arsenic, heavy metals, pharmaceuticals, VOCs and more. All in the same, best-selling system thousands of Americans trust in their homes. **The NEW & improved Filtration System may look the same...** But on the inside, these proprietary filters pack an even bigger punch than before. They're MORE reliable and easier to replace, too. So you get safer, cleaner water for you and your family. **But we have very limited stock, and we've been sold out of this filtration powerhouse for a while.** In fact, it's been a very long while. Months and months, actually. [**Now we've just got a fresh batch in.**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20439/6374453/4764b1b12f48ded3c08aaeefef8a4ad6a5584227/6df2637cb6b41bdf03de94d80981fdf1c0e7ee76) And if you need to take it with you? No problem. You're not tied to it like a whole-house filtration system. That kind of thing won't do you any good if you need to bug out. **And YES there's a payment plan!** Yes, right now, you can get your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems on a convenient, no-credit-check payment plan. We know you're good for it. You'll have the **peace of mind** knowing that you're doing everything you can to keep your family safer, by securing your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems today for fresher, cleaner water for years to come. [**Get Your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20439/6374453/4764b1b12f48ded3c08aaeefef8a4ad6a5584227/6df2637cb6b41bdf03de94d80981fdf1c0e7ee76) To your survival, Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Derrick loves the convenience of his Ultimate Water Filtration System: _"It was so easy to install. Within minutes we had water that tasted so good, we couldn't believe it. We don't like the chlorine in tap water and we got tired of lugging around cases of bottled water."_ **Customers Love Their Ultimate Water Filtration System!**
---
---
**Cyndi L.**
"No question... beats the competition. After reviewing several other companies and seeing that I was not the only one thinking this way, as everyone was sold out of products, I decided to go with 4Patriots. They seem to be good people who are very helpful and their products seemed above average to others." **Michael B.**
"Saves me a ton of money and grocery-store headaches. During the pandemic, water wasn't always available. Not so with the Purifier. We love it and I have 5 gallons of water on hand all the time." **Faith P.**
"Water you can actually trust. This is so much better than storing gallons and gallons of bottled water. This enables us to make existing, natural water sources drinkable. I feel really good knowing that in an emergency situation, we'd be able to filter our water." **Carol B.**
"Stop worrying about what's in the water! We use our system for drinking and cooking but you can use it almost anywhere. It's easy to use and it doesn't take long to filter. The water tastes pure and delicious." **Rick O.**
"Easiest way to upgrade your drinking water. We chose this one because it handles everything and it's affordable. You never know when things will go out on you." **Thomas P.**
"Finally, I don't have to keep refilling my pitcher all day. I'm very happy with my water filter. Not only does our water now taste good (it tasted dirty from the tap) but the large capacity tank means I'm not refilling small pitchers repeatedly during the day." [**Get Your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20439/6374453/4764b1b12f48ded3c08aaeefef8a4ad6a5584227/6df2637cb6b41bdf03de94d80981fdf1c0e7ee76)

clean_body: Only a few hours left to submit | Peter, is receiving this message because they have not completed our poll about Elon Musk’s proposed buyout of MSNBC! Here’s the problem, Peter: Trump gave Musk unrestricted access to American’s private data and the power to cut critical federal programs like Social Security. If Elon Musk buys MSNBC, he could build a right-wing media monopoly – giving him control of both the federal government and the media. We think an unelected billionaire shouldn’t have this much power in a democracy, but we need to hear from top Democrats like you: | ** We’re counting on you, Democracy On The Line FWD: \-------------------- FIRST - MSNBC’s recent sharp drop in ratings led Comcast to decide they may be forced to sell the network! THEN - Far-right billionaire Elon Musk threatened to purchase it!?! NOW - As Trump ally, Elon Musk, tries to build a media monopoly and buy out MSNBC, we need to know what informed Democrats like you think! **** | ******** ******** ******** Democracy On The Line | | Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001 Please, consider making a =. name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Donald Trump is not a king
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
Donald Trump just called himself a king.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102689913/529960279/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGFjMTcxNS1kM2YyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Cady0zqef76lc-nh4lg6i_QjUPZL86M-bX2Z_AY6ok=&emci=efac1715-d3f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=f8ac1715-d3f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=13185894) **_Donald Trump just called himself a king._** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102689914/529960280/1407896248?refcode=email_022425_king&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGFjMTcxNS1kM2YyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Cady0zqef76lc-nh4lg6i_QjUPZL86M-bX2Z_AY6ok=) Derek, we fought the British monarch in the revolution about this. And then we fought ‘em again in the War of 1812 (when the redcoats burned our White House!). Our nation was founded on the principle that presidents are in fact not kings, and they are not above the law.

Our founders didn’t just reject a monarchy—they pledged their lives, their fortunes, and their sacred honor to create a new kind of government of, by, and for the people. A government where no one—not even the most powerful—is above the law. They built a system of checks and balances to ensure no leader could ever seize absolute power.

Donald Trump swore an oath to the Constitution that laid out these principles. Calling himself a king is an insult to everything that our revolutionary founders, and millions of Americans in generations since, fought for.

I’ll be damned if I let Donald Trump rule this country like a king. We have a democracy, one that I took an oath to defend, both in uniform and in Congress, and I will give my all to keep that oath. But I need you in the fight with me. **[It’s on all of us to step up and protect our democracy, to defend the rule of law, and to make sure we don’t let one man take away America’s founding promise. If you’re with me in this fight, please make a donation to help me continue fighting for our democracy →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102689915/529960281/1407896248?refcode=email_022425_king&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGFjMTcxNS1kM2YyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Cady0zqef76lc-nh4lg6i_QjUPZL86M-bX2Z_AY6ok=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102689916/529960282/1407896248?refcode=email_022425_king&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGFjMTcxNS1kM2YyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Cady0zqef76lc-nh4lg6i_QjUPZL86M-bX2Z_AY6ok=)

You would think such a simple question wouldn’t be so controversial, but the Democrats and woke bureaucrats are currently MELTING DOWN over DOGE’s latest attempt to figure out what federal workers are actually doing all day on the taxpayer’s dime! As Elon Musk said, “This email is a very basic pulse check.” As President Trump said, “What he’s doing is saying, ‘Are you actually working?'... If people don’t respond, it’s very possible that there is no such person, or they aren’t working!” At the end of the day it’s a simple question! So today, we want to prove the whiners and complainers wrong by gathering responses from 5,000 MAGA patriots sharing what they accomplished last week. Your response will help stand with President Trump, Elon Musk, and the mission of DOGE, so we want to open it up to you: https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=c1cdc68a3e7e719e2e92bf7f8526d8bd5b9a79808f01bd805e63d7c3fa59e6e7482c2c159f24c4876c5fe2ac11c4bb83b7b8ebd5527244f8211f754c0a876f48 What are five things you accomplished last week? https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=c1cdc68a3e7e719e2e92bf7f8526d8bd5b9a79808f01bd805e63d7c3fa59e6e7482c2c159f24c4876c5fe2ac11c4bb83b7b8ebd5527244f8211f754c0a876f48 ACCESS HERE & RESPOND NOW By submitting your response, you’ll UNLOCK access to our brand-new DOGE merch! - Rapid Response DOGE Survey (via Team Marsha) Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8322%2E5257348%2E-meFKY)
Adam was sworn in last month to his first full term as a U.S. Senator, Derek.
And he’s _already_ hard at work delivering for the people of California.
Adam is ready to work with anyone — Democrat, Republican, or Independent — to lower costs for hard-working families, protect Californians from wildfires, increase the affordable housing supply, and so much more.
He’s ready to be a leader for ALL Californians. No matter where you live or who you vote for, every Californian deserves a champion for our great state in the Senate fighting for them and their rights.
**Adam is up for the challenge — but he’ll need your help along the way. That’s why we have an important step you can take _right now_ to support Adam for the long haul:**
**[Derek, click here to start a monthly recurring contribution to Adam’s campaign today. A recurring gift shows Adam that you’re with him through the fights ahead — for our planet, our freedoms, our democracy, and so much more.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/4598?c0=q12025_abs_em.ex7FJk&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250224_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8322%2E5257348%2E-meFKY)**

name: Eric Warmoth, Finance Director
subject: Within the first 100 days…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Hey there Friend,
Eric here, Lateefah’s finance director.
Since taking office, President Trump and his billionaire allies have been systematically dismantling our government to serve their own interests. Elon Musk, now a top advisor, has been instrumental in these efforts. Together, they've:
* Illegally downsized Federal Agencies through the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) by reducing the federal workforce and undermining essential services.
* Issued a funding freeze on essential federal grants and loans , sowing chaos throughout the government and disrupting access to critical federal grant programs.
* Cut federal funding to the National Institutes of Health , endangering life-saving biomedical research in California and across the country.
* Signed outright transphobic executive orders that ban transgender individuals from joining the military.
* Filled the Cabinet with billionaires . Key positions in the Treasury, Commerce, and the SEC are now occupied by individuals whose combined net worth exceeds $1 trillion, ensuring policies favor the ultra-rich.
And this is all within his first 100 days...
So, what’s our job, Friend? To defend our democracy the same way we ran this campaign: from the ground up.
Lateefah is ready to stand up for justice — and she’s already taking action. As the newly elected Vice Chair of the Progressive Caucus, she’s been hard at work, rallying with Federal workers who provide essential services to our communities, speaking out against Congressional Republicans’ devastating plans to cut Medicaid funding to pay for tax breaks for billionaires, and standing up for our rights.
But she needs us to stand hand-in-hand with her. Would you consider becoming a monthly donor to Lateefah’s campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_022425_monthly&recurring=1]
BECOME A MONTHLY DONOR [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_022425_monthly&recurring=1]
By setting up a recurring monthly donation of just $3, $5, or $10 today, you’ll help us ensure we’re always ready to take on whatever comes next. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_022425_monthly&amount=10&recurring=1]
Together, we can show extremists that our democracy isn’t for sale.
Thank you,
Eric, Lateefah’s Finance Director

Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s fighting this fight from the Capitol. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a proven champion.
To learn more about Lateefah, visit

body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39456%2E3422442%2EH7biqd)
Derek,
February is the shortest month of the year. With only 28 days, we have two or three fewer days to reach our fundraising goal for the month.
Since Truth to Power relies on grassroots donors chipping in what they can, having two fewer days to fundraise means we need your help today, Derek.
Our average donation this month is $16.67—and we’re proud of that number. **[Will you donate $16 or any amount that is meaningful to you to help us reach our $80,000 end-of-month fundraising goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250224-1?refcode=em20250224-39456&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39456_3422442_H7biqd&akid=39456%2E3422442%2EH7biqd)**

Truth to Power PAC supports Democrats running in competitive seats across the country. With your support, we can elect Democrats who will stand up to Trump in Washington and carry on Katie’s fights.
More soon,
Team Truth to Power

Former U.S. Congresswoman Katie Porter founded Truth to Power to support the campaigns of her fellow Democrats. Truth to Power supports candidates who will stand up to Donald Trump, fight to lower costs, and protect the environment. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20250224-39456&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39456_3422442_H7biqd&akid=39456%2E3422442%2EH7biqd)**

Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39456%2E3422442%2EH7biqd).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood is trying to turn our children against us
body:
First, we countered drag queens in libraries. Now our next battle needs you!| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=7444b52d57024a19ba2cfdb5b4a42968&_e=mZ7AShGshVnKNCx4OKzM0mZdnP7Es8vgi6cejR9_Gb_4kQeTvh-sXoK6aU5JiSWjmeOjTtGUYz2t_4NE3N56glu_w-aIEk3VHsL5cTefFKOf_1jgniwozXcpB2CtdjFakVk14TTwFEbAwXbC-QGfpkMJBIUlCoSkj0ExMVy5p09ltanzRjh5szV1kcXKqyNnJ-R-HQTk_cDLrnopkGEOkErdhQmYqdn75x_jf81wRpLn6m_gmrm9SNtglsBtEEFeutoHk9419yZcrh5-sHHQuyLEbiNDKqjIB4PKRfgG39gA02SCcviSih-TM5XIz3KFcLlfXATzzdvyBhe7PVx9TtgohHcL6zbabq7yhAgq-IQtEmxKlvxIimbqmkRSTb223JH5FM5FU6wJtJyZLlDZMg%3D%3D)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=7444b52d57024a19ba2cfdb5b4a42968&_e=mZ7AShGshVnKNCx4OKzM0mZdnP7Es8vgi6cejR9_Gb_4kQeTvh-sXoK6aU5JiSWjmeOjTtGUYz2t_4NE3N56glu_w-aIEk3VHsL5cTefFKOf_1jgniwozXcpB2CtdjFakVk14TTwFEbAwXbC-QGfpkMJBIUlCoSkj0ExMVy5p09ltanzRjh5szV1kcXKqyNnJ-R-HQTk_cDLrnopkGEOkErdhQmYqdn75x_jf81wRpKHuTWWw6ZaGnScZmJCfvNgT-o_GhUq6PdDOYo3W9hlmEj2OByW4pcq1BvSHPAOps5SsLvH9R3EuV9ML47QvPFIUjELnP-0olPvlJjSFDoUn78v52_HRLQGnlaZsp09ShnPs96ly-iXz1WQmKgAOanVNGhhc7LnBlEqzs64o4Nwsg%3D%3D)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=7444b52d57024a19ba2cfdb5b4a42968&_e=mZ7AShGshVnKNCx4OKzM0mZdnP7Es8vgi6cejR9_Gb_4kQeTvh-sXoK6aU5JiSWjmeOjTtGUYz2t_4NE3N56glu_w-aIEk3VHsL5cTefFKOf_1jgniwozXcpB2CtdjFakVk14TTwFEbAwXbC-QGfpkMJBIUlCoSkj0ExMVy5p09ltanzRjh5szV1kcXKqyNnJ-R-HQTk_cDLrnopkGEOkErdhQmYqdn75x_jf81wRpKYUj9PO4ew8TWv7ZvDd4AA5Y_OpIMy7i-caN8BJtPYrkdQBVPcmJbgU2fYn3juzeWiIkAZUfhQOzwyi7yEolX4zHfP2D_Z6_lM6huKw_hameV1OAA5u8h1BDsjAXaANVcoL_XQphRmC1if1AY42rrAQf3V1LTQ5NL5QeCbyXseCA%3D%3D) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=7444b52d57024a19ba2cfdb5b4a42968&_e=mZ7AShGshVnKNCx4OKzM0mZdnP7Es8vgi6cejR9_Gb_4kQeTvh-sXoK6aU5JiSWjmeOjTtGUYz2t_4NE3N56glu_w-aIEk3VHsL5cTefFKOf_1jgniwozXcpB2CtdjFakVk14TTwFEbAwXbC-QGfpkMJBIUlCoSkj0ExMVy5p09ltanzRjh5szV1kcXKqyNnJ-R-HQTk_cDLrnopkGEOkErdhQmYqdn75x_jf81wRpKDwi5Q10g2Dbklp_z2dxBfewVZC_Scj7YdFg1r09IiyVJkntGuZlj38erMX3yo2y64asO2IriwYYvFPaOp87DUe4c0G9s5_iRMT2Ml2ky7AkbxGP-7B9Sf_fZXTLVNYg6KfXw9RU-PNloNP_gvEkJWesM_uBSVriUDiH_FWIsF1A%3D%3D)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=7444b52d57024a19ba2cfdb5b4a42968&_e=mZ7AShGshVnKNCx4OKzM0mZdnP7Es8vgi6cejR9_Gb_4kQeTvh-sXoK6aU5JiSWjmeOjTtGUYz2t_4NE3N56glu_w-aIEk3VHsL5cTefFKOf_1jgniwozXcpB2CtdjFakVk14TTwFEbAwXbC-QGfpkMJBIUlCoSkj0ExMVy5p09ltanzRjh5szV1kcXKqyNnJ-R-HQTk_cDLrnopkGEOkErdhQmYqdn75x_jf81wRpIkErc1Tw0umzS0eqKBKJ65qxUMlDfEipfPd-rSsRZ5vxOmNNpnY6eitDh3o9RAHoVKhhqyXayX7shsg_vKg8DTboXwpxruQkzIAGok0qKPBxy9nr4D-rma1vKj-7GT6tqStjvwYmwOQGg5qU91VKe4e-sCuggwJUgMewnapVExNw%3D%3D)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
