name: Kirk Cameron
subject: First, we countered drag queens in libraries. Now our next battle needs you!
body:
You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a506261a02cd4e9fb56c1982a5da5ab4&_e=GVE-cXgT4Hn5u1cKlhHkEAimVr9oOtEphnyUkq_ETs4_sKWyHq9Zm4-5AgapQUsMn4H48ILaO6ObXrdP_6G5GuTyB99CYxLBNalvCf3VWp9N8u0J7zv-aLhrGFznckQq22QElrExCiHjo1Dn41YjEVxKQeSFQNfj5hFyaYf0KuVPjqtegWbLPJXuyz2WZsLjRDmJvyPd1WlqrlbkLeWCeS2c2Q_a1jx1P-JJRp940nUvw9JPQR_K105g52HyN-P7QwAcXMQkJreSxjx2EIF1bPvuFGVFE-UEKTi_HCPBUAyY43nVnhiev_IocbJGwsC-3fdrJi_WFIhk8u-kIeZpMVcltvX1vzSNfPZNdwyHyDclgFTZCu1KGV5DDvMmFAEa)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a506261a02cd4e9fb56c1982a5da5ab4&_e=GVE-cXgT4Hn5u1cKlhHkEAimVr9oOtEphnyUkq_ETs4_sKWyHq9Zm4-5AgapQUsMn4H48ILaO6ObXrdP_6G5GuTyB99CYxLBNalvCf3VWp9N8u0J7zv-aLhrGFznckQq22QElrExCiHjo1Dn41YjEVxKQeSFQNfj5hFyaYf0KuVPjqtegWbLPJXuyz2WZsLjRDmJvyPd1WlqrlbkLeWCeS2c2Q_a1jx1P-JJRp940nVue5YPF7L6bEtx10AcdKud6GTVl_Y6ckLQur4bcy9t22dIjuQoikgJeEN4hcv_GMNQM8J8H4sxasTBZqCtYQ_56z3zQwlakG34sJ_bIuGJ2tuXEerqGRWgkpq-LhxRSvuv8CCZdbIBr7TIKUtBg-iG)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a506261a02cd4e9fb56c1982a5da5ab4&_e=GVE-cXgT4Hn5u1cKlhHkEAimVr9oOtEphnyUkq_ETs4_sKWyHq9Zm4-5AgapQUsMn4H48ILaO6ObXrdP_6G5GuTyB99CYxLBNalvCf3VWp9N8u0J7zv-aLhrGFznckQq22QElrExCiHjo1Dn41YjEVxKQeSFQNfj5hFyaYf0KuVPjqtegWbLPJXuyz2WZsLjRDmJvyPd1WlqrlbkLeWCeS2c2Q_a1jx1P-JJRp940nU3DrgTHDKeX2rzObAnrINhN-q-d1Q5KsLLERbka2GbR5TaIiTE8cNIDxRyISn9eUrZPin3DaCyp_Te3UOyLY4dRR299yWUpji1G6FtTd6XdLxAfgJSBrDxNRpO83fsBLWJWGTQWrzsh5FeCjYaaLSf) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a506261a02cd4e9fb56c1982a5da5ab4&_e=GVE-cXgT4Hn5u1cKlhHkEAimVr9oOtEphnyUkq_ETs4_sKWyHq9Zm4-5AgapQUsMn4H48ILaO6ObXrdP_6G5GuTyB99CYxLBNalvCf3VWp9N8u0J7zv-aLhrGFznckQq22QElrExCiHjo1Dn41YjEVxKQeSFQNfj5hFyaYf0KuVPjqtegWbLPJXuyz2WZsLjRDmJvyPd1WlqrlbkLeWCeS2c2Q_a1jx1P-JJRp940nU-UhVvWKhVgKjCXmF24RQrhxBgrq08PzMn699A-vJbz6NPWP9FMFqMPXE0givbQfKsrb9QHDcMnk2qUn0KvJLJrAO0RmGDbVkT_eXr7gXfL0iW9hueFQ4o7tKaNKjEaf1ImCxJkRKuy_Bf8XoddvmO)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a506261a02cd4e9fb56c1982a5da5ab4&_e=GVE-cXgT4Hn5u1cKlhHkEAimVr9oOtEphnyUkq_ETs4_sKWyHq9Zm4-5AgapQUsMn4H48ILaO6ObXrdP_6G5GuTyB99CYxLBNalvCf3VWp9N8u0J7zv-aLhrGFznckQq22QElrExCiHjo1Dn41YjEVxKQeSFQNfj5hFyaYf0KuVPjqtegWbLPJXuyz2WZsLjRDmJvyPd1WlqrlbkLeWCeS2c2Q_a1jx1P-JJRp940nWnbezc8l5bdps1SmEkDEd_zOmmyMwyvSLJ3wVnJnopElGrAIj4VFuoo2NyxKYQVuPqdOQkhHM2Su7YB5m07EEehK07Qe9FgicpLwI2Z6Ugt4Kyes2RQbto4j-a2igB8VmAsOoL4TnwaLwVq0bNXrm9)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---

clean_body: You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. : Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you've seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television. >Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special "Thank You" for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. ...a picture we took on the day Chance received the Lifesaving Medal With Valor for rescuing a driver from a crashed car that had caught on fire. This photo used to be one of my favorites. Now looking at it makes me cry. Because in July, the same city that gave Chance this award... ...will try to lock him up for life for doing his job. I should explain. For nearly 13 years, Chance has been a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department. But in May of 2020, our lives were turned upside down. You probably remember what it was like in our country after George Floyd. Violent, fiery anti-police protests were sweeping through cities. Every step of the way, they were cheered on by radical politicians, Soros-funded prosecutors, and the Mainstream Media who lied to us and said, with a straight face, that these riots were "mostly peaceful." It was especially bad here in Austin, Texas. For three nights in a row, angry, anti-cop mobs rampaged through downtown, smashing windows, burning police cars, and looting stores. The crowd attacked officers like my husband who were trying to keep the peace, pelting them with rocks, bricks, and even lit fireworks. On the third night, things got even worse. Protestors shut down interstate, and a crazed mob surrounded Police Headquarters. Chance and his fellow officers knew that if they didn't restore order quickly, the headquarters, and maybe even the entire city, might burn to the ground. Following their training, they fired non-lethal weapons - the same "beanbag guns" that police have used for years to break up riots - to stop the violence before it got out of hand. The mob slunk off. And my husband made it home safe and sound. What I didn't know then was that this nightmare wasn't over for us. Far from it. Unknown to Chance and the other officers on duty that night, an anti-police protestor was hit by one of my husband's non-lethal rounds. They claimed they were injured and lost part of their finger. And for that... ...the county prosecutor charged my husband with "aggravated assault by a public servant" -- a charge punishable by life in prison. This is the upside-down world we live in now. A world where lawless thugs who fling rocks at police and try to burn our city to the ground get off scot-free... ...while law-abiding officers get criminal charges and face life in prison for following their training and breaking up a mob of rioters. What are cops like my husband supposed to do when faced with this kind of out-of-control violence?! When Chance told me about the charges, my emotions went from disbelief to anger to despair...and back again. But it all started to make sense when we learned that the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge on my husband. They don't care if my husband is innocent. They'll do everything in their power to make cops pay. It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But nearly 13 years ago, my husband did. And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year police veteran. My husband is a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band. He's served on mission trips -- planting churches, planning vacation Bible schools, and sharing the Gospel. And he's done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record. Chance put his life on the line to protect our city from a violent, unhinged mob... ...and life behind bars and could be his "reward." Even if my husband's good name is cleared there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills. Thankfully, by God's grace, there is one group who has stepped up to help us -- the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know that their record has made them a policemen's best friend. Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes -- like my husband. LELDF hires the best attorneys and secures expert witnesses who will testify to the truth -- without being influenced by political paybacks. And now they've agreed to help Chance. My friend, you've read my letter this far so I'm going to ask as boldly as I can: Will you help Chance, too? _**[Would you help by sending a one-time gift to LELDF so this amazing group can defend my husband and the other good police officers who have wrongly accused?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=62f9dce63eaf42ddabaff4532039f851&_e=EQ7j8bWCLSgfRcsaToCW1uxB3MjvWEeIUvYQ9_yqo9uo0uNYIAczr4Dc6NN1P8fmpYVd_MuRVuufVsTwNyeSdokngJZTp7e6DHX-2tz1ltGw5tk4ntCBax2RPxZscfg7BbA0YEm3o1mDGII7dND9Ya1Mzq7agQHLzuH4Cpl7N8Sf4nY0URk8uC6XbRugZOmflA88dKo3QcF1X2NdtvEz5g-yQKVfIWH-2NPudt6K1MGR9ueHkqwHMc_zTN06TVLhKlJhfp3jfw9pFNKuHNT14KmpznszeH7ghbG5qh3B67vnxqY3ySs2sdNzZfdsTMDSIEFh6i8ZuCz-fOx-UZAuHYtRcfJSygTkNtGKbwAJHCuVGhiO-u4gfYPzbhvzwwgT7ZH7KrwRksHsFKVhyG_95w%3D%3D)**_** ** You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. They rely entirely on the generosity of kind-hearted folks like you to defend the men and women in blue who defend us. _**[So with that in mind, please know that any contribution -- be it $35, $100, $500 or even $1,000 -- is tax-deductible.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=62f9dce63eaf42ddabaff4532039f851&_e=EQ7j8bWCLSgfRcsaToCW1uxB3MjvWEeIUvYQ9_yqo9uo0uNYIAczr4Dc6NN1P8fmpYVd_MuRVuufVsTwNyeSdokngJZTp7e6DHX-2tz1ltGw5tk4ntCBax2RPxZscfg7BbA0YEm3o1mDGII7dND9Ya1Mzq7agQHLzuH4Cpl7N8Sf4nY0URk8uC6XbRugZOmflA88dKo3QcF1X2NdtvEz5g-yQKVfIWH-2NPudt6K1MGR9ueHkqwHMc_zTN06TVLh3veMlLZsK5vvV90QZO923tefJMGYxEwnHjBCHiSrLhTPSnRVi67v5ePXkdgmjfkxs-vmzPIu7opsQ61SieiRXD13N1rA5jHc3zTtR31__bvT8KuAe9XcVOAd8fronKohUYG-5i68KlviElQ8ZMuNYQ%3D%3D)**_ But whatever you feel led to give, please send it back quickly. Chance's trial starts on July 7th. Our legal team needs to be working day and night getting ready for his defense. Because if Chance is found guilty... ...he'll spend every wedding anniversary, birthday, and Christmas for the rest of his life in prison. He won't be able to take our sons to football games or teach them how to drive... He won't be able to walk our daughter down the aisle somebody... I can't bear the thought of life without him. And I know what happens to former police officers when they get locked up with thousands of criminals. My only hope of saving him today is good-hearted patriots like you. _**[So please, my friend, rush back your gift right away if possible.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=62f9dce63eaf42ddabaff4532039f851&_e=EQ7j8bWCLSgfRcsaToCW1uxB3MjvWEeIUvYQ9_yqo9uo0uNYIAczr4Dc6NN1P8fmpYVd_MuRVuufVsTwNyeSdokngJZTp7e6DHX-2tz1ltGw5tk4ntCBax2RPxZscfg7BbA0YEm3o1mDGII7dND9Ya1Mzq7agQHLzuH4Cpl7N8Sf4nY0URk8uC6XbRugZOmflA88dKo3QcF1X2NdtvEz5g-yQKVfIWH-2NPudt6K1MGR9ueHkqwHMc_zTN06TVLhCMBi_8OtPo4PB8tY_4xVQEvxCXs6ov5El90pYZs1ghSzlVfs3eQRXXiRlvsPKKtkQD-14_vsIjvEYHJQNudz7YTGzJlsrLEmvWW0desfU8-cv92Rzgse7x8DfZCK1eiIdrHTR2mdLgazjfyYjMUtSA%3D%3D)**_ With this radical Soros-funded prosecutor on the warpath, _**[your gift of $35](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=62f9dce63eaf42ddabaff4532039f851&_e=EQ7j8bWCLSgfRcsaToCW1uxB3MjvWEeIUvYQ9_yqo9uo0uNYIAczr4Dc6NN1P8fmpYVd_MuRVuufVsTwNyeSdokngJZTp7e6DHX-2tz1ltGw5tk4ntCBax2RPxZscfg7BbA0YEm3o1mDGII7dND9Ya1Mzq7agQHLzuH4Cpl7N8Sf4nY0URk8uC6XbRugZOmflA88dKo3QcF1X2NdtvEz5g-yQKVfIWH-2NPudt6K1MGR9ueHkqwHMc_zTN06TVLhQ5xr6FaE5CfahFZLYxzauLgtrc60Pghr2CPLxm-O12lwD8ztJbrR3y2sFevTSOtcr1u-PjZxS_tKTZukwdB6_bcWiCXJSId_IHTzfg1H43CCl9OnkRIEHMwmnnW-xUbuR937_205TnF8bvsJWds3zg%3D%3D)**_ \-- or any amount -- could be the difference between Chance clearing his good name... ...and spending the rest of his life behind bars. Kimberly Bretches

name: Shelby County Republican Party
subject: Shelby County Republicans Building for the Future (20250224)
body:
Hello Shelby County Patriots,

We are living in historic times, aren’t we?

I hope you are encouraged by this chance we’ve been given to correct the trajectory of our nation.

The 2026 midterms are crucial for us to maintain our momentum through the end of President Trump’s second term. If we lose control of either House in 2026, President Trump’s ability to drain the swamp will be stalled and he will likely be impeached.

Counties like ours need to be fully engaged in these next two years, and we need to be building future generations of conservatives to serve in government and in all other walks of life. Your Shelby County Republican Party wants to help on both accounts.

Please come to your Lincoln Day Dinner this year and bring folks from the younger generations, High School and up. We will have a speaker from the Forge Leadership Network with exciting information on what they’re doing to produce the conservative leaders of the future. We would love to see young folks from Shelby County going through the Forge Leadership Network. Like Congressman Jim Jordan, our new Vice President from Ohio, J. D. Vance, is a big supporter of Forge: <https://www.youtube.com/shorts/UozxS06Kfeg>

The Lincoln Day Dinner also kicks off our preparations for Ohio’s 2026 elections. There are important elections before then that we will help prepare you for, but as we do that we must be preparing for the 2026 Primaries. We do not endorse in Primary Elections because you should be deciding which Republican you want to see on the General Election ballot.

Our job is not to tell you whom to vote for in the Primary, but to get every Republican contender for state-level office into Shelby County so you can hear from them and ask them questions before you go to the polls in the Primary on May 5, 2026. Our 2025 Lincoln Day Dinner starts that process. Our Attorney General and candidate for Governor, Dave Yost, will be our keynote speaker, and we expect other 2026 statewide candidates to be present that night. We will be scheduling other candidates throughout the year.

Please get your tickets now. And please consider buying extra tickets and bringing others, especially younger folks who can help us build for the future. Shelby County must be a leader in our state if conservatism is to survive and thrive in Ohio and beyond. Attached is the form to order tickets.

Cheers...Dan Cecil
(937) 206-2970
[cecilda.usaf@gmail.com](mailto:cecilda.usaf@gmail.com)

P.S. Our Trump/MAGA vendor will be set up at the Lincoln Day Dinner with the newest selection of gear for sale.

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Woke just means you give a damn.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
They want us quiet. We won’t be.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102701149/529993016/1328794144?refcode=ea.927f156d-e9f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.927f156d-e9f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkyN2YxNTZkLWU5ZjItZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=b1OjB-jTKC1WNTurdt9jyF2CC1er767EwZ0w7ayR1eo=&emci=9d3c2bed-dbf2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=927f156d-e9f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4823105)
---
Let’s set the record straight. When I took the stage last night to accept the SAG Life Achievement Award, I used my moment to speak about something bigger than Hollywood. I talked about workers’ rights. I talked about the strength of unions and community, and why we need more empathy — not less — in a world that’s trying to pull us apart. In Donald Trump’s view, empathy is a weakness. Caring about others is something to mock. It’s “woke.” Well, I made sure to remind everyone watching: **_Woke just means you give a damn about other people._** And predictably, the right-wing outrage machine is already losing its mind over it. Good. Let them. Because we’re not backing down. The truth is, if you care about the planet, about democracy, about your neighbors — you’re “woke” in their eyes. If you refuse to let billionaires like Elon Musk and corrupt politicians like Donald Trump strip away progress, you’re “woke.” If you’re willing to resist, they see you as “woke.” Trump and Musk are terrified of movements like ours — of people who won’t back down and refuse to let billionaires and authoritarians decide the future for the rest of us. That’s why they attack. That’s why they lash out. Because deep down, they know the truth: **We are powerful.** Every time we organize and protest, we prove that this country doesn’t belong to the few at the top. It belongs to all of us. But only if we’re willing to fight for it. I need you with me. clean_body: They want us quiet. We won’t be. | Let’s set the record straight. When I took the stage last night to accept the SAG Life Achievement Award, I used my moment to speak about something bigger than Hollywood. I talked about workers’ rights. I talked about the strength of unions and community, and why we need more empathy — not less — in a world that’s trying to pull us apart. In Donald Trump’s view, empathy is a weakness. Caring about others is something to mock. It’s “woke.” Well, I made sure to remind everyone watching: Woke just means you give a damn about other people. And predictably, the right-wing outrage machine is already losing its mind over it. Good. Let them. Because we’re not backing down. The truth is, if you care about the planet, about democracy, about your neighbors — you’re “woke” in their eyes. If you refuse to let billionaires like Elon Musk and corrupt politicians like Donald Trump strip away progress, you’re “woke.” If you’re willing to resist, they see you as “woke.” Trump and Musk are terrified of movements like ours — of people who won’t back down and refuse to let billionaires and authoritarians decide the future for the rest of us. That’s why they attack. That’s why they lash out. Because deep down, they know the truth: We are powerful. Every time we organize and protest, we prove that this country doesn’t belong to the few at the top. It belongs to all of us. But only if we’re willing to fight for it. I need you with me. If we’re going to keep up this fight — for our rights, our climate, and each other — we need all hands on deck. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Onward, xx Jane = P.S.I said what needed to be said last night. If you haven’t seen my full speech yet,. And if you have, share it. Let’s make sure they hear us. I meant every word. And I won’t apologize for it. | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

...a picture we took on the day Chance received the Lifesaving Medal With Valor for rescuing a driver from a crashed car that had caught on fire. This photo used to be one of my favorites. Now looking at it makes me cry. Because in July, the same city that gave Chance this award... ...will try to lock him up for life for doing his job. I should explain. For nearly 13 years, Chance has been a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department. But in May of 2020, our lives were turned upside down. You probably remember what it was like in our country after George Floyd. Violent, fiery anti-police protests were sweeping through cities. Every step of the way, they were cheered on by radical politicians, Soros-funded prosecutors, and the Mainstream Media who lied to us and said, with a straight face, that these riots were "mostly peaceful." It was especially bad here in Austin, Texas. For three nights in a row, angry, anti-cop mobs rampaged through downtown, smashing windows, burning police cars, and looting stores. The crowd attacked officers like my husband who were trying to keep the peace, pelting them with rocks, bricks, and even lit fireworks. On the third night, things got even worse. Protestors shut down interstate, and a crazed mob surrounded Police Headquarters. Chance and his fellow officers knew that if they didn't restore order quickly, the headquarters, and maybe even the entire city, might burn to the ground. Following their training, they fired non-lethal weapons – the same "beanbag guns" that police have used for years to break up riots – to stop the violence before it got out of hand. The mob slunk off. And my husband made it home safe and sound. What I didn’t know then was that this nightmare wasn't over for us. Far from it. Unknown to Chance and the other officers on duty that night, an anti-police protestor was hit by one of my husband's non-lethal rounds. They claimed they were injured and lost part of their finger. And for that... ...the county prosecutor charged my husband with "aggravated assault by a public servant" -- a charge punishable by life in prison. This is the upside-down world we live in now. A world where lawless thugs who fling rocks at police and try to burn our city to the ground get off scot-free... ...while law-abiding officers get criminal charges and face life in prison for following their training and breaking up a mob of rioters. What are cops like my husband supposed to do when faced with this kind of out-of-control violence?! When Chance told me about the charges, my emotions went from disbelief to anger to despair...and back again. But it all started to make sense when we learned that the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge on my husband. They don't care if my husband is innocent. They'll do everything in their power to make cops pay. It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But nearly 13 years ago, my husband did. And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year police veteran. My husband is a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band. He's served on mission trips -- planting churches, planning vacation Bible schools, and sharing the Gospel. And he's done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record. Chance put his life on the line to protect our city from a violent, unhinged mob... ...and life behind bars and could be his "reward." Even if my husband's good name is cleared there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills. Thankfully, by God's grace, there is one group who has stepped up to help us -- the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know that their record has made them a policemen's best friend. Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes -- like my husband. LELDF hires the best attorneys and secures expert witnesses who will testify to the truth -- without being influenced by political paybacks. And now they've agreed to help Chance. My friend, you've read my letter this far so I'm going to ask as boldly as I can: Will you help Chance, too? _**[Would you help by sending a one-time gift to LELDF so this amazing group can defend my husband and the other good police officers who have wrongly accused?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/M1JXFywDRYadvVGCMS8vPnKymmL1dV99Qcq1dTWR5udfjA0cDMOIXYFGQn6baohLvPHg0-orJKulzfXnA6ozW2BDaju4pWmJYuJgLTsEelNc8_1uCyuTbAZDb7sMjvyaOdN6S0sxnf43JhKtgpOcYmTX9wd2aY5O647CPkPwRNkRAYlkWeUzxLoQh1zUJ6pPAN4Q7aaKXXOjkWnNCDynD0M9vQyLdFH_AfXWTxjLg4bmQ_12kzSGF2EaR1cIiGGfvnusEtBtlNvN6G79FIZ11Rt-1fvIHi8UOGXkP9BWG_DURJJtQbVTgpDbC64nbthij89MnmeyDbg0TJVtuCBJgSCbAcedtJsliVtjLQf0Zdsq_EGpRkqgJuPJbX0vq2r2Xj4UjUexR_gpcHOsV5Zx9B6AlD75wQOU42rRiF5N9QfdTAo0BiFbH68sjSLwt0E_w6qUEh4p7DU/VXw7N34iUDU_lXoskhyNeuQwOVZcJOBz/6)**_** ** You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. name: America First Legal
subject: Legal Action on Birthright Citizenship
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1l9xb5hi2iwf4lo03q457eovdi10mktuqjjlg9qz8mfzb51xm8vpw9oauhy1c2b98hh9ptap2zy8vf1rg58&__stmp=ss7fmg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss7fmg&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6de6t0rknwpm9ur5a9bjo1gte73qd2rmb3hgrj2ni0viessesfzm5s4e5gagmt1dl240buy841yb25pe3drraot3q6s7lx9ng95sqii3ef3djiwoslikouu7e3ekse5qsmtk6jhwzb2ody9atty58&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss7fmg&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss7fmg&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss7fmg&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss7fmg&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6de6t0rknwpm9ur5a9bjo1gth2cq3q0zyk1fpabiw5frd061mqrs8irkxmi756s0eo8sear7z38lk0td1kbopoyu448hqju42m664udet0i85a4ynfveohz46mca7vkldkq9drgrh7fe4zur01zjy&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss7fmg&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss7fmg&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

subject: What we can do to push back

body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102703611/530000763/-1839819742?refcode=lee_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTkwZDY5Ny1lZWYyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pnjG4cwswLCZ0f_Hsfo6-HG5rKaZZ1qGEiDk5vPo4TM=)

| | Friend, I know you're frustrated. I hear it in every conversation I have—with neighbors, community leaders, and people like you who care deeply about our country. The current administration's policies are not just political maneuvers; they represent significant challenges to our fundamental rights and freedoms. But here’s the good news: we don’t have to sit back and watch it happen. We can fight back—together. **[If President Trump’s actions have hurt you, your family, or your community, will you take a moment to share your story with me? name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Drag queen pride parades on Blue’s Clues are unacceptable
body:
| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8c19d9aa86a245b2879bf18523b4ef02&_e=ig9XZkUvWcWtF1s7YMeARLkvPNg_NDFpaao7yQYW7BKjmeYZ9__G9Bb6NRkuUQdKNrlpB2JjJUN3pQ5N70a2BGFZO4IfMIbSSgnt75UcITF-WsquJ9Vb4GVrFXpma8GnwiM8w3EBrDZLMB1EfWyD1CN13mMZ820WzMsPESXWwl5OtBCjbzeFqCKZSV5Zk-NQpdasZrZ8hB0Hy9VZLKc3bhCzrRWhJXjC5Ywe8Q8njym31DdukWepUJwyQSO8ot25XU-KNx86_S7nQodzL_34euH32GaUgXAukSTxTsTpZjvNynvZKWFg21uGDbXnorHVe0MEYk2-_2hQrNhGY38uoj-VvBXSPaBjBfvJR-YK7_Ul4U7Yxs2b9cNwTWNWGYpo)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8c19d9aa86a245b2879bf18523b4ef02&_e=ig9XZkUvWcWtF1s7YMeARLkvPNg_NDFpaao7yQYW7BKjmeYZ9__G9Bb6NRkuUQdKNrlpB2JjJUN3pQ5N70a2BGFZO4IfMIbSSgnt75UcITF-WsquJ9Vb4GVrFXpma8GnwiM8w3EBrDZLMB1EfWyD1CN13mMZ820WzMsPESXWwl5OtBCjbzeFqCKZSV5Zk-NQpdasZrZ8hB0Hy9VZLKc3bhCzrRWhJXjC5Ywe8Q8njynAdiGoEQL4-PTGb8LGjvVS92QTqYojI0SK3Vdv_leNaYB9TVZcT1-wHuLq7MVzXl7mzNX_NK9dQbLUZG3c242Maw6RNLtsnx4lZQr6hvYVkK5dNaG36vwGHyiWvpqaZfLf1C0QfXwUC9UFAF0HnqW9)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8c19d9aa86a245b2879bf18523b4ef02&_e=ig9XZkUvWcWtF1s7YMeARLkvPNg_NDFpaao7yQYW7BKjmeYZ9__G9Bb6NRkuUQdKNrlpB2JjJUN3pQ5N70a2BGFZO4IfMIbSSgnt75UcITF-WsquJ9Vb4GVrFXpma8GnwiM8w3EBrDZLMB1EfWyD1CN13mMZ820WzMsPESXWwl5OtBCjbzeFqCKZSV5Zk-NQpdasZrZ8hB0Hy9VZLKc3bhCzrRWhJXjC5Ywe8Q8njymD2zp1oMbeanL_iXJDzkCdqX1D9xeaS4qMmQyRELkJzV4WSRi2X6OJW07Uf50ypGbivX8mFsi_9GwN-pViscyDqANhsRZIhvaduKKxHJljNiZ4pxW-Xi-Gmh5ujSZAZOkIlI_TciZtlyeb7ZH6-bgG) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8c19d9aa86a245b2879bf18523b4ef02&_e=ig9XZkUvWcWtF1s7YMeARLkvPNg_NDFpaao7yQYW7BKjmeYZ9__G9Bb6NRkuUQdKNrlpB2JjJUN3pQ5N70a2BGFZO4IfMIbSSgnt75UcITF-WsquJ9Vb4GVrFXpma8GnwiM8w3EBrDZLMB1EfWyD1CN13mMZ820WzMsPESXWwl5OtBCjbzeFqCKZSV5Zk-NQpdasZrZ8hB0Hy9VZLKc3bhCzrRWhJXjC5Ywe8Q8njynVC2v1wnrtCiEk8GO4LL1q55hcK943Plfp1TYDaYzh1Cgy2vBqPZsViEqSq2JDvhfW9OTpDaVhQSK-BYCegJ1GqPlVm1WeNOG5dXJqxLchGN3DA9TUulRrZ5jUriAQEazeDNSkdQPRKG5OLrlNUgQJ)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8c19d9aa86a245b2879bf18523b4ef02&_e=ig9XZkUvWcWtF1s7YMeARLkvPNg_NDFpaao7yQYW7BKjmeYZ9__G9Bb6NRkuUQdKNrlpB2JjJUN3pQ5N70a2BGFZO4IfMIbSSgnt75UcITF-WsquJ9Vb4GVrFXpma8GnwiM8w3EBrDZLMB1EfWyD1CN13mMZ820WzMsPESXWwl5OtBCjbzeFqCKZSV5Zk-NQpdasZrZ8hB0Hy9VZLKc3bhCzrRWhJXjC5Ywe8Q8njymivBaxF5jVjpiSCHN51ZKlJBcCmRyYTGVIbVcRGXt2f0qXoskxaUI4-pI9VtOKl2qAFwLHLBI6f9RMwPEIk1vKuaWxxak6Dpj5cXX6yhozoxDaW8vrjcLLxPlMhVbGTtdwchJOYx5sS9DfB1oZ3VIu)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father

But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. : Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you've seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television. >Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. And the left will try to bury Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: The Week Ahead, Monday February 24th
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

The challenges ahead and the actions we can take to make a difference:

Holding Congress accountable
Right now, Republicans in Congress only fear Donald Trump. It’s why
they’re mum on his attempt to rewrite the history of Russia’s invasion of
Ukraine, the illegal quid pro quo that suspends NYC Mayor Eric Adam’s
corruption charges in return for his obeisance to Trump’s agenda and the
evisceration of Congressionally mandated federal agencies (among many
other illegal, corrupt and cowardly actions from this administration). At
the same time, many Congressional Democrats still show a lack of urgency
and coherence in the face of the greatest set of challenges we have ever
seen.

We want Republicans to fear their constituents more than Trump; and we
want Democrats to work with us to meet the moment with the intensity it
demands.

The best way to do that is to join our representatives and senators face
to face in open, public town hall meetings.

Call your representative and senator and demand that they hold a live,
in-person town hall (telephone town halls and tweeting don’t count!). The
pressure works. The capitol switchboard is: 202-224-3121

Stopping Abbott
As the Texas school voucher fight comes into the final rounds, Governor
Greg Abbott is swinging wildly, flustered and out of control.

After slipping and admitting that vouchers will cause public schools to
lose even more funding — and thereby exacerbate the outfight of teachers
and make it more likely that school districts will raise property taxes —
he is trying to silence critics from both the left and right.

[1]Houston Chronicle[2]Texas Gov. Greg Abbott says vouchers could lead to
less funding for public schools

In fact, much of the criticism for his voucher scheme comes from
conservative Republicans, especially those in rural counties (more than
150 Texas counties have no private school that would benefit from his
plan).

Then on Friday State Rep. James Talarico challenged Abbott to debate
school vouchers in an open forum for all the public to see. We haven’t
heard a word from the governor since then.

Two things you can do:

1. If you’re on Twitter, amplify Talarico’s challenge to Abbott by
sharing his tweet. Let’s push him into a corner where he either
confirms his cowardice or accepts the offer to debate.
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/64236?t=1001&akid=239990%2E444211%2E_igBxp ]x.com/jamestalarico/status/1892779832993276398
2. Call your State Representative and tell them to vote NO on vouchers:
512-463-4630

Volunteer on the ground with us
Sign up to become a Powered By People volunteer if you haven’t already. We
believe in person-to-person organizing — meaning, showing up where young
and low-propensity voters are. It’s not too soon to begin the work for the
2026, 2028 or 2030 elections. In fact, it is absolutely necessary that we
start now.

Here is the link: [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1002&akid=239990%2E444211%2E_igBxp ]poweredxpeople.org

Remember, action is the key to victory and the antidote to despair.

Have a great week,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=239990%2E444211%2E_igBxp

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Tom Jones
subject: The Left is PANICKING—Now is the Time to CRUSH Them
body:
| | | | Friend,
The radical Left is **on the ropes.** They see the momentum shifting, and they’re lashing out in **pure desperation.**
They just **unleashed a full-scale, coordinated media assault** against AAF because we are **winning.**
* **NBC admits our work has "stunned democracy experts" and "shocked the civil service community."**
* **CNN is panicked that we’re exposing “top officials at federal agencies” working to sabotage a conservative administration.**
* **The New York Times is scrambling to protect the bureaucrats we’ve uncovered.**

And now, The Guardian just dropped an **unhinged, race-baiting hit piece** attacking us for **exposing federal employees who are pushing DEI radicalism in government.**
They’re calling us **McCarthyites.** They’re crying about a “right-wing watchlist.” They’re openly **terrified** that we’re holding **unelected, leftist bureaucrats accountable.**
They are **hysterical.** They are **panicked.** And they are **lashing out** because we are hitting them **where it hurts.**
**NOW IS THE TIME TO STRIKE.**
This is the moment to **go on offense** and push harder—**to turn their fear into our victory.**
But we can’t do it alone.
* **Their wealthy elitist donors are funneling millions to shut us down.**
* **Their media lapdogs are working overtime to smear us.**
* **The Deep State is circling the wagons to protect their own.**

This **isn’t just a fight.** **It’s a war for America's future.**
And you have a choice:
1. **Stand with us and crush their radical agenda.**
2. **Sit on the sidelines while they dismantle America.**

**Who is AAF?**
We are the premier conservative investigative organization exposing the radical left’s corruption, cronyism, and subversion within our institutions. We take the fight directly to unelected bureaucrats, corporate elites, and activist networks that are working to undermine American values.
Unlike the establishment, AAF doesn’t just talk—we act. Our investigations have derailed radical nominees, forced policy reversals on ESG, DEI, and corporate wokeness, and exposed deep-state operatives sabotaging conservative policies from within.
The left fears us because we’re effective. The media attacks us because we expose the truth. The Deep State is scrambling because we refuse to back down.
AAF is **winning battles** the establishment won’t even fight.
**Your partnership makes a critical difference in the lives of all Americans.**
**Donate now to keep AAF in the fight.** Every dollar fuels the battle for truth.
---
| | [Give Now](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)
---
| | They **want you silent.** They **want you afraid.**
**Don’t let them win.**
Stand with AAF today and ensure the truth comes to light.

In the fight,
---

Tom Jones, President American Accountability Foundation
| |

| | P.S. Thank you for standing with us.

| | Friends,

Team Dunn here - we need to be honest: we've got a huge fundraising deadline coming up at the end of the month and we are still short of our February fundraising goal.
**[DONATE NOW!](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=6d55d509ae&e=77eef70c61)**
Here are three numbers we thought you should be aware of:
* **$1,247** - the amount of money Reagan needs to raise this week to meet our February fundraising goal. The ability to stay on track financially during the early months of this campaign will make all the difference when the race heats up. Please consider [donating today](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=657b0cbbcf&e=77eef70c61) \- Reagan needs your early support!
* **300,000** - nearly the number of constituents in Council District 9. It takes resources to reach so many people, and every dollar you contribute helps our campaign reach undecided voters!
* **125** - the number of supporters Reagan needs to contribute just $10 to meet this critical end-of-month goal. Even a small contribution will allow us to send a message when the latest fundraising numbers are made public.

**[DONATE NOW!](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=45f2bcfc25&e=77eef70c61)**
Friends, early support for a campaign can make a HUGE impact on the ability to reach voters. Would you consider helping Reagan meet his end-of-month fundraising goal by contributing $50, $25, or even $10? [Make a secure online contribution now!](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=318033acfa&e=77eef70c61)

Thank you for your support!
Team Dunn

name: Breakup Notice
subject: It's not you… It's your membership.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Our efforts are diminished, and our progress is stalled.
Now’s your chance to reactivate, Friend.
|
---
| | |
Friend...

I'm not sure how to say this...

But I think it's time for us to face the truth...

**Your membership has expired, and now I 'm lost.** We had some great times, standing our House GOP Majority. _**But now, it seems like you've moved on.**_

---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c9fc73474ae84d21851813658630aa41&_e=5trn4at6zvc_SBEY3dQgQa82dgri02imhB_iJRxl5e-7zJNzLjEkEb7fAikZuaolnpBUY5k43kotqfJ8KzuqNc-jvxbgsCzG8MQV1AqrXoOQpXXAzp2zgugR4lcphdnm2osmVoUx5Ln_n3yZmZ5vB9sNSGmHFnfyBNRn6etlRRd46hg2cVI_ho9dl5KWN2YiCMcyhX5c9xSTFtCvgTMURGSN4kcfDYw4qwNiuXtEOshGf2RmmFE7Pud7xiL4IiBHykOg5KePcziG7bkx25DOFQOrqPaaU47k0KQ0kxuITrr2qEZtOxu1dT8Lq4EBPlh080U7yYgiwFrJHkSEOnsKtANPUoPL5Gk2XgUDFnf_llFojLTpI5HG_HWw1vXexpo50pKYn7QBC5O6gk5VwxW5fg%3D%3D)
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c9fc73474ae84d21851813658630aa41&_e=5trn4at6zvc_SBEY3dQgQa82dgri02imhB_iJRxl5e-7zJNzLjEkEb7fAikZuaolnpBUY5k43kotqfJ8KzuqNc-jvxbgsCzG8MQV1AqrXoOQpXXAzp2zgugR4lcphdnm2osmVoUx5Ln_n3yZmZ5vB9sNSGmHFnfyBNRn6etlRRd46hg2cVI_ho9dl5KWN2YiCMcyhX5c9xSTFtCvgTMURGSN4kcfDYw4qwNiuXtEOshGf2RmmFE7Pud7xiL4IiBHsveNmCXsSrMiBAjj3BfB1KGRO4Q9t3Zmp6B9rfWScV_NABXaOlyPrRXKuWt5ctBSmvNYWPjTQoPNGijejwFrrUz3HMvBPGq5uKWenIZRm3UWiwi2DeOevNVPFS5Xrju7_scJGUPdcu8-_R6m5EUnuQ%3D%3D "Generic Button")
---

I remember the good times when you were a crucial part of our team. Your support meant everything to us, and we were unstoppable together. **But now, everything is at risk. **

---
| | | [STAND WITH HOUSE GOP](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c9fc73474ae84d21851813658630aa41&_e=5trn4at6zvc_SBEY3dQgQa82dgri02imhB_iJRxl5e-7zJNzLjEkEb7fAikZuaolnpBUY5k43kotqfJ8KzuqNc-jvxbgsCzG8MQV1AqrXoOQpXXAzp2zgugR4lcphdnm2osmVoUx5Ln_n3yZmZ5vB9sNSGmHFnfyBNRn6etlRRd46hg2cVI_ho9dl5KWN2YiCMcyhX5c9xSTFtCvgTMURGSN4kcfDYw4qwNiuXtEOshGf2RmmFE7Pud7xiL4IiBH_ZxiBPcrJv98GqMzxDh8Cpt2DmBrPIQXi-YMhhWE7fdmiorSmx9jquDTRZBTQp3RVbpfI4Yyh1XYg1wKT1PwqoHMhUkojPNAAyHU1ub9IcVJ-APlCQfwk0TFaDsx1ZPT-JtbM00ZaY9ihcdOGHVjZw%3D%3D "Generic Button")
---

Look, I'm not here to beg you to come back. _**But I want you to know that we're not the same without you**_. Our efforts are diminished, and our progress is stalled.

---

clean_body: Our efforts are diminished, and our progress is stalled. Now’s your chance to reactivate, Friend. | | | | Friend... I'm not sure how to say this... But I think it's time for us to face the truth... Your membership has expired, and now I 'm lost. We had some great times, standing our House GOP Majority. But now, it seems like you've moved on. | | | | "Generic Button" I remember the good times when you were a crucial part of our team. Your support meant everything to us, and we were unstoppable together. But now, everything is at risk. | | | "Generic Button" Look, I'm not here to beg you to come back. But I want you to know that we're not the same without you. Our efforts are diminished, and our progress is stalled. | | | | "Generic Button" "If you're willing to try again, I'm here to give it another shot. Renew your membership, and let's see if we can rekindle what we once had. name: NDRC
subject: Don’t let the Elon Musk-funded PAC flip the Wisconsin Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We need every member of this grassroots team to step up now.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102704743/530004540/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0NGI1YjVkLWYyZjItZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=L3WBx4Dr1a_M1vloDX_6RL-3hNp_2mpHqnCzA5UVtBY=&emci=d9574325-cef2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=c44b5b5d-f2f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter — Now that Elon Musk has endorsed right-wing candidate Brad Schimel for the Wisconsin Supreme Court, a PAC not-so-secretly funded by the billionaire is spending big to try to elect Schimel and flip control of the court to the conservatives:
## _**Politico**_ : “A group with ties to Elon Musk is pouring more than $1 million into Wisconsin’s upcoming Supreme Court race — a sign that even as Musk races to overhaul Washington, his influence extends beyond it.”
**We’ve endorsed Schimel’s opponent, Judge Susan Crawford, as one of our Democracy Defenders. And we need every member of this grassroots team to step up now, while there’s still time to make an impact on this bellwether race and elections across the country.** [**Rush a $30 donation today to help elect Democracy Defenders like Judge Crawford and power the NDRC’s democracy-saving work nationwide.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102704744/530004541/-1665762292?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ElonFRWisconsinLiftnote_email_20250224-NDRC-Tier1-ElonFRWisconsinLiftnote-NOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250224-NDRC-Tier1-ElonFRWisconsinLiftnote-NOR_&utm_campaign=ElonFRWisconsinLiftnote&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0NGI1YjVkLWYyZjItZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=L3WBx4Dr1a_M1vloDX_6RL-3hNp_2mpHqnCzA5UVtBY=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Peter, Elon Musk recently weighed in on the race that will decide control of the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
Musk took time away from his furious attempts to dismantle the federal government to throw his support behind conservative candidate Brad Schimel while spouting outlandish claims of voter fraud.
The NDRC is proud to have endorsed Judge Susan Crawford in this race — Musk’s endorsement of her opponent, and his reliance on anti-democratic claims of voter fraud, only reinforce that decision.
Here’s why this development is concerning: **There’s already so much money pouring into this race — now, the richest man in the world is getting involved to try to secure a majority for conservatives on Wisconsin’s highest court. **
The work we do together over the next 46 days just got so much more important.

The stakes of this race are sky-high, but we know how to win in the Badger State. In 2023, our grassroots movement helped deliver a resounding win for democracy in Wisconsin’s state supreme court race. Voters elected now-Justice Janet Protasiewicz by a double-digit margin, making it clear that they’ve had enough of conservatives’ anti-democratic power grabs.
_The New York Times_ is predicting this year’s race will be “a pitched political battle” — one that “is likely to be even more partisan, negative and expensive than the 2023 election, whose $56 million price tag shattered national spending records for a judicial contest.”
**With a billionaire like Musk wading into races like this one, we can’t risk getting blown out of the water in spending. We’re counting on every member of this grassroots team to step up if you can. **

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: here’s the kicker
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress

| Peter,

After just a few weeks in office, Donald Trump has made it clear that his priorities lie with billionaires and corporations over the American people. His administration's reckless funding freeze targets critical programs that millions of Americans rely on.

While the cost of living across the country continues to rise, Trump is trying to shrink the government and cut federal spending to pay for tax cuts for his ultra-wealthy buddies.

**Emerge alums across the country are stepping up to defend these critical programs! In Massachusetts** , Emerge alum Attorney General Andrea Campbell is joining more than 20 attorneys general across the country to stop the Trump Administration from dismantling the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau.

His administration's reckless funding freeze targets critical programs that millions of Americans rely on. While the cost of living across the country continues to rise, Trump is trying to shrink the government and cut federal spending to pay for tax cuts for his ultra-wealthy buddies. Emerge alums across the country are stepping up to defend these critical programs! In Massachusetts , Emerge alum Attorney General Andrea Campbell is joining more than 20 attorneys general across the country to stop the Trump Administration from dismantling the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau. = | = More than 1,200 Emerge alums currently serving in office across the country are fighting back to lower rising costs for hard-working families, make housing more affordable, defend Medicaid funding, and so much more. That’s the power of electing Emerge women! Emerge is ready to take on Trump every step of the way so we can hold him and his allies accountable | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Emerge HQ * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 4 Embarcadero Center Suite 1400 San Francisco, CA 94111 United States

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: First, we countered drag queens in libraries. Now our next battle needs you!
body:
You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=452d77a0aa434c188263369646659026&_e=WpVGuxUOgMfl4cVV8shJ6FKuYm-1wjRRfoeJmW1j19vhQr7GLDwChpHblSQP4oPU1L1hfcwKTKkrSCkthVcdCP6mSUXjmaLmboofFNoJ-Yh4yLkliXUxV6TmbS_hu8bpFdVntRO9hWU1pyJzxn4-9Xqbo_BjZwgych_GJJMIAjIk6QqFqOhlD0PPtgwYmmMvEA94mg_2Bh2iYmG8_CiB38s8aVDZgmgAUawzOoKCOrJL2HOPxxwDTmIBLVFXO8td9SDCcKLSl_f6hK6EX5uAAznmMT0tsJCbjMvigad4HLTmFhPgbJOm9BLWAJSEDA7WTvIgP-dn2H0qvantnUFd87Cu0d34On1SKIT9-C1S2rt1CpJtdGzzh7qxqAjuXufg)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=452d77a0aa434c188263369646659026&_e=WpVGuxUOgMfl4cVV8shJ6FKuYm-1wjRRfoeJmW1j19vhQr7GLDwChpHblSQP4oPU1L1hfcwKTKkrSCkthVcdCP6mSUXjmaLmboofFNoJ-Yh4yLkliXUxV6TmbS_hu8bpFdVntRO9hWU1pyJzxn4-9Xqbo_BjZwgych_GJJMIAjIk6QqFqOhlD0PPtgwYmmMvEA94mg_2Bh2iYmG8_CiB38s8aVDZgmgAUawzOoKCOrLKmfKGQmlMDpYfKTux0CYTq11qn4ZBsYD8YFaSyGnKAaOfcT5NexRy1Fze6mZkZm4zuhpEjxglXdKIaTPybVIr4iibvbTidOh3pz3iEQiHoYlME76RyJEDWACSqgiaQpeSiAHNOUHV7YBW3iV1qi2Q)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=452d77a0aa434c188263369646659026&_e=WpVGuxUOgMfl4cVV8shJ6FKuYm-1wjRRfoeJmW1j19vhQr7GLDwChpHblSQP4oPU1L1hfcwKTKkrSCkthVcdCP6mSUXjmaLmboofFNoJ-Yh4yLkliXUxV6TmbS_hu8bpFdVntRO9hWU1pyJzxn4-9Xqbo_BjZwgych_GJJMIAjIk6QqFqOhlD0PPtgwYmmMvEA94mg_2Bh2iYmG8_CiB38s8aVDZgmgAUawzOoKCOrL6BJfPrD4BU5NQ7g5oa4GeIUuh6hcDcpPi_j3WYRpUwWtGVA8dRUVj9OEwTNYYdxImncJqGON6rYAew01iTy7wOgGAIa2K_QoI2JBeSGGDO-IQQ0lhbqUVKz7XcN_IntHfU0Q66iYZLvmX3bfckU3M) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=452d77a0aa434c188263369646659026&_e=WpVGuxUOgMfl4cVV8shJ6FKuYm-1wjRRfoeJmW1j19vhQr7GLDwChpHblSQP4oPU1L1hfcwKTKkrSCkthVcdCP6mSUXjmaLmboofFNoJ-Yh4yLkliXUxV6TmbS_hu8bpFdVntRO9hWU1pyJzxn4-9Xqbo_BjZwgych_GJJMIAjIk6QqFqOhlD0PPtgwYmmMvEA94mg_2Bh2iYmG8_CiB38s8aVDZgmgAUawzOoKCOrKouk80TKHXsB2E7CAW0kL-83tYfsfgMwRhS8hEIWbYKXQFFnHtEc_c0EKzob_PMGxWgya66uzqFpmb0tatIsFgzwtr-BvaJCOYTA8fjrqW6HdlKKm53DAtrWyJCYu4f9YG4uXZUP4PV6NXNrIk7cRh)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=452d77a0aa434c188263369646659026&_e=WpVGuxUOgMfl4cVV8shJ6FKuYm-1wjRRfoeJmW1j19vhQr7GLDwChpHblSQP4oPU1L1hfcwKTKkrSCkthVcdCP6mSUXjmaLmboofFNoJ-Yh4yLkliXUxV6TmbS_hu8bpFdVntRO9hWU1pyJzxn4-9Xqbo_BjZwgych_GJJMIAjIk6QqFqOhlD0PPtgwYmmMvEA94mg_2Bh2iYmG8_CiB38s8aVDZgmgAUawzOoKCOrIOz-DtPXAjnSVwK8PCyFnAKfqBq0zsktwPzRu-zfzZ2SKN92Yf_PICSg1lxpqUCZyse7oYfyMYknFR99_BWraU_bds_SA5YdUPrNiZGcYGtX68LhECL-0nqali6QVDdgmU-67IG8Mp4cdYkbsg7pwf)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
