| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9c1ba485-7da0-471f-aea4-b058acde7049?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This weekend at an undisclosed location I played in a men's league hockey game against FBI Director Kash Patel. His squad, a scrappy bunch who play hard on the puck and make up in grit for what they lack in flash, went down 3-0 in the first period.
Not only did I have nothing to do with any of the three goals that my team scored, I also violated the ice-age hockey credo: One shall not count certain victory in the first period of a hockey game, which is won and lost by momentum and teamwork more than individual skill. I thought that because we were winning, we would continue to win. We did not.
"We're gonna shitpump America's Chief Law-Enforcement Officer, boys!" I confidently exclaimed from the bench. My team may or may not be named _the Narcs (short for narcotics agent)_ and I may or may not be player #420, who provided the rinkside intelligence for this report.
Through a series of doorstep rebounds and crease battles, the Director and his team rallied back and evened the score with the alleged Narcs at 3-3. At one point during this rally, the Director blocked a shot with a hard chop that broke the stick of one of our best players.
One of our snipers nicknamed Joose ripped a snapper and made it 4-3.
But the FBI Director's squad scored a hard-fought, bang-bang goal 30 seconds later.
It was 4-4 in the third and final period. Then the Director and his team popped in another rebounder, taking the lead for the first time that night. Then another gritty goal; it was 6-4. Finally their team scored an empty netter to finish the job, a 7-4 loss for me and my team.
**Now, a brief word from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Presented By Birch Gold](https://substack.com/redirect/03f2baa6-5f14-46b9-980d-1d18de172115?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
**A Message from Dr. Ron Paul...**
# **"Do This One Thing BEFORE Trump's First 100 Days End!"**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/03f2baa6-5f14-46b9-980d-1d18de172115?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
While Trump being back in the White House is cause for optimism, I must sound a sobering alarm.
After 50 years of studying economic catastrophes, I can tell you this:
_The problems facing our financial system run**far deeper** than any single administration can fix._
The damage is systemic and severe:
* A monetary system completely **untethered** from reality
* A national debt that's **exploded** beyond comprehension
* The dollar's foundation **cracking** under its own weight

I'm Dr. Ron Paul, and I've spent my career fighting against these very dangers. Now, those chickens are coming home to roost.
Even with the right leadership, untangling this mess will take time.
**Meanwhile, your savings remain at risk...**
But you're not powerless! Throughout history, physical gold has been the **ultimate shield** against systemic economic disorder.
That's why I strongly recommend a Gold IRA.
My friends at Birch Gold Group understand what's at stake. They've helped thousands of Americans diversify their IRA or 401(k) with gold. And they can help you too! See how when get this free info kit on gold:
**[Click here to get your FREE Info Kit on Gold IRAs](https://substack.com/redirect/03f2baa6-5f14-46b9-980d-1d18de172115?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Don't wait for our systemic problems to trigger a crisis. The time to protect your retirement savings is now! Learn how to shield your savings from decades of financial mismanagement. **[Click here for your free info kit now.](https://substack.com/redirect/03f2baa6-5f14-46b9-980d-1d18de172115?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Get My Free Info Kit](https://substack.com/redirect/03f2baa6-5f14-46b9-980d-1d18de172115?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**Continued:**
In the locker room after the game, the gang and I were less-than devastated. Men's league regular season represents more of a play act of the real thing: everyone makes playoffs and that's any old-man's game. Many of our guys weren't aware that we just spent an hour firing pucks at our nation's new domestic police boss until I proclaimed, "well at least we lost to the Director of the FBI." One of our teammates, who checked Patel on the ice, didn't even realize that he had bumped helmets with the Bureau's boss until after the game.
From my intelligence gathering, I purport this was Patel's first formal hockey game as the Chief Law Enforcement Officer of the United States.
Apparently, Patel is off to a good start; a comeback victory from a deficit of 3-0 is worth merit no matter the politics or the sport. This is neither a puff piece nor a hit piece, because on the ice there is one thing that matters and one thing only: how well the boys play as a unit and what the scoreboard says at the end of the night.
The good news for me is that I was able to drink two Molsen's from the bench as I sat in between shifts. I was sipping the suds while I tried to figure out how we Narcs could tourniquet the bleeding and preserve our initial lead. The good news for America is that Patel and his team came out on top.
When it comes to men's league hockey, both sides of the team don't give a holler whether the guy they're skating with is red, blue, or an absolute bender (a term derived from a newbie whose ankles bend when they try to skate).
What matters is whether one plays for the guys next to them on the bench and--even if they throw a slightly reckless poke check once in a while--whether that player cares about the game enough to play it with grit to the bitter end.
I shook Kash Patel's hand after the game, "Good game, Director."
Then I skated away laughing at the gravity of this hockey game in which I, a FAKE NEWS reporter had just played. For first time in American history, a hockey bro was running our American police. In 2025 life is stranger than fiction to say the least.
If I may venture an opinion, the Director marks an upgrade from Mr. Lipstick Jay Edgar Hoover or that hulking drama queen known as James Corney, ahem, Comey. By all accounts these former FBI Directors were showmen, while Patel has proven to be a team player--I have confirmed this much with multiple members of his men's league squad.
The simple facts remain: Director Patel's team scrapped their way to victory and didn't once threaten to persecute me for wearing number 420, or for taking a few wayward clappers that may have zipped past the new Director's head. None of that mattered because hockey is about results, and the newly minted FBI Director's team won the game.

Feb 24 | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- This weekend at an undisclosed location I played in a men's league hockey game against FBI Director Kash Patel. His squad, a scrappy bunch who play hard on the puck and make up in grit for what they lack in flash, went down 3-0 in the first period. Not only did I have nothing to do with any of the three goals that my team scored, I also violated the ice-age hockey credo: One shall not count certain victory in the first period of a hockey game, which is won and lost by momentum and teamwork more than individual skill. I thought that because we were winning, we would continue to win. We did not. "We're gonna shitpump America's Chief Law-Enforcement Officer, boys!" I confidently exclaimed from the bench. My team may or may not be named the Narcs (short for narcotics agent) and I may or may not be player #420, who provided the rinkside intelligence for this report. Through a series of doorstep rebounds and crease battles, the Director and his team rallied back and evened the score with the alleged Narcs at 3-3. At one point during this rally, the Director blocked a shot with a hard chop that broke the stick of one of our best players. One of our snipers nicknamed Joose ripped a snapper and made it 4-3. But the FBI Director's squad scored a hard-fought, bang-bang goal 30 seconds later. It was 4-4 in the third and final period. Then the Director and his team popped in another rebounder, taking the lead for the first time that night. Then another gritty goal; it was 6-4. Finally their team scored an empty netter to finish the job, a 7-4 loss for me and my team. Now, a brief word from our sponsor (piece continues below) A Message from Dr. Ron Paul... "Do This One Thing BEFORE Trump's First 100 Days End!" | | ---|---|--- While Trump being back in the White House is cause for optimism, I must sound a sobering alarm. After 50 years of studying economic catastrophes, I can tell you this: The problems facing our financial system runfar deeper than any single administration can fix. The damage is systemic and severe: A monetary system completely untethered from reality A national debt that's exploded beyond comprehension The dollar's foundation cracking under its own weight I'm Dr. Ron Paul, and I've spent my career fighting against these very dangers. Now, those chickens are coming home to roost. Even with the right leadership, untangling this mess will take time. Meanwhile, your savings remain at risk... But you're not powerless! Throughout history, physical gold has been the ultimate shield against systemic economic disorder. That's why I strongly recommend a Gold IRA. My friends at Birch Gold Group understand what's at stake. They've helped thousands of Americans diversify their IRA or 401(k) with gold. And they can help you too! See how when get this free info kit on gold: Don't wait for our systemic problems to trigger a crisis. The time to protect your retirement savings is now! Learn how to shield your savings from decades of financial mismanagement. Continued: In the locker room after the game, the gang and I were less-than devastated. Men's league regular season represents more of a play act of the real thing: everyone makes playoffs and that's any old-man's game. Many of our guys weren't aware that we just spent an hour firing pucks at our nation's new domestic police boss until I proclaimed, "well at least we lost to the Director of the FBI." One of our teammates, who checked Patel on the ice, didn't even realize that he had bumped helmets with the Bureau's boss until after the game. From my intelligence gathering, I purport this was Patel's first formal hockey game as the Chief Law Enforcement Officer of the United States. Apparently, Patel is off to a good start; a comeback victory from a deficit of 3-0 is worth merit no matter the politics or the sport. This is neither a puff piece nor a hit piece, because on the ice there is one thing that matters and one thing only: how well the boys play as a unit and what the scoreboard says at the end of the night. The good news for me is that I was able to drink two Molsen's from the bench as I sat in between shifts. I was sipping the suds while I tried to figure out how we Narcs could tourniquet the bleeding and preserve our initial lead. The good news for America is that Patel and his team came out on top. When it comes to men's league hockey, both sides of the team don't give a holler whether the guy they're skating with is red, blue, or an absolute bender (a term derived from a newbie whose ankles bend when they try to skate). What matters is whether one plays for the guys next to them on the bench and--even if they throw a slightly reckless poke check once in a while--whether that player cares about the game enough to play it with grit to the bitter end. I shook Kash Patel's hand after the game, "Good game, Director." Then I skated away laughing at the gravity of this hockey game in which I, a FAKE NEWS reporter had just played. For first time in American history, a hockey bro was running our American police. In 2025 life is stranger than fiction to say the least. If I may venture an opinion, the Director marks an upgrade from Mr. Lipstick Jay Edgar Hoover or that hulking drama queen known as James Corney, ahem, Comey. By all accounts these former FBI Directors were showmen, while Patel has proven to be a team player--I have confirmed this much with multiple members of his men's league squad. The simple facts remain: Director Patel's team scrapped their way to victory and didn't once threaten to persecute me for wearing number 420, or for taking a few wayward clappers that may have zipped past the new Director's head. None of that mattered because hockey is about results, and the newly minted FBI Director's team won the game. PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. To support our work, consider becoming a paid subscriber today. | A guest post by| McGinniss is a DC-based independent journalist with over 12 years of experience working for media outlets across the political spectrum. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Politibrawl 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: When you get laid off, Jim Jordan will cheer
body:
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/LOGO.jpg]
Friends,
When thousands of Americans—thousands—are losing their jobs, most people feel compassion. Most people feel outrage.
But not Jim Jordan.
Nope. Jim Jordan just went on national TV laughing off the mass firing of federal workers.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=2025023_jordan_defending_cuts_image [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=2025023_jordan_defending_cuts_image]
Their idea and first target of “cutting wasteful spending” is to cut Americans' jobs! Can you believe that? I guess Trump was right, an immigrant is taking jobs away from Americans; his name is Elon Musk!
Workers who protect our national parks, help veterans get the care they need, and keep us safe from wildfires are losing their careers in record numbers and this man is laughing while basic services collapse around us.
Meanwhile, nearly 50,000 federal employees in Ohio are holding their breath, wondering if they’re next.
And for what?
To "save taxpayer money"? Give me a break.
These cuts don’t save you a dime—they’re just cruel, serving only to prop up Trump’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) and keep Elon Musk’s empire fat and happy.
While the world’s richest man dodges his fair share in taxes, it’s everyday Americans—people like YOU—who are losing their jobs, their livelihoods, and their futures.
And Jim Jordan is cheering and laughing the loudest. Disgusting.
We’re not just watching this happen. We’re taking this fight straight to Jim Jordan—will you chip in $50 now to help us hold him accountable? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=2025023_jordan_defending_cuts_link1]
Federal job cuts are slamming essential departments that make up less than 1% of the federal budget.
The Forest Service has already cut 3,400 jobs—just as wildfire season ramps up.
The VA has fired over 1,000 employees, leaving Ohio’s 830,000 veterans at risk of losing vital services.
And what about national security?
The Pentagon plans to cut 5,400 civilian employees, gutting operations that keep us safe.
But Jim Jordan couldn’t care less—because doing actual work for Ohio isn’t his thing. He’s spent 18 years in Congress and hasn’t passed a single bill.
Not. One.
The basic duty of a Congressman is to protect their constituents, to fight for their livelihoods, and to bring resources back home.
Instead, Jim Jordan is doing the opposite: enabling chaos, cheering on mass layoffs, and leaving hardworking Americans out to dry.
How can anyone claim to lead when they’re actively making life harder for the people they’re supposed to represent?
If you can’t stand up for veterans, families, and national security, you don’t belong in office—period.
We’re building a movement to stop this cruelty and put US first. Chip in now to fuel our fight and show Jim Jordan that we’re done letting him sell us out. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=2025023_jordan_defending_cuts_link2]
This newest form of the ULTRA-MAGA clown show isn’t about saving money—it’s about gutting the very fabric of our government.
It’s cruel, reckless, unforgivable and Jim Jordan is at the center of it all.
The good news is that we are on him—and we won’t let him win.
Working for US,
Tamie Wilson

subject: I will always stand up for Social Security
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Kansans know just how serious I am about protecting Social Security

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102706371/530008965/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTJmMDQzZS1mOGYyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tmJvh8vDaNj5D2cA1qVEbryfQYfKhdWZvLuBvYKVUgE=) Social Security isn’t just a life-saving program for America’s seniors. It’s a commitment that our nation made over 80 years ago — a commitment I’ve proudly worked to uphold since my first day in Washington. In Congress, I’ve voted to expand Social Security for public sector retirees like police officers and teachers, secured millions of dollars in backlogged payments for my constituents, and stood up against every effort to reduce these hard-earned benefits. Kansans know just how serious I am about protecting Social Security, which is why Elon Musk’s dangerous crusade against this program is particularly upsetting. [_**I’ll explain more below, but if you already know that our government needs leaders who will always stand up for America’s seniors, will you chip in to help me keep this competitive district from falling into the hands of extremists?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102706373/530008966/-1118985384?refcode=email_022425_Social-security&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTJmMDQzZS1mOGYyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tmJvh8vDaNj5D2cA1qVEbryfQYfKhdWZvLuBvYKVUgE=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102706376/530008967/-1118985384?refcode=email_022425_Social-security&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTJmMDQzZS1mOGYyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tmJvh8vDaNj5D2cA1qVEbryfQYfKhdWZvLuBvYKVUgE=)

Since Elon Musk was named as the leader of the so-called “Department of Government Efficiency,” he has forced workers in the Social Security Administration to step down — workers whose very job is making sure Americans receive the benefits they’ve earned.
**Now, without those public servants in the way, Musk has gained access to the main Social Security database — giving him the power to withhold Americans’ Social Security benefits on a whim and fire anyone who objects to his plans.**
Elon Musk’s playbook is crystal clear: He wants to cut off your Social Security benefits, and then use those savings to give _himself_ a massive tax cut.
Unfortunately, we can’t even count on Republicans in Congress to stop him. Last year, the vast majority of House Republicans supported a budget proposal to cut Social Security benefits for 257 million Americans!
That means the best way to put a stop to these attacks is by electing a Congress that will never be afraid to stand up to unelected billionaires like Musk — and that’s why I’m asking for your support.
[_**If you can, chip in today to help me keep this competitive seat out of the hands of the GOP. My long record of defending Social Security makes me a target for Musk and his billionaire allies, which is why your grassroots support is so, so important right now.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102706378/530008968/-1118985384?refcode=email_022425_Social-security&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTJmMDQzZS1mOGYyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tmJvh8vDaNj5D2cA1qVEbryfQYfKhdWZvLuBvYKVUgE=)

clean_body: Kansans know just how serious I am about protecting Social Security = Social Security isn’t just a life-saving program for America’s seniors. It’s a commitment that our nation made over 80 years ago — a commitment I’ve proudly worked to uphold since my first day in Washington. In Congress, I’ve voted to expand Social Security for public sector retirees like police officers and teachers, secured millions of dollars in backlogged payments for my constituents, and stood up against every effort to reduce these hard-earned benefits. Kansans know just how serious I am about protecting Social Security, which is why Elon Musk’s dangerous crusade against this program is particularly upsetting. = | | = Since Elon Musk was named as the leader of the so-called “Department of Government Efficiency,” he has forced workers in the Social Security Administration to step down — workers whose very job is making sure Americans receive the benefits they’ve earned. Now, without those public servants in the way, Musk has gained access to the main Social Security database — giving him the power to withhold Americans’ Social Security benefits on a whim and fire anyone who objects to his plans. Elon Musk’s playbook is crystal clear: He wants to cut off your Social Security benefits, and then use those savings to give himself a massive tax cut. Unfortunately, we can’t even count on Republicans in Congress to stop him. Last year, the vast majority of House Republicans supported a budget proposal to cut Social Security benefits for 257 million Americans! That means the best way to put a stop to these attacks is by electing a Congress that will never be afraid to stand up to unelected billionaires like Musk — and that’s why I’m asking for your support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = With gratitude, -Sharice | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. **In This Role He Could:**
* Help make decisions about funding priorities, including funding fake abortion clinics designed to deter patients from having abortions.
* Fast track regulations that restrict abortion, including ones that make it easier for law enforcement to access the medical records of abortion patients and defund Title X health clinics.
* Assist OMB Director Russell Vought—who is avidly anti-abortion and a coauthor of Project 2025—in carrying out Trump's anti-abortion agenda.

| **Red Flags:**
* He is a vocal opponent of abortion, explicitly stating that he thinks "it's wrong to have an abortion in the case of rape or incest."
* As a Member of Congress, Bishop recently cosponsored a national abortion ban and a bill that would enshrine fetal personhood into law, which could jeopardize access to abortion and IVF.
* As a North Carolina State Senator, Bishop authored discriminatory legislation restricting transgender individuals’ use of public restrooms.

---
**February 26: Department of Justice Assistant Attorney General for Civil Rights -[**Harmeet Dhillon**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102706606/530009647/-1356487560?sourceid=1150449&utm_campaign=25emeus-0202aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=reproredflags&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTUwMDYzYy1mOWYyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r9SqGLFCdSlx19hVJ740z38FdJbgxwrJrtktggwTjpE=&emci=0c5cc386-f2f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d550063c-f9f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=954237)**

**In This Role She Could:**
* Refuse to enforce the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act, a law that protects abortion clinics and patients from violent protesters.
* Decide whether or how to enforce Section 1557 of the Affordable Care Act, a policy that protects patients against discrimination on the basis of sex—including what health insurance will cover and what care doctors will provide.
* Allow anyone who works in a hospital—including non-medical staff and CEOs—to prevent doctors from providing reproductive health care services and gender-affirming care based on their own personal religious beliefs.
* Refuse to investigate reports of medical, employment, and housing discrimination based on pregnancy status, abortion history, or LGBTQIA identity.

| **Red Flags:**
* Dhillon has called herself a "lawyer for the pro-life movement" and personally represented an anti-abortion extremist whose actions incited violence and harassment of abortion providers and advocacy organizations.
* She claims that shield laws violate the Constitution. These laws protect abortion providers from prosecution for treating patients from other states.
* She and her law firm have been involved in many anti-abortion, anti-transgender, anti-immigration, and election-related lawsuits.

---
**February 26: Solicitor General -[**Dean John Sauer**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102706608/530009649/1883779823?sourceid=1150449&utm_campaign=25emeus-0202aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=reproredflags&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTUwMDYzYy1mOWYyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r9SqGLFCdSlx19hVJ740z38FdJbgxwrJrtktggwTjpE=&emci=0c5cc386-f2f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d550063c-f9f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=954237)**

**In This Role He Could:**
* Determine the United States’ position on federal lawsuits and side with anti-abortion extremists when they challenge existing policies on abortion pills and contraceptive access.
* Act as the lawyer for any federal agency—headed by President Trump's anti-abortion appointees—that attacks reproductive health care policies.
* Appeal decisions that block the Trump administration's anti-abortion policies, even escalating them to the Supreme Court.

| **Red Flags:**
* Sauer urged the courts to roll back access to abortion pills in the case _Alliance for Hippocratic Medicine v. FDA_ , which eventually made its way to the Supreme Court.
* He represented anti-abortion extremists whose actions incited violence and harassment of abortion providers and advocacy organizations.
* He filed multiple well-known anti-reproductive health care cases, including challenging the Title X rule and the city of St. Louis' reproductive equity fund.
* As Solicitor General of Missouri, he had a long history of defending abortion restrictions.

---
**February 26: Assistant Attorney General for the Department of Justice’s Office of Legal Policy -[**Aaron Reitz**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102706610/530009658/-1136556977?sourceid=1150449&utm_campaign=25emeus-0202aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=reproredflags&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTUwMDYzYy1mOWYyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r9SqGLFCdSlx19hVJ740z38FdJbgxwrJrtktggwTjpE=&emci=0c5cc386-f2f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d550063c-f9f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=954237)**

**In This Role He Could:**
* Recommend anti-abortion extremists for lifetime appointments as federal judges, including to the Supreme Court, and support them during the confirmation process.
* Advise the Attorney General—anti-abortion activist Pam Bondi—in attempting to restrict or even ban abortion nationwide, without the approval of Congress, by misusing the Comstock Act.
* Oversee internal DOJ policies and priorities, such as decisions about whether to enforce laws that protect abortion providers and patients.

| **Red Flags:**
* Reitz calls himself "unequivocally pro-life" and believes that "human life starts at conception, no exceptions."
* He served as a fellow for an anti-abortion group that recently asked the Supreme Court to take abortion pills off the market. ADF is designated as an anti-LGBT hate group by the Southern Poverty Law Center.
* As Texas’ Deputy Attorney General for Legal Strategy, Reitz supported efforts to dismantle abortion access, including challenging access to medication abortion.

---

body:
I remember the good times when you were a crucial part of our team.
Now’s your chance to reactivate, Friend.
|

| | |
Friend...

I'm not sure how to say this...

But I think it's time for us to face the truth...

**Your membership has expired, and now I 'm lost.** We had some great times, standing our House GOP Majority. _**But now, it seems like you've moved on.**_

body:

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_96qd0UKTtEc2l2-0UxslFVlIdVQEX6efs3C-LkwLRidNyqB4qGMfVj_m8e7vY3uMNZj58x3ZRuWABmB8OIZjxHBFJnKVCa84ZXizk07VibT6r77y6bPLU42FQDomWCGP7FK81DakWxuqyqQEFvC1opu2Vr9HJdPzciLxB_v95upiLqo2iHzHD3kdSRvrtbJJNBkkrz6Uj_SlbyOK_05R6lE8mangyIuReNdWUvBeOZmUpv0LptTG_Lo8bPa67O_l0KzXsSCTEg5X0kGQhOrxipljRReE7cNN-0pOOeAf-IPYkzFpdMAVX8SBXuzEfZ4yRSRFw9cth41vC55EXBDlKP8drTpwi54k5IsjdJVDvRvUASjtWFavNs8T9ulN_S7aPQfg87JvauKehKRCaZcy63LbXXJuEubG5YO2PHoSbBlyYY_I8FVyrJBPqf5m-69fbaCUw520jEEsoZPET58GIMLHv06ewu4zN2EUXl4Iwxw/4ea/5a6fw7l6Q4GeTu3f3F2Pow/h0/h001.vXkCbVEH1si__nAsGIt8mG5pphBhDAxLqFMCCX9I5aE)
**[Join Local Democracy Project and sign on to tell Congress to defend the Department of Education, not abolish it!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_96qd0UKTtEc2l2-0UxslFVlIdVQEX6efs3C-LkwLRidNyqB4qGMfVj_m8e7vY3uMNZj58x3ZRuWABmB8OIZjxHBFJnKVCa84ZXizk07VibT6r77y6bPLU42FQDomWCGP7FK81DakWxuqyqQEFvC1opu2Vr9HJdPzciLxB_v95upiLqo2iHzHD3kdSRvrtbJJNBkkrz6Uj_SlbyOK_05R6lE8mangyIuReNdWUvBeOZmUpv0LptTG_Lo8bPa67O_lG0H2m-2WmuDxlRmaJw8mmxTxZRZLcRP1VYq2aOrWT4kCoOZ6SfOJJw0PY8cMSVlX2rtPj9cCmwPQSJ6jTPPih6lXA8tYbcrBuhG1svHtxRlLTjvZvOPzmBCOwq8pJJx_8mWkt0RQ4zTvePS2idD8ku5JkArgj9xApUo86mJQF0AbmODmJqam0iIDNfL76RqIbYjsLYTRCgKWX0VtqiqPbjTjSmrmFLxHRY-v2VIhGRQ/4ea/5a6fw7l6Q4GeTu3f3F2Pow/h1/h001.P6LVp6ORrL84xyVuTk9nAs0PDwXrTeN2vEqWBO5NZvE)**
* * *
Extremist Republicans have introduced H.R. 899, a dangerous bill to eliminate the Department of Education entirely.
And Elon Musk and his so-called "DOGE bros" have invaded the Department of Education, locking out Congress and the public to meddle in the Department’s systems.
This isn’t just about bureaucracy; it’s about the future of millions of students, teachers, and families.
**If this bill passes, we could lose federal student loans, protections for students with disabilities, and national oversight that ensures equal access to education.**
******[NOW is the time to SAY NO! Sign on and demand that Congress reject this bill and SAVE the Department of Education!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_96qd0UKTtEc2l2-0UxslFVlIdVQEX6efs3C-LkwLRidNyqB4qGMfVj_m8e7vY3uMNZj58x3ZRuWABmB8OIZjxHBFJnKVCa84ZXizk07VibT6r77y6bPLU42FQDomWCGP7FK81DakWxuqyqQEFvC1opu2Vr9HJdPzciLxB_v95upiLqo2iHzHD3kdSRvrtbJJNBkkrz6Uj_SlbyOK_05R6lE8mangyIuReNdWUvBeOZmUpv0LptTG_Lo8bPa67O_ltPffdDCerT7SVddlcFk1U2JrGUNDVZpHamE9OkILjOM2CFp89KGoDrpmi7LUnD6HVUcwlCndAVckT4H02tf7z1AzjB7N1hDOG8Yn090VvRFO_z9J563CHFpTIks8u0v3dDzSv4oE4iO-I-Mk-PZmYVwSX0CR4Z9Ap2haxUTNMLGEQEZOfexcLxBplrTtHnDVh0_xG-ErhqGv95DmSAZLH4vjWNfjWfgGEL75qWv7Hng/4ea/5a6fw7l6Q4GeTu3f3F2Pow/h2/h001.kcGTT3sZoM6Ue5LlPM3QO0LUwyk1mTmoCgUVqT_M65Y)** [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_96qd0UKTtEc2l2-0UxslFVlIdVQEX6efs3C-LkwLRidNyqB4qGMfVj_m8e7vY3uMNZj58x3ZRuWABmB8OIZjxHBFJnKVCa84ZXizk07VibT6r77y6bPLU42FQDomWCGP7FK81DakWxuqyqQEFvC1opu2Vr9HJdPzciLxB_v95upiLqo2iHzHD3kdSRvrtbJJNBkkrz6Uj_SlbyOK_05R6lE8mangyIuReNdWUvBeOZmUpv0LptTG_Lo8bPa67O_n9bI4OwSpQb3ibPabsYtijkzIW9btP3WWLHMn-MKYbEDwNGXCH8HFU_q-h7ZRcQrdbSJAzhcTmPqBRJQ59a3IN3xmzQE55gswj2xNqPemmYBDn1vKT_OIYlaDslkyGyKpps_94WWLHTOHeSeeMdgmz7bjyvpimPmdf2orrvOvO35D8kuB7y3gJUZtzQN16KZFIOl9i2V2iWXsiHYmU-h93XdhCl11k2JfQu6v_lE_TFw/4ea/5a6fw7l6Q4GeTu3f3F2Pow/h3/h001.VNbXlqCMSxU7DC9aP3bHicp1eoAJyakqYQ7MjF44bV8)
Imagine a world where education becomes a privilege for the wealthy, leaving countless students in limbo without support.
The Department of Education manages over $1 trillion in federal student aid, including vital programs like Pell Grants and income-driven repayment plans.
This is not just a political issue; it’s a moral one. **
** **Every student deserves equal opportunities, regardless of their background. Congress must hear our voices! House Democrats can unite to stop this bill, and we need to urge them to do so.**
******[Join us and sign on to send a direct message to your members of Congress, demanding they reject this radical assault on public education.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_96qd0UKTtEc2l2-0UxslFVlIdVQEX6efs3C-LkwLRidNyqB4qGMfVj_m8e7vY3uMNZj58x3ZRuWABmB8OIZjxHBFJnKVCa84ZXizk07VibT6r77y6bPLU42FQDomWCGP7FK81DakWxuqyqQEFvC1opu2Vr9HJdPzciLxB_v95upiLqo2iHzHD3kdSRvrtbJJNBkkrz6Uj_SlbyOK_05R6lE8mangyIuReNdWUvBeOZmUpv0LptTG_Lo8bPa67O_mBWLQQZm9caBn8D9nwDkfQ6-JcZIHHF6wDUQU-HwvKPa1vHJKqihGkKTCdFELV2Ni5JxVbsEb9cKbytD9pwMHTV35hcqGZ3EmLqPmGvlRADy4MMwaTOQYeF7oLwFN3GSUWS1qE6X4AMkC8RYTdwK7gKRLSKqYWlTVfo7Xwr0YzzlHZXQNvE3bZwi8Bes3nq0ipMW1aAJvdTY3oB0xQNdXS6kjrmd4U6voDgVDYeBBvVQ/4ea/5a6fw7l6Q4GeTu3f3F2Pow/h4/h001.JpGY9whZQOgWgMXpnEkr4UpMST56MQvwILH__KOSjJ4)**

body:
Hi there — With so many new folks on Team Tran these days (welcome!), I wanted to reach out personally to re-introduce myself. My name is Derek Tran. I’m a veteran and small business owner, and I proudly represent California’s 45th District – an ultra-competitive, toss-up district in Southern California – in Congress.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102707466/530012575/1943818218?amount=25&amounts=5,10,5,50,250,500&refcode=em_fr_2025.02.24_b1_dt_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzA0YmZjNGYtZmJmMi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IOgz8UkXk4n4edsQrL3-8sdygbslFputg4Lj5vB3ccU=)

Hi there — With so many new folks on Team Tran these days (welcome!), I wanted to reach out personally to re-introduce myself.

My name is Derek Tran. I’m a veteran and small business owner, and **I proudly represent California’s 45th District – an ultra-competitive, toss-up district in Southern California – in Congress.**

In 2024, I defied the odds and flipped this seat from red-to-blue in one of the most competitive races in the country. We came out on top by only 653 votes. And in case there were any doubts, Republicans have already made it clear that I’m their #1 target to defeat in 2026.

[**More in a moment, but I hope you’ll recommit yourself to this fight by making a $3 donation to my re-election campaign today. Your grassroots support will be critical to keeping CA-45 blue and taking back the House Majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102707467/530012576/1943818218?amount=3&refcode=em_fr_2025.02.24_b1_dt_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzA0YmZjNGYtZmJmMi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IOgz8UkXk4n4edsQrL3-8sdygbslFputg4Lj5vB3ccU=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102707468/530012577/1435289434?amount=3&refcode=em_fr_2025.02.24_b1_dt_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzA0YmZjNGYtZmJmMi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IOgz8UkXk4n4edsQrL3-8sdygbslFputg4Lj5vB3ccU=)
---
**I’m the proud son of Vietnamese refugees.** My parents fled the Communist regime and left everything behind to start over in the United States, in hopes of giving me a better life.

**Leaving behind their home was not easy, but my parents were able to survive on their work ethic and their belief in the American Dream.** That dream became a reality when they opened up a corner store in Southern California, where I spent my summers behind the register learning the value of hard work.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102707469/530012578/1943818218?amount=3&refcode=em_fr_2025.02.24_b1_dt_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzA0YmZjNGYtZmJmMi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IOgz8UkXk4n4edsQrL3-8sdygbslFputg4Lj5vB3ccU=)**
**America gave my parents a chance so there was no question that I’d want to give back to the country that gave so much to me.** At the age of 18, I enlisted in the Army and proudly served my country. And now, I’m serving in Congress to ensure that every family can realize the same American Dream that mine did all those years ago.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102707470/530012579/1943818218?amount=3&refcode=em_fr_2025.02.24_b1_dt_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzA0YmZjNGYtZmJmMi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IOgz8UkXk4n4edsQrL3-8sdygbslFputg4Lj5vB3ccU=)**
Listen, Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and extreme House Republicans have put that Dream at risk. They’ve made it clear that they’re willing to do whatever it takes to line their own pockets, while you pay the price.

I’m working hard to stand up to corruption in Congress and fight for our community, but with Republicans fighting to flip this seat back, I’ll need your help to stay here.

[**If you’re with me, I hope you’ll consider pitching in $3 to my re-election campaign today. Every dollar makes a difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102707471/530012580/1943818218?amount=3&refcode=em_fr_2025.02.24_b1_dt_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzA0YmZjNGYtZmJmMi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IOgz8UkXk4n4edsQrL3-8sdygbslFputg4Lj5vB3ccU=)

Let’s do this together.

_Derek Tran_

www.derektranforcongress.com

Derek Tran is a veteran, consumer rights attorney, city commissioner, and a small business owner. Derek is running for Congress to fight for Californians, not corporations in Congress.

name: James Carville
subject: hell no!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by HMP, # [#]
body:
Click here to unsubscribe. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4xBla9HqS06_watf7h3QaQ2?source=header_rfe]
James Carville [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/91305/images/Carville%20Headshot.png]

It’s James Carville. Did you see this?

The New York Times just reported that our resistance to Donald Trump is “TIRED.”

C’mon...

Donald Trump and his billionaire donor Elon Musk have spent their first month in office trying to DESTROY our government and unravel our checks and balances.

Democrats aren’t tired – we’re FIRED up!

name: Wes Moore
subject: Thanks to the people around me
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102707633/530013179/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTk3YWExMC1mY2YyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B3t105OrElnX55bKSKMj0o6YtE7tx44geBFB0Ssfh7Y=&emci=5c70b8d5-f9f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=b197aa10-fcf2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=24635485)
Friend, I will be the first to admit that I am lucky to be where I am today. **I couldn’t do what I do today without the support of all of my family.** After my father passed away when I was young, I was raised by my mother and the help of the surrounding community. I learned that you are only as strong as the people that surround you. Growing up, my mother held me accountable and pushed me to be the best person I could be. She sent me to military school and I ended up joining the Army, where I learned some of the core values I hold to this day. I also owe my aunt for introducing me to the love of my life: Dawn Moore. We were set up on a blind date, and immediately hit it off. A coffee date turned into a dinner which turned into the best years of my life. Now, we have two wonderful children, Mia and James, and our dog Tucker, and live happily in Government House, or as we like to call it, the People’s House. All of the people in my life have shaped the way I approach being Maryland’s governor: **with care and accountability.** I seek to make sure that I treat each Marylander as though they are a part of my own family. One of Maryland’s great strengths is the support our communities give each other. I know that firsthand. By joining together, we’ll make this Maryland’s decade. Elevate, Wes
---

| Peter,

It’s hard to believe, but we’re approaching the final weeks of our petition process to get my name on the ballot for Governor! We’ve made incredible progress—thanks to the dedication of volunteers, organizers, and supporters like you. But now, we need your help more than ever to make sure we finish strong and submit our signatures on time.

We’re traveling across every corner of Virginia, connecting with voters, gathering signatures, and spreading our vision for a better, more secure future for every Virginian — filled with less chaos and division. With just a few weeks remaining, we’re counting on you to help keep momentum on our side.

We’re hiring more organizers, ramping up our grassroots efforts, and ensuring we have the resources needed to complete this vital work and set ourselves up for the General Election. But this all takes funding. We need to cover costs for travel, staffing, and materials so we can make sure our team can keep hitting the road and meeting voters where they are.

name: AOC
subject: America is not for sale.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Medicaid is not for sale.
NASA is not for sale.
The Post Office is not for sale.
**America is not for sale**.
We have an obligation to resist kings.
We outnumber the oligarchs.
And they can be overwhelmed.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/31897?refcode=em20250224-8213-P_FND_CTR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8213%2E2526796%2EKprqsE)

Alexandria

Team -- Our heroic soldiers make _unimaginable_ sacrifices to keep our country safe with the assurance that when they come home, _the American people will have their backs._

**But Donald Trump just broke that promise: He FIRED OVER A THOUSAND workers at the VA,_where nearly a third of all employees are veterans themselves._ Can we expect anything else from the man who called our fallen soldiers "suckers" and "losers"?**

Now, veterans could have longer waits to get medical help. Worse access to the benefits they earned. More struggle. Less support. _All because of Donald Trump._

**We _must_ stand up for veterans in their time of need. We've launched an URGENT petition to stand with them AGAINST Trump's disgusting actions, but we're still waiting on your signature -- so please, don't delay:**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/21099?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250224-BREAKING-VALayoffsSignOn-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250224-BREAKING-VALayoffsSignOn-ETG-sl1&akid=19661%2E9716520%2Ey04fnB)
**[Sign on before midnight to stand with our nation's veterans against Trump's VA layoffs>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21099?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250224-BREAKING-VALayoffsSignOn-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250224-BREAKING-VALayoffsSignOn-ETG-sl1&akid=19661%2E9716520%2Ey04fnB)**

Team DSCC

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: You'll want this in your home in 2025
body:
| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=10c09204d52e4df8acf38cdd98aaec74&_e=ADff0gyDuly_Q_JIFQWmrHl84fJh22Fu7-ukHJXxFu96H0ddxKV7S0nuJLkbdliztSmG2gFYFQCcxVMPKoE4tVj-q3A995YRlO2TyXXl3EyWUA8FlTBtuRFgqLtX2fu3GsoL7cm97C_6LZ_JfVyUezLGibaIlUePPjMGY3l8plJ03Sf9MIcPHj2okYsqSZpN4nnYY8c2tPySw__bzOjViG31QC0tnkQvsnUSKbOqm9nY36NJ8iZSpzyc7aPDf0Sf5NDoKvBH9RpRO8lpixcHiJBsmVjSyHcdZv9BA5CvblimidCgRzBS3zyG2c1udB1rpVy2RBYWVxrdzqJN5iWtMjgTBIQO3JMJKANLKPwcoedN3vavyj6sPcM5Qq9pXB_oqfrkiEMgT_tseA6_P7i6KQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=10c09204d52e4df8acf38cdd98aaec74&_e=ADff0gyDuly_Q_JIFQWmrHl84fJh22Fu7-ukHJXxFu96H0ddxKV7S0nuJLkbdliztSmG2gFYFQCcxVMPKoE4tVj-q3A995YRlO2TyXXl3EyWUA8FlTBtuRFgqLtX2fu3GsoL7cm97C_6LZ_JfVyUezLGibaIlUePPjMGY3l8plJ03Sf9MIcPHj2okYsqSZpN4nnYY8c2tPySw__bzOjViG31QC0tnkQvsnUSKbOqm9nY36NJ8iZSpzyc7aPDf0SfA92x8GC83ligREwMnOsEdAiR51H7OHivhKWucK3VIJW0E4QRqohhwc7NDot__QMKED-F5--ZPPakkbcQcABUrcrzVvK3caihYoqMc9-SFJ7royPMQB4G9Sdgl_5SvnAhYKiN0s9zXqPiovojREhrkA%3D%3D)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=10c09204d52e4df8acf38cdd98aaec74&_e=ADff0gyDuly_Q_JIFQWmrHl84fJh22Fu7-ukHJXxFu96H0ddxKV7S0nuJLkbdliztSmG2gFYFQCcxVMPKoE4tVj-q3A995YRlO2TyXXl3EyWUA8FlTBtuRFgqLtX2fu3GsoL7cm97C_6LZ_JfVyUezLGibaIlUePPjMGY3l8plJ03Sf9MIcPHj2okYsqSZpN4nnYY8c2tPySw__bzOjViG31QC0tnkQvsnUSKbOqm9nY36NJ8iZSpzyc7aPDf0Sf8yq5t1BXgU6G_s_1aRKxBavafo3riSxvEHst_w2FqC0yVWXsHCXa4EZV0hfCkARJhxZxZdxszPvwiy3lWJBUI_PVBN1kLCnJ-mP_9E9RcQfLMk0SSqfI2OxZl8g4ROegnJ96Hh_6BNrP1JJ0wsY9ag%3D%3D) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. clean_body: I’ve been thinking about it. I’d love to meet you! | | | | Friend, do you know what my favorite part of being your President is? It’s not signing Executive Orders – but I do LOVE that part of the job! The truth is, there’s absolutely NOTHING I love more than traveling across this incredible country, shaking hands with REAL American PATRIOTS like you. I really mean that! I do these visits for YOU — the GREAT American people — and I feel strongly that you should have a say in where I go next. But with so much on the TRUMP CALENDAR already, I can only afford to make a few trips. I look forward to meeting you one day! Donald J. name: Seth Koslow
subject: Stop the Steal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koslow for Nassau
body:
I will reduce frivolous spending like this. | | Friends,

Nassau County spent $20 million on legal fees, using taxpayer funds. **As your County Executive, I will reduce frivolous spending like this.**

**[Click here to support my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102709005/530017211/-1414184198?contactdata=VLjlAYLeNgOpXqqdMS1wIt0jlwPHEUBL/s0w6VxS6AYuL22UN8vXxC9Q5pz/ZS9bHP85zw9eCqQpHReMd3c1rOx4SKOPAj7KNKz9aLMijHc=&am=250.00&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWY4OGUzNGQtMDFmMy1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JMCejguMKZO-Z7PWecxyDcEFl24odI-udJEEpgII8To=&emci=287a00ff-eff2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=af88e34d-01f3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=17551891)**

Blakeman isn’t looking out for taxpayers – he’s using our money to enrich his political allies. **It’s outrageous, it’s unethical, and it needs to stop.**
_Newsday_ broke the story reporting that Nassau County allocated **$20 million of our taxpayer dollars** to outsource legal work within Blakeman’s administration. That’s triple the previous administration’s spending on lawyer fees and $20 million more than we’ll spend when I’m the County Executive.

**And the money went to Blakeman’s donors.** Check out this incredible quote from _Newsday_ :

_Several of the firms that did work for Nassau County have donated thousands to the county GOP and Blakeman since he ran for county executive. Longtime Nassau GOP leader Peter Bee and his firm Bee Ready Fishbein Hatter & Donovan have donated $10,600 to Blakeman and more than $85,000 to the Nassau County Republican Committee since 2021. Jaspan Schlesinger Narendran, another firm contracted by the county, donated more than $16,000 to the committee during the same time frame._

This is exactly what’s wrong with politics today – pay-to-play corruption that puts special interests ahead of taxpayers. **Nassau County deserves better.**

**[Can you chip in today to help us fight back? Every dollar we raise will go toward building a campaign that puts the people of Nassau County first.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102709006/530017212/-1414184198?contactdata=VLjlAYLeNgOpXqqdMS1wIt0jlwPHEUBL/s0w6VxS6AYuL22UN8vXxC9Q5pz/ZS9bHP85zw9eCqQpHReMd3c1rOx4SKOPAj7KNKz9aLMijHc=&am=250.00&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWY4OGUzNGQtMDFmMy1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JMCejguMKZO-Z7PWecxyDcEFl24odI-udJEEpgII8To=&emci=287a00ff-eff2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=af88e34d-01f3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=17551891)**

Together, we can clean up Nassau County and make government work for all of us – not just the well-connected.

Thank you for your support!

Best,
Seth
---

Hi Friend,
So here we go.
The radical right-wing MAGA majority on SCOTUS is about to decide whether to overturn two lower courts and give Trump the right to fire the head of the independent office of the Special Counsel.
Given his criminal history, we know Trump is not a fan of independent investigators.
We also know the cast of characters belonging to SCOTUS’s MAGA majority have become fond of creating things like immunity from prosecution for Trump even though it appears nowhere in the Constitution.
This is what happens when justices like Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito have no guardrails, serve lifetime appointments, and feel free to pursue their radical political agendas.
That’s about to change with your help.
Term Limit the Court is the national campaign working with 75 members of Congress to end lifetime appointments and enact 18-year term limits.
Our movement's momentum has exploded over the last year, and given Trump’s all-out assault on our government and way of life, there’s never been more support.
But to get this done, we need the majority of the House and Senate. We’re raising what’s needed to back candidates who pledge to support the TERM Act.
Given what’s on the line, we’d be grateful for your help!

The MAGA majority on SCOTUS isn’t stopping after stealing the rights of women to make their own healthcare decisions.
**[>>>Let’s retire Thomas and Alito. Let’s return SCOTUS to its role of upholding “Equal justice under law.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102709439/530018986/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWVhZWRjMjAtMDNmMy1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZxqQRjPhYoovzGU7N3rmJUEpXHxHk5Cl5bjS-kq2-BQ=)**

The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. _There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court._

subject: They're making their move.

body:
On Friday night, while most of us were logging off and winding down — eating dinner, watching a movie with the kids, or enjoying an evening out with friends — Trump and Hegseth started purging senior Military officers that they deem insufficiently loyal. We’ve been talking about this for months, and last night it finally began.
#
Peter:
A Friday night massacre.
On Friday night, while most of us were logging off and winding down — eating dinner, watching a movie with the kids, or enjoying an evening out with friends — Trump and Hegseth started purging senior Military officers that they deem insufficiently loyal. We’ve been talking about this for months, and it finally began.
They started with the Chair of the Joint Chiefs, General CQ Brown. They followed with Chief of Naval Operations Admiral Lisa Franchetti and Air Force Vice Chief of Staff General James Slife.
But they didn’t stop there.
Trump and Hegseth also purged the Judge Advocates General for the Army, Navy, and Air Force. JAG officers interpret and determine lawful and constitutional orders. Replacing career JAG officers with loyalists is essential to Trump’s overall goal of a Military dedicated not to the Constitution, but to him alone.
To put it bluntly, our adversaries are popping champagne right now. There is no better outcome for them than the promotion of Trump loyalists over the best and brightest. They know that this move makes our Military weaker.
The real concern is what comes next. Trump has made his intentions clear. He has openly signaled his intent to ignore the Constitution, he has attacked democratic processes and elections for the better part of a decade, and the actions he and Elon Musk have taken over the last four weeks openly defy longstanding Constitutional order.
This is a dangerous moment, and we have to be ready for whatever happens. VoteVets will be standing by. Are you with us?

clean_body: On Friday night, while most of us were logging off and winding down — eating dinner, watching a movie with the kids, or enjoying an evening out with friends — Trump and Hegseth started purging senior Military officers that they deem insufficiently loyal. We’ve been talking about this for months, and last night it finally began. Peter: A Friday night massacre. On Friday night, while most of us were logging off and winding down — eating dinner, watching a movie with the kids, or enjoying an evening out with friends — Trump and Hegseth started purging senior Military officers that they deem insufficiently loyal. We’ve been talking about this for months, and it finally began. They started with the Chair of the Joint Chiefs, General CQ Brown. They followed with Chief of Naval Operations Admiral Lisa Franchetti and Air Force Vice Chief of Staff General James Slife. But they didn’t stop there. Trump and Hegseth also purged the Judge Advocates General for the Army, Navy, and Air Force. JAG officers interpret and determine lawful and constitutional orders. Replacing career JAG officers with loyalists is essential to Trump’s overall goal of a Military dedicated not to the Constitution, but to him alone. To put it bluntly, our adversaries are popping champagne right now. There is no better outcome for them than the promotion of Trump loyalists over the best and brightest. They know that this move makes our Military weaker. The real concern is what comes next. Trump has made his intentions clear. He has openly signaled his intent to ignore the Constitution, he has attacked democratic processes and elections for the better part of a decade, and the actions he and Elon Musk have taken over the last four weeks openly defy longstanding Constitutional order. This is a dangerous moment, and we have to be ready for whatever happens. VoteVets will be standing by. Are you with us? body:
Last November, I flipped a U.S. House seat from red to blue by just 653 votes.
To be blunt: It doesn’t get much closer than this. Take a look yourself: ⬇️
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-feb25-tran?refcode=&amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-feb25-tran?refcode=&amount=]I won this razor-thin seat because we started organizing our grassroots movement LONG before Election Day. We have the opportunity to keep running this “early bird” strategy to flip more seats in 2026 and retake the U.S. House. Will you split a donation between the California Democratic Party and my swing seat campaign now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-feb25-tran?refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-feb25-tran?&refcode=&amount=]Today, I am in Washington DC standing up to the Trump Administration and fighting for working Americans because of a margin of 653 votes.
If we had only started organizing in 2024, or if we opened our regional offices a few weeks later, or if we put off door-knocking just a little longer, we may have lost out on connecting with the 653 voters who made *THE* difference in this race.
That’s why putting together an “always on” organizing program is so important. My campaign isn’t stopping, and neither is the California Democratic Party. We have big plans for 2025, but need your support in order to have the necessary budget.

name: Team WFP
subject: Petition to Congress: Say no to Musk’s attacks on Medicaid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, Tomorrow, Trump’s 2025 budget resolution is scheduled for a first vote in the House. Republicans are trying to pass MASSIVE cuts to Medicaid, schools, food assistance, and more — all with the explicit goal of giving nearly $1 trillion in tax cuts to billionaires.1 **But we have a real shot at blocking them. Here’s how:** First, all 215 Democrats in the House need to hold the line. Then, we just need TWO Republican members to vote in opposition. If we do that, the Trump/Musk budget resolution is dead on arrival. [**That’s why we need you to sign up for our phonebank tomorrow from 12-2pm ET. We’ll be talking to voters in Republican-held districts, urging them to call _their own_ representatives and demand that they vote “No.”**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIxfYrd-GXiaikPtbheHz3zoDMZSfmGlhG5Hha9IzabNNHzJlcAuEWRY4MUq8BmbWY6UunaNZzjjmaS9_4mf6chYkpGo4NcKmdKjVnmYdadBAQISNH8PmQeXAUoJrskGSfeJhmQiv7kPG2SsiMAe_pOqqynoa8HJt-BBExoHdPMP9v0YbYIw7oobVPHDB_MPxRnjB2AZ7Q9du7_6efBGUvv9rAYIWxZf8e-y8SWaEryLX5OFbNPm0JLaicGDLstyeXk/4ea/uQVN1yEuQfWMdkaEnDtyog/h0/h001.bIPHrTmx-EigfWl2rJ9a3An6YADRnEQw_6qZ12POhBE) **[Join the phonebank »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIxfYrd-GXiaikPtbheHz3zoDMZSfmGlhG5Hha9IzabNNHzJlcAuEWRY4MUq8BmbWY6Vzz2SP-YFvOm71xfuAUSRxdHes6rvOxi2obTKZdQnbCoD6fhfFhzZCZxAsjuMuayp8PpZ4c1GybOanZjcIUyq_vupI4D2-YJsI-okjUef5hxpCTdsdIL4XjYijolkSlacT1r263O6C8gwivuwKLDcRtdb77Otmjbs0IwkzZvYG0SQ-q2iSaTEsCp3cQWoHFj/4ea/uQVN1yEuQfWMdkaEnDtyog/h1/h001.ZCbcDrTDl5pgsxVvP7LjePtiLU2tnhfa_P8pG5TqfJo)** And once you’ve signed up (or if you won’t be able to join), [add your name to our petition](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRImmimh3jp2d-3TZzmeeGfu-UTQdsDuya64KpuO8JCNfpJz62tZbS1uRaEs6xz5o90uNmX8dsSgL8sltpNf5QPEu3JtN57d8x4kuigCXfMns0vtu5k5tPgU_wUZb7uomMenHbnO1iKc2RRVfIrCgWU4H6BHxkkna1jb-_TCt4N-fkCSysk70UgptCyyGIj5hAGr48K5EIy6Q4h9KMC810_qaz42UOggyL6QbqpwZZBmSkR8-QVq6dREjkf7_Nv8p8oG36gV0Q9L2ZPM7XqfH6DVhX3XkaHHcX_r5xYoik3WW7-u1uImxtslONPRoONieuPFYnwmae94kIv811EDhRg7epJhV7K-lZ_kz0o1HZCQXA/4ea/uQVN1yEuQfWMdkaEnDtyog/h2/h001.zTirM6LghcERB4JnQaRrpPbEao68lJvCgCxY7RsH_98) and we’ll let you know how you can keep up the pressure in other ways. **During last week’s recess, hundreds of constituents of vulnerable House Republicans in districts in New York, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin showed up at Congressional offices as part of a wave of actions organized by the Working Families Party.** And in other places across the country like Georgia, Oregon, and Oklahoma, Republican town hall meetings erupted into protest over Trump’s seemingly-endless cuts to our social safety net.2 **This tells us two critical things:**
1. **We are not alone in our outrage.** Working families — regardless of political affiliation — are waking up to the reality that Trump and Musk are trying to rob them blind at the behest of billionaires.

2. **These Republicans are well-aware that they are in danger** — and that their chances to win again will _plummet_ if they vote to allow Trump and Musk to pillage our Medicaid, Social Security, SNAP, and more.

[This is a pivotal moment, Peter. So please sign up right now for our phonebank tomorrow (Tuesday) from 12-2pm ET.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIxfYrd-GXiaikPtbheHz3zoDMZSfmGlhG5Hha9IzabNNHzJlcAuEWRY4MUq8BmbWY6B4T9swDoXjCBg5gb9mJjBikRYvNojYVAgYSfdfzwlAa_UgZZh-8inshl-IXx6iU_FLFo7DwXyUjfJBjhy0ueXjlH0ZpI_IDSLXytruD3AeKWrZlQ8zsvuy879A5gvpXSd7CLGcg4kpUdP8qdQf0TwEAbsxmF3HuEf5yZB_6MenOjnmaWO05wGq1sedOj5ZC9/4ea/uQVN1yEuQfWMdkaEnDtyog/h3/h001.YH76eQwvgkIiT7jogeWbqUxHL_D-wCNjEFvkXZB9pYc) **Or, if you can’t make it,** [sign our petition to Congress.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRImmimh3jp2d-3TZzmeeGfu-UTQdsDuya64KpuO8JCNfpJz62tZbS1uRaEs6xz5o90uNmX8dsSgL8sltpNf5QPEu3JtN57d8x4kuigCXfMns0vtu5k5tPgU_wUZb7uomMenHbnO1iKc2RRVfIrCgWU4YKAUpzD8UYmpSO7l8gDBWZZj7bBCCMKxfRVV_PKNfIdro3hKBJyEtbID7YXC6XDjc-k25hylt1psOlnz3qrhCjHm0hjwnRDM64rNtG6CC8LShozNb7jgkyDiX4i8F3aon53n72tV-vthIf0suONg1u9w_7UgeXMoTMQ7Dn9l3QqsA3Rv_YJCVFhLm6ZyY8xGmXTGaFPkWpJ1WOLwvFiSqA/4ea/uQVN1yEuQfWMdkaEnDtyog/h4/h001.3KWgMIzL4tGS3WfOe38bZm4aTjDnS2TImcw4jM7XcXs) In solidarity, Team WFP Sources: 1\. clean_body: | | | Peter, Tomorrow, Trump’s 2025 budget resolution is scheduled for a first vote in the House. Republicans are trying to pass MASSIVE cuts to Medicaid, schools, food assistance, and more — all with the explicit goal of giving nearly $1 trillion in tax cuts to billionaires.1 But we have a real shot at blocking them. Here’s how: First, all 215 Democrats in the House need to hold the line. Then, we just need TWO Republican members to vote in opposition. If we do that, the Trump/Musk budget resolution is dead on arrival. And once you’ve signed up (or if you won’t be able to join), and we’ll let you know how you can keep up the pressure in other ways. During last week’s recess, hundreds of constituents of vulnerable House Republicans in districts in New York, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin showed up at Congressional offices as part of a wave of actions organized by the Working Families Party. And in other places across the country like Georgia, Oregon, and Oklahoma, Republican town hall meetings erupted into protest over Trump’s seemingly-endless cuts to our social safety net.2 This tells us two critical things: 1. We are not alone in our outrage. Working families — regardless of political affiliation — are waking up to the reality that Trump and Musk are trying to rob them blind at the behest of billionaires. 2. These Republicans are well-aware that they are in danger — and that their chances to win again will plummet if they vote to allow Trump and Musk to pillage our Medicaid, Social Security, SNAP, and more. Or, if you can’t make it, In solidarity, Team WFP Sources: 1\. , Center on Budget and Policy Priorities, February 21, 2025 2\. , NBC News, February 21, 2025 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=22882%2E4449941%2ENgk2a7) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=22882%2E4449941%2ENgk2a7) [**This could change EVERYTHING!!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59769?t=3&akid=22882%2E4449941%2ENgk2a7) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59769?t=4&akid=22882%2E4449941%2ENgk2a7) We could FINALLY slow Trump's reign of terror - if things are this bad in the first weeks, imagine how bad the next FOUR YEARS will be!!

We need these impeachment articles to pass ASAP, but it will go NOWHERE without support from AT LEAST [91] more Good Democrats.

[**_Add your name before 11:59 p.m. to co‐sign the impeachment articles against Donald Trump ->_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59769?t=5&akid=22882%2E4449941%2ENgk2a7) | [CO-SIGN TRUMP'S IMPEACHMENT ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59769?t=6&akid=22882%2E4449941%2ENgk2a7)
---
Look - here's what Trump has done in just his first weeks:

- pardoned every single January 6th rioter

- accused USAID of being corrupt and dismantled it

- investigated FBI agents who worked on Jan. 6 cases

- froze funding for Medicare, Social Security, and more

- tried to enact 25% tariffs on Canada, Mexico, and China

- gave Elon Musk unlimited access to government servers

- withdrew from the World Health Organization and the Paris Climate Agreement
We're TERRIFED about what he could do in the next four years.

That's why we need the House to impeach Trump. And we can REALLY DO THIS!! Just look at what Jamie Raskin said:
That's why we're rushing to get 1O,OOO citizen co-sponsors on the articles of impeachment to convince two Republicans to get on board and end this madness.
[**_Add your name before 11:59 p.m. to co‐sign the impeachment articles against Donald Trump ->_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59769?t=7&akid=22882%2E4449941%2ENgk2a7)
[CO-SIGN TRUMP'S IMPEACHMENT ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59769?t=8&akid=22882%2E4449941%2ENgk2a7)
---
Still fighting,

_Fight for Reform_

Peter, we are a little over one month into Donald Trump’s presidency. Since he has stepped foot in office, he has only worked to disadvantage everyday Americans. We have our work cut out for us, so we want to keep you as up-to-date as possible. Here's what you need to know → ❌ Trump has launched a full-blown attack on DEI and even labeled it as the cause of a devastating plane crash. ❌ He has allowed Elon Musk to take over our government. Elon has infiltrated various agencies and has fired thousands of hardworking Americans. ❌ He also is pushing for a federal funding freeze, which would be devastating for everyday Georgians. Peter, we could go on, but that's just to name a few. Georgians can’t afford to foot the bill of Trump’s reckless policies. We have to fight him every step of the way. [That is why we have to raise $35,000 by the end-of-month. name: The Democrats
subject: We’re seeing firsthand how dangerous Trump is
body:
We launched the 100-Day Fight Fund to organize against Trump’s detrimental executive orders.
---
Derek — We’re a little over a month into Trump’s presidency and we’re seeing firsthand how dangerous he is for this country. He and his allies are working to enact their extremist Project 2025 agenda and are hoping that the rest of us just sit by and watch. They’d love to see Democrats give up. But we won’t — and never will. Which is why we launched the 100-Day Fight Fund in January to organize against Trump’s detrimental executive orders, resist his Project 2025 agenda, and win back control of Congress come 2026. [**Donate to our 100-Day Fight Fund today to stand up to Trump and elect Democrats nationwide.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025-100dayfightfund?amount=3&refcode=em_20250224_2840_fr&refcode2=2840_22930333_821UPi&akid=2840%2E22930333%2E821UPi) **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025-100dayfightfund?refcode=em_20250224_2840_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2840_22930333_821UPi&akid=2840%2E22930333%2E821UPi)** Trump has already spent his first month in office pushing harmful legislation that only benefits his wealthy allies like Elon Musk. How we actively respond makes all the difference. We can’t let their agenda become our new reality — not without a fight. And the earlier we start, the more of an impact we can have in safeguarding our democracy. [**So please, chip in $3 today to our 100-Day Fight Fund. We will put your contribution to work immediately, organizing and mobilizing against Trump and his allies’ harmful policies while working to build the long-term infrastructure we’ll need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025-100dayfightfund?amount=3&refcode=em_20250224_2840_fr&refcode2=2840_22930333_821UPi&akid=2840%2E22930333%2E821UPi) Thank you for your help, today and every day. The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Allison [GOP HQ]
subject: This is my third attempt to reach you!
body:
I've been trying to get a hold of you for weeks!

| |
---
| | | Peter - it's Allison with GOP HQ.

I've been trying to reach you for weeks! My team has been tasked with collecting one million responses to our survey to assess Republican support in 2024 so that we can start 2025 off strong.

And your response appears to be **LOST!**

Your zip code has been assigned to me, and right now, we're lagging behind other areas in your home state!

name: Crow HQ
subject: Not egg-cellent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team —

If you’re anything like us, you’re seeing the costs of eggs at the grocery store skyrocket. Just take a look at the price of eggs we saw the other day!

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-feb25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-feb25]

Not egg-cellent. These prices are rotten.

Meanwhile, Donald Trump is helping lower costs by... cutting taxes for billionaires? Trying to buy Greenland? Renaming the Gulf of Mexico?

Yeah, we’re not egg-sperts, but we’re definitely running around like chickens without their heads trying to solve that one.

Trump promised to lower everyday costs for the American people. Instead, he's busy trying to line the pockets of his billionaire friends all while hardworking Coloradans are paying the price at the grocery store.

Jason is calling Trump out every day — because the American people deserve better.

Forgive all the puns, but we’d be so egg-cited if you chipped in to Jason’s campaign ahead of his February end-of-month fundraising deadline.

Can you pitch in $13 ~ about the cost of eggs these days ~ to support Jason’s work to defeat the MAGA agenda and deliver for hard-working Coloradans? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-feb25?amount=13]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $13 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-feb25?amount=13&express_lane=true]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-feb25?amount=25&express_lane=true]

DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-feb25?amount=50&express_lane=true]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-feb25?amount=100&express_lane=true]

DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-feb25?amount=250&express_lane=true]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-feb25]

We can’t shell you enough how grateful we are to have you on our team.

We hope your day is sunny-side up! 🍳

— Crow HQ
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
